    PROCEDURE DealerCheckRunForm@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353001 : Record 79;
      DealerMgt@1101353000 : Codeunit 5086700;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN
        IF DealerMgt.GetDealer <> '' THEN
      // Start PA033251.7599731
          ERROR(C_INC001);
      // Stop PA033251.7599731
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectionFilter@9176300() : Text;
    VAR
      SalespersonPurchaserL@9176300 : Record 13;
      FirstL@9176301 : Text[20];
      LastL@9176302 : Text[20];
      SelectionFilterL@9176303 : Text;
      CounterL@9176304 : Integer;
      MoreL@9176305 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function is used to return the selected Salespeople/Purchasers code
      // @ retval Text

      // Start EU.0012606
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(SalespersonPurchaserL);
      CounterL := SalespersonPurchaserL.COUNT;
      IF CounterL > 0 THEN BEGIN
        SalespersonPurchaserL.FINDSET;
        WHILE CounterL > 0 DO BEGIN
          CounterL := CounterL - 1;
          SalespersonPurchaserL.MARKEDONLY(FALSE);
          FirstL := SalespersonPurchaserL.Code;
          LastL := FirstL;
          MoreL := (CounterL > 0);
          WHILE MoreL DO
            IF SalespersonPurchaserL.NEXT = 0 THEN
              MoreL := FALSE
            ELSE
              IF NOT SalespersonPurchaserL.MARK THEN
                MoreL := FALSE
              ELSE BEGIN
                LastL := SalespersonPurchaserL.Code;
                CounterL := CounterL - 1;
                IF CounterL = 0 THEN
                  MoreL := FALSE;
              END;
          IF SelectionFilterL <> '' THEN
            SelectionFilterL := SelectionFilterL + '|';
          IF FirstL = LastL THEN
            SelectionFilterL := SelectionFilterL + FirstL
          ELSE
            SelectionFilterL := SelectionFilterL + FirstL + '..' + LastL;
          IF CounterL > 0 THEN BEGIN
            SalespersonPurchaserL.MARKEDONLY(TRUE);
            SalespersonPurchaserL.NEXT;
          END;
        END;
      END;
      EXIT(SelectionFilterL);
      // Stop EU.0012606
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      //  @ Area RelationshipManagement
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031908   11.05.10 Update of outlook integration: removed reference to old version of outlook integration
      PA031550   23.09.10 AA Added Create To-do and Create Opportunity buttons
      PA032651   21.03.12 DR 2559014: All incorrect spelling variants of Caption "To-Dos" or "To-Do" corrected.
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA032651   25.04.12 DR 6012646: DEU and ENU Captions corrected
      PA033251   29.05.12 GB 7599731: On Openform if Importer then raise error with constant
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033334   04.09.12 DR DEU Captions added N.6.1.2
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA034733   11.12.13 WZ 19649: Realignment of DB & TFS
      PA036728   19.09.14 SW Added Control for new field "Type Salesperson/Purchaser"
      PA032891   27.06.12 GL 11:20:35 Added Staff Details Factbox
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA036548   17.12.14 GL Merge of PA036728
      PA036549   10.02.15 LR 33714 Don't promote actions. Hide Notes FactBox. and reorganize Navigation ribbon
      PA038127   21.10.16 GP Action Create To Do modified to Set Origin Type field
      PA040025   14.12.16 GI Added fields "Sales Lead Channel Code", "Sales Lead Source Code",
                             "Sales Cycle Code".
                             - Added Opportunity Templates under Salesperson action group.
      PA040025   27.12.16 GQ 83148 Added field "Use Opportunity Templates"
      PA040025   10.01.16 GI 83488 Removed the filter on Salesperson Code and changed the icon on the Create Opportunity action.
      --- 7.2.0 ---
      EU.0012606 31.01.16 PM New function added "GetSelectionFilter"
      --- 7.3.0 --- Downmerge
      EU.0015816 24.05.18 JS Merge of EU.0012606
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0091763 27.05.20 UU Downmerge of EU.0015816
      EU.0200720 10.07.25 DR 199667 Add "Global Dimension 2 Code" (Make Code) to the list.
    }
    END.
  }

    PROCEDURE GetSelectionFilter@3() : Text;
    VAR
      Loc@1001 : Record 14;
      SelectionFilterManagement@1002 : Codeunit 46;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA036002.26309

      EXIT(SelectionFilterManagement.GetSelectionFilterForLocation(Loc));
      // Stop PA036002.26309
    END;

    PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@1109400000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckInternalCustomer@1109400001(ActualCustomerP@1109400000 : Code[20]) CustomerInternalR : Boolean;
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1109400002 : Record 79;
      LocationL@1109400001 : Record 14;
    BEGIN
      // CheckInternalCustomer
      // Start INC
      CustomerInternalR := FALSE;
      IF ActualCustomerP = '' THEN
        EXIT;

      CompanyInfoL.GET();
      IF (CompanyInfoL."Internal Customer" <> '') AND (ActualCustomerP = CompanyInfoL."Internal Customer") THEN BEGIN
        CustomerInternalR := TRUE;
      END ELSE BEGIN
        LocationL.RESET;
        LocationL.SETFILTER("Internal Customer",'<>%1',' ');
        IF LocationL.FIND('-') THEN BEGIN
          REPEAT
            IF ActualCustomerP = LocationL."Internal Customer" THEN BEGIN
              CustomerInternalR := TRUE;
            END;
          UNTIL (LocationL.NEXT = 0) OR CustomerInternalR;
        END;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetSelltoCustomerNo@1109400002(SelltoCustomerNoP@1109400000 : Code[20]);
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      SelltoCustNoG := SelltoCustomerNoP;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE IsImporter@5025800() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      EXIT(CompanyInfoG.IMSCheck());
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnAfterGetCurrRecord@19077479();
    VAR
      CustInternalL@1109400000 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      xRec := Rec;
      // Start INC
      CustInternalL := CheckInternalCustomer(SelltoCustNoG);
      IF CustInternalL THEN
        FILTERGROUP(2);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area General
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031549   23.12.09 Page 5400 replaced with Page 7302
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA032862   23.05.12 KC 7386265: Removed menu item Time Management
      PA033328   19.06.12 KC Merge of RET to Ongoing 612 objects
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA033897   04.03.13 DR Changes for Branch Item In-Transit Location posting
                       - Show field "Use As In-Transit"
      PA036002   25.07.14 TS 26309 Dimensions Functionality - New Function GetSelectionFilter.
      PA036547   07.11.14 GE Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0
      PA036549   10.02.15 33717 Do not display Notes FactBox and don't promote any action in Home Ribbon
      PA045176   13.10.17 NG Added Field(s): "Auto Req. Wksh. Name"
      --- 7.1.5 ---
      PA045273   21.12.17 DR Correction of PA045176: In OnLookup of "Auto Req. Wksh. Name" call AutoReqWkshNameOnLookup
      --- 7.2.0 ---

                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 157     ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=F&unctions }
      { 163     ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Ellipsis=Yes;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Reverse Transaction;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=DeleteQtyToHandle;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 ReversalEntry@1000 : Record 179;
                                 _INCADEA_@1119432001 : Integer;
                                 VehicleLedgerEntryL@1119432002 : Record 5025405;
                                 ARDepreciationSetupL@1109400000 : Record 5204802;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start PA032441.#Defect4524325
                                 // Start EU.0139128.130007
                                 IF "Cash Register Posting" THEN
                                   ERROR(C_INC002);
                                 // Stop EU.0139128.130007

                                 // Stop PA032441.#Defect4524325
                                 CLEAR(ReversalEntry);
                                 IF Reversed THEN
                                   ReversalEntry.AlreadyReversedEntry(TABLECAPTION,"Entry No.");
                                 // Start PA032917
                                 IF "Journal Batch Name" = '' THEN BEGIN
                                   VehicleLedgerEntryL.RESET;
                                   VehicleLedgerEntryL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
                                   VehicleLedgerEntryL.SETRANGE("Posting Date","Posting Date");
                                   VehicleLedgerEntryL.SETFILTER("Journal Batch Name",'<>%1','');
                                   IF VehicleLedgerEntryL.ISEMPTY THEN BEGIN
                                     ReversalEntry.TestFieldError;
                                   END;
                                 END;
                                 // Stop PA032917
                                 // Start PA040256.58377
                                 ARDepreciationSetupL.GET();
                                 IF ARDepreciationSetupL."Source Code" = "Source Code" THEN
                                   ReversalEntry.TestFieldError;
                                 // Stop PA040256.58377
                                 TESTFIELD("Transaction No.");
                                 ReversalEntry.ReverseTransaction("Transaction No.")
                               END;
                                }
      { 48401   ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=G/L Entry Reconciliation;
                      Description=EU.0000484;
                      Visible=False }
      { 48402   ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Apply G/L Entry;
                      Description=EU.0000484;
                      Enabled=AccountForRecG;
                      Image=Apply;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0000484
                                 ApplyReconciliation();
                                 // Stop EU.0000484
                               END;
                                }
      { 48403   ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Unapply G/L Entry;
                      Description=EU.0000484;
                      Enabled=AccountForRecG;
                      Image=UnApply;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0000484
                                 UnApplyReconciliation();
                                 // Stop EU.0000484
                               END;
                                }
      { 24      ;1   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Navigate;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=Navigate;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 Navigate.SetDoc("Posting Date","Document No.");
                                 Navigate.RUN;
                               END;
                                }
    }

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      Navigate@1000 : Page 344;
      _INCADEA_@1109400001 : Boolean;
      UserSetupG@1109400002 : Record 91;
      C_INC001@1109400003 : TextConst 'ENU=You have no permission to view data with the %1 %2!';
      C_INC002@1109400004 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot reverse a Cash Register Transaction';
      GLAccountG@48400 : Record 15;
      AccountForRecG@48401 : Boolean;
      C_INC_UnApplyErr@572200 : TextConst 'ENU=Nothing to Un-Apply, Entry No.: %1!';
      C_INC_UnApplyErr2@572201 : TextConst 'ENU=Nothing to Un-Apply!';

    PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@1101353000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE DealerCheckRunPage@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353001 : Record 79;
      DealerMgt@1101353000 : Codeunit 5086700;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN
        IF DealerMgt.GetDealer <> '' THEN
          ERROR('');
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE ApplyReconciliation@48400();
    VAR
      GLAccountL@48402 : Record 15;
      ReconWorksheetL@48400 : Page 5204814;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to open the Reconciliation Worksheet for application

      // Start EU.0000484
      GLAccountL.GET("G/L Account No.");
      ReconWorksheetL.SetParameter(GLAccountL."No.",
         GLAccountL."Recon. Group Field No. 1",
         GLAccountL."Recon. Group Field No. 2",
         GLAccountL."Recon. Group Field No. 3",
         GLAccountL."Recon. Group Field No. 4",
         GLAccountL."Recon. Group Field No. 5");
      // Start EU.0005722
      ReconWorksheetL.RUNMODAL();
      // Stop EU.0005722
      // Stop EU.0000484
    END;

    PROCEDURE UnApplyReconciliation@48401();
    VAR
      GLEntriesL@48402 : Record 17;
      ReconcilationEntriesL@48401 : Record 5204813;
      ReconcilationEntriesTempL@48400 : TEMPORARY Record 5204813;
      NoOfRecordsL@572200 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to Unapply selected G/L Entries

      // Start EU.0000484
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(GLEntriesL);

      ReconcilationEntriesL.RESET;
      ReconcilationEntriesL.SETCURRENTKEY("G/L Entry No.");

      // Start EU.0005722
      NoOfRecordsL := GLEntriesL.COUNT();
      // Stop EU.0005722

      GLEntriesL.FINDSET(TRUE,FALSE);
      REPEAT
        ReconcilationEntriesL.SETRANGE("G/L Entry No.",GLEntriesL."Entry No.");
        ReconcilationEntriesL.SETRANGE("Entry Type",ReconcilationEntriesL."Entry Type"::Initial);
        IF ReconcilationEntriesL.FINDFIRST() THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0005722
          IF ReconcilationEntriesL.Amount = ReconcilationEntriesL."Amount to Reconcile" THEN
            IF NoOfRecordsL > 1 THEN
              ERROR(C_INC_UnApplyErr,GLEntriesL."Entry No.")
            ELSE
              ERROR(C_INC_UnApplyErr2);
      // Stop EU.0005722
          ReconcilationEntriesTempL := ReconcilationEntriesL;
          ReconcilationEntriesTempL.INSERT;
      // Start EU.0005722
        END ELSE
          IF NoOfRecordsL > 1 THEN
            ERROR(C_INC_UnApplyErr,GLEntriesL."Entry No.")
          ELSE
            ERROR(C_INC_UnApplyErr2);
      // Stop EU.0005722
      UNTIL  GLEntriesL.NEXT=0;

      ReconcilationEntriesL.UnApplyApplication(ReconcilationEntriesTempL);
      // Stop EU.0000484
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenReconciliationList@48403();
    VAR
      ReconcilationEntriesL@48400 : Record 5204813;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to open the G/L Entry Reconciliation List

      // Start EU.0000484
      ReconcilationEntriesL.RESET;
      ReconcilationEntriesL.SETCURRENTKEY("G/L Entry No.");
      ReconcilationEntriesL.SETRANGE("G/L Entry No.","Entry No.");
      PAGE.RUN(PAGE::"G/L Entry Reconciliation List", ReconcilationEntriesL);
      // Stop EU.0000484
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031882   18.06.10 Removed references to Job Area (Deleted "Job No." control).
      PA032441   01.07.11 GC NAV 2009 SP1 W1 General Ledger Integration
      PA032441   17.10.11 #4524325 - Raise an error when user tries to reverse a Cash Register transaction
      PA032917   15.11.11 GC Vehicle Ledger Entry Reversal
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea style guide
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA036547   07.11.14 GE Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0
      PA043927   20.05.17 JV Added property in Value Entries Action and removed code to show linked Value entries
      PA043929   30.05.17 JV Merge of PA043927
      --- 7.1.4 ---
      PA040256   14.04.16 GV 58377 Prohibit reverse entries that starts from AR Depreciation
      --- 7.1.5 ---
      PA041023   27.01.17 SV Enabled Fields "Supply VIN" and "License No."
      PA041023   02.02.17 KB 87188 Removed Fields "Supply VIN" and "License No."
      --- 7.1.6 ---
      EU.0002138 30.06.17 PT Merge of PA043927
      --- 7.2.0 ---
      EU.0000484 18.07.17 DT New field "Amount to Reconcile", New Action Items "Apply G/L Entry", "Unapply G/L Entry", "Application Details"
      EU.0005722 02.10.17 DT UnApply function enhanced with error message
                             Apply function: open reconciliation page with "RUNMODAL" to force a page refresh of closing reconciliation page
      EU.0000039 18.10.17 UX 6348 Docu trigger correction.
      EU.0001175 18.10.17 UX 8305 Missing docu trigger for EU.0000039.6348
      --- 7.2.1 ---

      EU.0147204 07.11.22 MH 148230 added the field "Source Type" and "Source No" in Gender Ledger Entry Page.
    }
    END.

    OnNewRecord=VAR
                  DataTemplateHdrL@1109400001 : Record 5210218;
                  TemplateMgmtL@1119427002 : Codeunit 5210206;
                  RecRefL@1119427001 : RecordRef;
                  TemplateCodeL@1119427003 : Code[10];
                BEGIN
                  // Start INC
                  // Start PA038224
                  // Stop PA038224
                  // Stop INC
                  // Start PA035597
                  // @ The list of templates should be displayed for the user when a new record is getting created
                  // @ This feature is available only in RTC
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  AddressMgtG.OnNewCustomer(Rec);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  // Start PA041187.90242
                  // If templates exist FillDefaults is used, otherwise it is used in table Customer onInsert trigger
                  // Previously in Customer Card were populated just fields of Template, the others were empty
                  // Now are first populated default fields from Customer Setup and then are modified just existing fields in Template
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  DataTemplateHdrL.SETRANGE(TableID, DATABASE::Customer);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  IF DataTemplateHdrL.FINDFIRST THEN
                    FillDefaults();
                  // Stop PA041187.90242
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  RecRefL.OPEN(DATABASE::Customer);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                  TemplateCodeL := TemplateMgmtL.ApplyTemplate(RecRefL);
                  RecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
                  "Template Code" := TemplateCodeL;
                  // Stop PA035597
                  // Start EU.0180162.183349
                  FreezeNewInsertedRecordG := TRUE;
                  // Stop EU.0180162.183349
                END;

    OnModifyRecord=VAR
                     LastNamePageL@1109400000 : Page 5025369;
                   BEGIN

                     // Stop PA044774

                     // Stop PA044774

                   END;

      { 1109400024;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Where-Used;
                      Description=PA036542;
                      Image=Where-Used;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 TrackDocsL@1109400001 : Page 5028668;
                               BEGIN
                                 TrackDocsL.SetCustomer(Rec);
                                 // Start INC
                                 TrackDocsL.SetName(Rec.Name);
                                 TrackDocsL.SetShowDocFilter(ShowDocFilterG::Customer);
                                 AddressLnkG.RESET;
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG."Address No.", Rec."Address No.");
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG.Type, AddressLnkG.Type::Vendor);
                                 IF AddressLnkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                                   VendG."No." := AddressLnkG."No.";
                                   VendG.GET(VendG."No.");
                                   TrackDocsL.SetVendor(VendG);
                                 END ELSE
                                   TrackDocsL.ClearVendor;

                                 AddressLnkG.RESET;
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG."Address No.", Rec."Address No.");
                                 AddressLnkG.SETRANGE(AddressLnkG.Type, AddressLnkG.Type::Contact);
                                 IF AddressLnkG.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                                   ContactG."No." := AddressLnkG."No.";
                                   ContactG.GET(ContactG."No.");
                                   TrackDocsL.SetContact(ContactG);
                                 END ELSE
                                   TrackDocsL.ClearContact;

                                 // Stop INC
                                 TrackDocsL.RUN;
                                 CLEAR(TrackDocsL);
                               END;
                                }

  CONTROLS
  {
    { 1900000001;0;Container;
                ContainerType=ContentArea }

    { 1   ;1   ;Group     ;
                CaptionML=ENU=General }

    { 2   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="No.";
                Importance=Promoted;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start EU.0132549.132759
                             TESTFIELD("No.");
                             IF ("No." <> xRec."No.") AND (GETFILTER("No.") > '') THEN
                               SETRANGE("No.");
                             // Stop EU.0132549.132759
                           END;

                OnAssistEdit=BEGIN
                               IF AssistEdit(xRec) THEN
                                 CurrPage.UPDATE;
                             END;
                              }

    { 4   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Address Salutation Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD';
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start PA041187.89458
                             // Start EU.0200720.203027
                             FirstNameEditableG := AddressMgtG.EditFirstName(AddressMgtG.IsBusiness("Address Salutation Code"), "First Name", "Last Name", "Search Name");
                             // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                             // Stop PA041187.89458
                           END;
                            }

    { 133 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Title Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD';
                Importance=Additional;
                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 129 ;2   ;Field     ;
                Description=PA041187.89458;
                SourceExpr="First Name";
                Importance=Promoted;
                Editable=FirstNameEditableG }

    { 127 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Last Name";
                Importance=Promoted;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start EU.0004649
                             IF "Last Name" <> xRec."Last Name" THEN BEGIN
                               CALCFIELDS("Address Source");
                               AddressSourceCodeG := "Address Source";
                             END;
                             // Stop EU.0004649
                           END;
                            }

    { 138 ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Name 2";
                Importance=Additional;
                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 6   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr=Address }

    { 8   ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Address 2";
                Importance=Additional;
                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    { 90  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Post Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD' }

    { 10  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr=City;
                Importance=Promoted }

    { 91  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Country/Region Code";
                AutoFormatExpr='JMD';
                Importance=Additional;
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             // Start EU.0083120
                             CheckValidVATRegNo();
                             // Stop EU.0083120
                           END;

                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    PROCEDURE ActivateFields@3();
    BEGIN
      ContactEditableG := "Primary Contact No." = '';
      // Start EU.0006288
      EnableDataPrivacy();
      // Stop EU.0006288
      // Start EU.0200720.199642
      CurrContactG.RESET;
      CurrContactG.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
      IF ("Address No." <> 0) AND (CurrContactG.COUNT = 1) THEN BEGIN
        CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;
        CurrContactG.RESET;
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Company No.", CurrContactG."No.");
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE(Type, CurrContactG.Type::Person);
        EnableContactPersonG := NOT CurrContactG.ISEMPTY;
      END ELSE
        EnableContactPersonG := FALSE
      // Stop EU.0200720.199642
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@1101353000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EXITPOINT__@5025300();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPointCall@5025380(MakeCodeP@1109400003 : Code[20];TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50];VAR EPRecRefP@1109400005 : RecordRef) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ param MakeCodeP - Code 20
      // @ param TriggerP - Integer
      // @ param TypeP - Integer
      // @ param ExitPointIDP - Text 50
      // @ param EPRecRefP - RecordRef ByVAR

      // Start PA044429
      EXIT(ExitPointUnitG.RunExitPoint(
        ExitPointSetupG."Object Type"::Page,
        PAGE::"Customer Card",
        MakeCodeP, TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefP, EPRecRef2G, ExitPointParamG));
      // Stop PA044429
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPoint@5025450(TriggerP@1119452001 : Integer;TypeP@1119432000 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1119432001 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ param TriggerP - Integer
      // @ param TypeP - Integer
      // @ param ExitPointIDP - Text 50

      // Start PA044429
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(xRec);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall("Global Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA044429
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EXITPOINT__@5025451();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableImporterTab@1101353001();
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF NOT CompanyInfoG.IMSCheck() THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA037425
      // Stop PA037425
        DisableAppliestoDocNoEnable := FALSE;
      END;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckMessageButtonEditable@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032665
      // Start PA038224
      CLEAR(MessageMgmtG);
      // @ EnableSMSG variable is also used in Pages to control the Action Create Message
      EnableMessageG := MessageMgmtG.AllowSendMessage("No.", MessageListG."Sender/Recipient Type"::Person);
      // Stop PA038224
      // Stop PA032665
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ICPartnerCodeOnAfterValidate@19032922();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableDataPrivacy@628800();
    BEGIN
      // @ this function enables Data Privacy Actions
      // Start EU.0006288
      IF NOT InternatDataPrivacyCheckG.CheckIncludeBusinessContacts("Customer Type") THEN
        EnableDataPrivacyG := FALSE
      ELSE BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS("Exclude from Data Privacy");
        EnableDataPrivacyG := NOT "Exclude from Data Privacy";
      END;
      // Stop EU.0006288
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CheckValidVATRegNo@8312000();
    VAR
      VATRegistrationLogL@8312000 : Record 249;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0083120
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("Account No.", "No.");
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("Country/Region Code", "Country/Region Code");
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE(Status, VATRegistrationLogL.Status::Valid);
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("VAT Registration No.", "VAT Registration No.");
      IF VATRegistrationLogL.FINDFIRST THEN
        VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG := TRUE
      ELSE
        VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0083120
    END;

                           // Start PA038456.44408

                           CurrPage.SpecialFunctionFactBox.PAGE.Refresh("Global Dimension 2 Code");

                           // Start EU.0200720.199642

                           CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
                           CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
                           IF ("Address No." <> 0) AND (CurrContactG.COUNT = 1) THEN BEGIN
                             CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;

                                 CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
                                 CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Customer No.", "No.");
                                 IF CurrContactG.COUNT = 1 THEN BEGIN

                                   CurrContactG.SETRANGE(Type, CurrContactG.Type::Person);
                                   IF CurrContactG.COUNT > 1 THEN

    PROCEDURE GetSelectionFilter@2() : Code[80];
    VAR
      Cust@1000 : Record 18;
      FirstCust@1001 : Code[30];
      LastCust@1002 : Code[30];
      SelectionFilter@1003 : Code[250];
      CustCount@1004 : Integer;
      More@1005 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(Cust);
      CustCount := Cust.COUNT;
      IF CustCount > 0 THEN BEGIN
        Cust.FINDSET;
        WHILE CustCount > 0 DO BEGIN
          CustCount := CustCount - 1;
          Cust.MARKEDONLY(FALSE);
          FirstCust := Cust."No.";
          LastCust := FirstCust;
          More := (CustCount > 0);
          WHILE More DO
            IF Cust.NEXT = 0 THEN
              More := FALSE
            ELSE
              IF NOT Cust.MARK THEN
                More := FALSE
              ELSE BEGIN
                LastCust := Cust."No.";
                CustCount := CustCount - 1;
                IF CustCount = 0 THEN
                  More := FALSE;
              END;
          IF SelectionFilter <> '' THEN
            SelectionFilter := SelectionFilter + '|';
          IF FirstCust = LastCust THEN
            SelectionFilter := SelectionFilter + FirstCust
          ELSE
            SelectionFilter := SelectionFilter + FirstCust + '..' + LastCust;
          IF CustCount > 0 THEN BEGIN
            Cust.MARKEDONLY(TRUE);
            Cust.NEXT;
          END;
        END;
      END;
      EXIT(SelectionFilter);
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetSelection@1(VAR Cust@1000 : Record 18);
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(Cust);
    END;

    END;

    OnNextRecord=BEGIN
                   // Start EU.0204617.205338
                   // Stop EU.0204617.205338
                 END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0180162.183349
                       IF FreezeNewInsertedRecordG AND ("No." > '') THEN
                           SETRECFILTER();
                       // Stop EU.0180162.183349

                       // Start EU.0004649
                       CALCFIELDS("Address Source");
                       AddressSourceCodeG := "Address Source";

                       // Stop EU.0200720.199642
                       // Stop EU.0083120
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=VAR
                  DataTemplateHdrL@1109400001 : Record 5210218;
                  TemplateMgmtL@1119427001 : Codeunit 5210206;
                  RecRefL@1119427000 : RecordRef;
                  TemplateCodeL@1119427003 : Code[10];
                BEGIN
                  // Start PA035597
                  // @ The list of templates should be displayed for the user when a new record is getting created
                  // @ This feature is available only in RTC
                  // Start EU.0204617.205338
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  AddressMgtG.OnNewVendor(Rec);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  // Stop EU.0204617.205338
                  // Start PA041187.90242
                  // If templates for Vendor exist FillDefaults is used, otherwise it is used in table Vendor onInsert trigger
                  // Previously in Vendor Card were populated just fields of Template, the others were empty
                  // Now are first populated default fields from Vendor Setup and then are modified just existing fields in Template
                  // Start EU.0204617.205338
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  DataTemplateHdrL.SETRANGE(TableID, DATABASE::Vendor);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  // Stop EU.0204617.205338
                  IF DataTemplateHdrL.FINDFIRST THEN
                    FillDefaults();
                  // Stop PA041187.90242
                  // Start EU.0204617.205338
                  // Start EU.0200720.203027
                  RecRefL.OPEN(DATABASE::Vendor);
                  // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                  // Stop EU.0204617.205338
                  RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                  TemplateCodeL := TemplateMgmtL.ApplyTemplate(RecRefL);
                  RecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
                  "Template Code" := TemplateCodeL;
                  // Stop PA035597
                  // Start PA035901
                  MapPointVisible := TRUE;
                  // Stop PA035901
                  // Start EU.0180162.183349
                  FreezeNewInsertedRecordG := TRUE;
                  // Stop EU.0180162.183349
                END;

                     LastNamePageL@1109400000 : Page 5025369;

                     EXIT(TRUE);
                     // Stop INC
                   END;

                   END;

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      Mail@1099 : Codeunit 397;
      CalendarMgmt@1000 : Codeunit 7600;
      PaymentToleranceMgt@1002 : Codeunit 426;
      CustomizedCalEntry@1001 : Record 7603;
      CustomizedCalendar@1003 : Record 7602;
      MapPointVisible@19022708 : Boolean INDATASET;
      Text001@1005 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to allow payment tolerance for entries that are currently open?';
      Text002@1004 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to remove payment tolerance from entries that are currently open?';
      Text003@1007 : TextConst 'ENU=The vendor %1 does not exist.';
      _INCADEA_@1109400001 : Boolean;
      DepositItemG@1109400002 : Record 27;
      CustG@1109400005 : Record 18;
      ContactG@1109400006 : Record 5050;
      CurrContactG@20072001 : Record 5050;
      AddressLnkG@1109400007 : Record 5029112;
      CashRegisterFunctionsG@1101314645 : Codeunit 5028760;
      AddressMgtG@1109400004 : Codeunit 5029101;
      RecRefG@1000000001 : RecordRef;
      UserSessionG@1000000000 : Codeunit 5028665;
      ShowDocFilterG@1109400003 : 'All,Contact,Customer,Vendor';
      FirstNameEditableG@1109400000 : Boolean;
      AddressSourceCodeG@464900 : Code[10];
      VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG@8312000 : Boolean;
      DocTypeG@16975500 : 'Inquiry,Order,Invoice,Credit Memo,Blanket Order,Return Order';
      FreezeNewInsertedRecordG@18016200 : Boolean;
      EnableContactPersonG@20072000 : Boolean;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ActivateFields@8312000();
    VAR
      VATRegistrationLogL@8312000 : Record 249;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0083120
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("Account No.", "No.");
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("Country/Region Code", "Country/Region Code");
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE(Status, VATRegistrationLogL.Status::Valid);
      VATRegistrationLogL.SETRANGE("VAT Registration No.", "VAT Registration No.");
      // Start EU.0200720.199642
      VatRegistrationStyleExpressionG := VATRegistrationLogL.FINDFIRST;
      // Stop EU.0083120
      CurrContactG.RESET;
      CurrContactG.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Vendor No.", "No.");
      IF ("Address No." <> 0) AND (CurrContactG.COUNT = 1) THEN BEGIN
        CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;
        CurrContactG.RESET;
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Company No.", CurrContactG."No.");
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE(Type, CurrContactG.Type::Person);
        EnableContactPersonG := NOT CurrContactG.ISEMPTY;
      END ELSE
        EnableContactPersonG := FALSE
      // Stop EU.0200720.199642
    END;

    BEGIN

    VAR
      _INCADEA_@1109400000 : Boolean;
      AddressesG@1109400001 : Record 5029111;
      VendG@1109400002 : Record 23;
      CurrContactG@20072001 : Record 5050;
      CashRegisterFunctionsG@1101314645 : Codeunit 5028760;
      UserSessionG@1000000001 : Codeunit 5028665;
      RecRefG@1000000000 : RecordRef;
      EnableContactPersonG@20072000 : Boolean;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectionFilter@2() : Code[80];
    VAR
      Vend@1000 : Record 23;
      FirstVend@1001 : Code[30];
      LastVend@1002 : Code[30];
      SelectionFilter@1003 : Code[250];
      VendCount@1004 : Integer;
      More@1005 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(Vend);
      VendCount := Vend.COUNT;
      IF VendCount > 0 THEN BEGIN
        Vend.FIND('-');
        WHILE VendCount > 0 DO BEGIN
          VendCount := VendCount - 1;
          Vend.MARKEDONLY(FALSE);
          FirstVend := Vend."No.";
          LastVend := FirstVend;
          More := (VendCount > 0);
          WHILE More DO
            IF Vend.NEXT = 0 THEN
              More := FALSE
            ELSE
              IF NOT Vend.MARK THEN
                More := FALSE
              ELSE BEGIN
                LastVend := Vend."No.";
                VendCount := VendCount - 1;
                IF VendCount = 0 THEN
                  More := FALSE;
              END;
          IF SelectionFilter <> '' THEN
            SelectionFilter := SelectionFilter + '|';
          IF FirstVend = LastVend THEN
            SelectionFilter := SelectionFilter + FirstVend
          ELSE
            SelectionFilter := SelectionFilter + FirstVend + '..' + LastVend;
          IF VendCount > 0 THEN BEGIN
            Vend.MARKEDONLY(TRUE);
            Vend.NEXT;
          END;
        END;
      END;
      EXIT(SelectionFilter);
      // Stop INC
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetSelection@1(VAR Vend@1000 : Record 23);
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(Vend);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@20072001();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ActivateFields@8312000();
    VAR
      VATRegistrationLogL@8312000 : Record 249;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0200720.199642
      CurrContactG.RESET;
      CurrContactG.SETCURRENTKEY("Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Address No.", "Address No.");
      CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Vendor No.", "No.");
      IF ("Address No." <> 0) AND (CurrContactG.COUNT = 1) THEN BEGIN
        CurrContactG.FINDFIRST;
        CurrContactG.RESET;
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE("Company No.", CurrContactG."No.");
        CurrContactG.SETRANGE(Type, CurrContactG.Type::Person);
        EnableContactPersonG := NOT CurrContactG.ISEMPTY;
      END ELSE
        EnableContactPersonG := FALSE
      // Stop EU.0200720.199642
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------

    PROCEDURE DealerCheckRunForm@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353001 : Record 79;
      DealerMgt@1101353000 : Codeunit 5086700;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN
        IF DealerMgt.GetDealer <> '' THEN
          ERROR('');
      // Stop INC
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area PartsSales, VehicleSales, PartsPurchase, VehiclePurchase
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA032440   27.04.11 AA OnOpenForm trigger modified to read Hide Item Cost permission for the user
      PA032795   26.10.11 PR Added control 'External Document No.'.
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      TransferExtendedText@1000 : Codeunit 378;
      DocumentLineTracking@1001 : Page 5206913;
      _INCADEA_@1109400002 : Boolean;
      SalesHdrG@1109400003 : Record 36;
      OnLookupItemG@1101286982 : Record 27;
      CollectionUnitG@1109400004 : Codeunit 5028657;
      FormatTextG@1109400005 : Text[100];
      C_INC001@1109400006 : TextConst 'ENU=Please note that the total sum of the order may not be negative !';
      FormUpdateG@1109400007 : Boolean;
      DescriptionEmphasize@19010547 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DescriptionIndent@19057867 : Integer INDATASET;
      AmountEmphasize@19073101 : Boolean INDATASET;
      "Amount Including VATEmphasize"@19035561 : Boolean INDATASET;
      ShortcutDimCode@1003 : ARRAY [8] OF Code[20];

    PROCEDURE ApproveCalcInvDisc@1();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Disc. (Yes/No)",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDisc@6();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Calc. Discount",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE ExplodeBOM@3();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Explode BOM",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenPurchOrderForm@4();
    VAR
      PurchHeaderL@1109400000 : Record 38;
      PurchOrderL@1109400001 : Page 5045778;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032651.4619161
      TESTFIELD("Purchase Order No.");
      PurchHeaderL.SETRANGE("No.","Purchase Order No.");
      PurchOrderL.SETTABLEVIEW(PurchHeaderL);
      PurchOrderL.EDITABLE := FALSE;
      PurchOrderL.RUN;
      // Stop PA032651.4619161
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@5(Unconditionally@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransferExtendedText.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,Unconditionally) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransferExtendedText.InsertSalesExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransferExtendedText.MakeUpdate THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@5025350();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDocumentLineTracking@8();
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(DocumentLineTracking);
      DocumentLineTracking.SetDoc(0,"Document No.","Line No.");
      DocumentLineTracking.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowPriceCalculation@5025351();
    VAR
      PriceCalculation@1109400000 : Record 5025809;
      ShowPriceCalc@1109400001 : Page 5025825;
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(ShowPriceCalc);
      ShowPriceCalc.SetLine(Rec);
      ShowPriceCalc.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@5025352();
    VAR
      ItemAvailability@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028701;
    BEGIN
      ItemAvailability.DisplayBySalesLine('',Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@5025353();
    VAR
      VehicleAvailOnHand@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028660;
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      FormUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      IF Quantity = 0 THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          VehicleAvailOnHand.CalculateSalesLine(Rec);
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      IF FormUpdateG THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterValidate@19066594();
    BEGIN
      InsertLine();
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      // If a negative quantity was entered, then issue a remark
      IF Quantity < 0 THEN
        MESSAGE(C_INC001);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QtytoShipOnAfterValidate@19008429();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UnitofMeasureCodeOnAfterValida@19057939();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityShippedOnAfterValidate@19031500();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QtytoInvoiceOnAfterValidate@19013494();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityInvoicedOnAfterValidat@19010344();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReserveOnAfterValidate@19004502();
    BEGIN
      IF (Reserve = Reserve::Always) AND ("Outstanding Qty. (Base)" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnFormat@19023855();
    BEGIN
      IF Indentation > 0 THEN
        DescriptionIndent := Indentation - 1;

      IF Type IN [Type::Header,Type::"Begin-Total",Type::"End-Total"] THEN
        DescriptionEmphasize := TRUE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountOnFormat@19014598(Text@19024947 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal(Subtotal,SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT(Subtotal,0,FormatTextG);
        AmountEmphasize := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountIncludingVATOnFormat@19052024(Text@19021844 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal("Subtotal Incl.VAT",SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT("Subtotal Incl.VAT",0,FormatTextG);
        "Amount Including VATEmphasize" := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area Sales
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031882   19.04.10 removal of the job related fields
      PA032441   01.07.11 GC NAV 2009 SP1 W1 General Ledger Integration
      PA032718   25.08.11 SS Upgrade to NAV 2009 R2
                            - Added "Document No." & "Line No." fields.
      PA032651   25.01.12 GD #4619161: Modified Call to Incadea Card Forms instead of Standard Forms
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA034531   04.09.13 GD I001184 Modified "No."-OnLookup(), "No."-OnValidate() to use correct LookUp Trigger Logic.
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA035901   14.11.14 CH NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration.
      PA042000   14.10.16 NM Modified OnAssistEdit Trigger to take Status of Page Lookup call into consideration.
                             - Call SchowReservationEntries function from the Rec directly
                             - Cleanup of the "_*" functions and comments introduced with the Form-to-Page conversion in myengine 6.x
      PA042083   14.10.16 NM Merge of PA042000
      PA042951   13.02.17 DR The Comfort Module is no longer optional. It is mandatory for the myengine.
                             All Comfort Module name traces removed.
      PA042952   13.02.17 DR Merge of PA042951
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0101759 04.09.20 GI 104947 Modification due to renumbering of Kuma range.
    }
    END.
  }

OBJECT Page 47 Sales Invoice Subform
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=12/05/16;
    Time=[ 3:45:42 PM];
    Version List=NAVW1.x,N.7.1.5;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Lines;
    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table37;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Invoice));
    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       DescriptionIndent := 0;
                       DescriptionHideValue := FALSE;
                       DescriptionOnFormat;
                       AmountOnFormat(FORMAT(Amount));
                       AmountIncludingVATOnFormat(FORMAT("Amount Including VAT"));
                       // Start PA035597
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCode);
                       // Stop PA035597
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  // Start INC
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases";
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::Item THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Item;
                  IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN BEGIN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                  // Stop INC
                  END;

                  // Start PA035597
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCode);
                  // Stop PA035597
                END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000004;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 1906587504;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=F&unctions }
      { 1900205804;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Calculate &Invoice Discount;
                      Image=CalculateInvoiceDiscount;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 ApproveCalcInvDisc;
                               END;
                                }
      { 1903098604;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=E&xplode BOM;

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      TransferExtendedText@1000 : Codeunit 378;
      _INCADEA_@1109400002 : Boolean;
      SalesHdrG@1109400003 : Record 36;
      OnLookupItemG@1101286982 : Record 27;
      CollectionUnitG@1109400004 : Codeunit 5028657;
      FormatTextG@1109400005 : Text[100];
      FormUpdateG@1109400006 : Boolean;
      DescriptionHideValue@19024429 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DescriptionEmphasize@19010547 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DescriptionIndent@19057867 : Integer INDATASET;
      AmountEmphasize@19073101 : Boolean INDATASET;
      "Amount Including VATEmphasize"@19035561 : Boolean INDATASET;
      ShortcutDimCode@1004 : ARRAY [8] OF Code[20];

    PROCEDURE ApproveCalcInvDisc@1();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Disc. (Yes/No)",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDisc@8();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Calc. Discount",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE ExplodeBOM@3();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Explode BOM",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetShipment@4();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Get Shipment",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@7(Unconditionally@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransferExtendedText.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,Unconditionally) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransferExtendedText.InsertSalesExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransferExtendedText.MakeUpdate THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE __INCADEA__@5025350();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowPriceCalculation@5025351();
    VAR
      PriceCalculation@1109400000 : Record 5025809;
      ShowPriceCalc@1109400001 : Page 5025825;
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(ShowPriceCalc);
      ShowPriceCalc.SetLine(Rec);
      ShowPriceCalc.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@5025352();
    VAR
      ItemAvailability@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028701;
    BEGIN
      ItemAvailability.DisplayBySalesLine('',Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@5025353();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      FormUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      IF Quantity = 0 THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      IF FormUpdateG THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterValidate@19066594();
    BEGIN
      InsertLine();
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UnitofMeasureCodeOnAfterValida@19057939();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QtytoShipOnAfterValidate@19008429();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReserveOnAfterValidate@19004502();
    BEGIN
      IF (Reserve = Reserve::Always) AND ("Outstanding Qty. (Base)" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnFormat@19023855();
    BEGIN
      IF Type = Type::"Begin-Total" THEN BEGIN
        DescriptionHideValue := TRUE;
        EXIT
      END;
      IF Indentation > 0 THEN
        DescriptionIndent := Indentation - 1;

      IF Type IN [Type::Header,Type::"Begin-Total",Type::"End-Total"] THEN
        DescriptionEmphasize := TRUE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountOnFormat@19014598(Text@19024947 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal(Subtotal,SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT(Subtotal,0,FormatTextG);
        AmountEmphasize := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountIncludingVATOnFormat@19052024(Text@19021844 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal("Subtotal Incl.VAT",SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT("Subtotal Incl.VAT",0,FormatTextG);
        "Amount Including VATEmphasize" := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area Sales

      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031882   19.04.10 removal of functions GetPhaseTaskStep,GetJobLedger and Job related fields
      PA032441   01.07.11 GC NAV 2009 SP1 W1 General Ledger Integration
      PA032718   25.08.11 SS Upgrade to NAV 2009 R2
                             - Added "Document No." & "Line No." fields.
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA034531   04.09.13 GD I001184 Modified "No."-OnLookup(), "No."-OnValidate() to use correct LookUp Trigger Logic.
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA035901   14.11.14 CH NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration.
      PA042000   14.10.16 NM Modified OnAssistEdit Trigger to take Status of Page Lookup call into consideration.
                             - Call SchowReservationEntries function from the Rec directly
                             - Cleanup of the "_*" functions and comments introduced with the Form-to-Page conversion in myengine 6.x
      PA042083   14.10.16 NM Merge of PA042000
    }
    END.
  }
}

      OptionRec@1109400000 : Record 5025427;

      OptionForm.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop INC
    END;

OBJECT Page 232 Apply Customer Entries
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=01/21/26;
    Time=[ 5:21:51 PM];
    Version List=NAVW17.10.00.41371,N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Apply Customer Entries;
    InsertAllowed=No;
    DeleteAllowed=No;
    LinksAllowed=No;
    SourceTable=Table21;
    DataCaptionFields=Customer No.;
    PageType=Worksheet;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             "Applies-to IDVisible" := TRUE;
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 IF CalcType = CalcType::Direct THEN BEGIN
                   Cust.GET("Customer No.");
                   ApplnCurrencyCode := Cust."Currency Code";
                   FindApplyingEntry;
                 END;

                 "Applies-to IDVisible" := ApplnType <> ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No.";

                 GLSetup.GET;

                 IF ApplnType = ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No." THEN
                   CalcApplnAmount;
                 PostingDone := FALSE;
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       StyleTxt := SetStyle;
                     END;

    OnModifyRecord=BEGIN
                     CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Cust. Entry-Edit",Rec);
                     IF "Applies-to ID" <> xRec."Applies-to ID" THEN
                       CalcApplnAmount;
                     EXIT(FALSE);
                   END;

    OnQueryClosePage=VAR
                       RaiseError@1001 : Boolean;
                     BEGIN
                       IF CloseAction = ACTION::LookupOK THEN
                         LookupOKOnPush;
                       IF ApplnType = ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No." THEN BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0210554.210446
                         IF OK THEN BEGIN
                           RaiseError := ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Posting Date" < "Posting Date";
                           OnBeforeEarlierPostingDateError(ApplyingCustLedgEntry,Rec,RaiseError,CalcType);
                           IF RaiseError THEN BEGIN
                             OK := FALSE;
                             ERROR(
                               EarlierPostingDateErr,ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type",ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document No.",
                               "Document Type","Document No.");
                           END;
                         END;
                       // Stop EU.0210554.210446
                         IF OK THEN BEGIN
                           IF "Amount to Apply" = 0 THEN
                             "Amount to Apply" := "Remaining Amount";
                           CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Cust. Entry-Edit",Rec);
                         END;
                       END;
                       IF (CalcType = CalcType::Direct) AND NOT OK AND NOT PostingDone THEN BEGIN
                         Rec := ApplyingCustLedgEntry;
                         "Applying Entry" := FALSE;
                         "Applies-to ID" := '';
                         "Amount to Apply" := 0;
                         CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Cust. Entry-Edit",Rec);
                       END;
                     END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=BEGIN
                           IF ApplnType = ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No." THEN
                             CalcApplnAmount;
                         END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000003;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=RelatedInformation }
      { 37      ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Ent&ry;
                      Image=Entry }
      { 38      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Reminder/Fin. Charge Entries;
                      RunObject=Page 444;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Customer Entry No.);
                      RunPageLink=Customer Entry No.=FIELD(Entry No.);
                      Image=Reminder }
      { 95      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Applied E&ntries;
                      RunObject=Page 61;
                      RunPageOnRec=Yes;
                      Image=Approve }
      { 53      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+Ctrl+D;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Dimensions;
                      Description=PA035597;
                      Image=Dimensions;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 ShowDimensions;
                               END;
                                }
      { 62      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Ctrl+F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Detailed &Ledger Entries;
                      RunObject=Page 573;
                      RunPageView=SORTING(Cust. Ledger Entry No.,Posting Date);
                      RunPageLink=Cust. Ledger Entry No.=FIELD(Entry No.);
                      Image=View }
      { 30      ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Application;
                      Image=Apply }
      { 32      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Set Applies-to ID;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+F11;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Set Applies-to ID;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=SelectLineToApply;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 IF (CalcType = CalcType::GenJnlLine) AND (ApplnType = ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No.") THEN
                                   ERROR(Text004);

                                 SetCustApplId;
                               END;
                                }
      { 34      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Post Application;
                      ShortCutKey=F9;
                      Ellipsis=Yes;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Post Application;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=PostApplication;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 PostDirectApplication;
                               END;
                                }
      { 87      ;2   ;Separator ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=- }
      { 88      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Show Only Selected Entries to Be Applied;
                      Image=ShowSelected;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 ShowAppliedEntries := NOT ShowAppliedEntries;
                                 IF ShowAppliedEntries THEN BEGIN
                                   IF CalcType = CalcType::GenJnlLine THEN
                                     SETRANGE("Applies-to ID",GenJnlLine."Applies-to ID")
                                   ELSE BEGIN
                                     CustEntryApplID := USERID;
                                     IF CustEntryApplID = '' THEN
                                       CustEntryApplID := '***';
                                     SETRANGE("Applies-to ID",CustEntryApplID);
                                   END;
                                 END ELSE
                                   SETRANGE("Applies-to ID");
                               END;
                                }
      { 1900000004;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 36      ;1   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Navigate;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=Navigate;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 Navigate.SetDoc("Posting Date","Document No.");
                                 Navigate.RUN;
                               END;
                                }
    }
  }

    { 71  ;2   ;Field     ;

    { 60  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Original Amount";
                Visible=FALSE;
                Editable=FALSE }

    { 12  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr=Amount;
                Visible=FALSE;
                Editable=FALSE }

    { 14  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Remaining Amount";
                Editable=FALSE }

    { 33  ;2   ;Field     ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Appln. Remaining Amount;
                SourceExpr=CalcApplnRemainingAmount("Remaining Amount");
                AutoFormatType=1;
                AutoFormatExpr=ApplnCurrencyCode }

    { 89  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Amount to Apply";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Cust. Entry-Edit",Rec);

                             IF (xRec."Amount to Apply" = 0) OR ("Amount to Apply" = 0) AND
                                (ApplnType = ApplnType::"Applies-to ID")
                             THEN
                               SetCustApplId;
                             GET("Entry No.");
                             AmounttoApplyOnAfterValidate;
                           END;
                            }

    { 93  ;2   ;Field     ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Appln. Amount to Apply;
                SourceExpr=CalcApplnAmounttoApply("Amount to Apply");
                AutoFormatType=1;
                AutoFormatExpr=ApplnCurrencyCode }

    { 16  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Due Date";
                StyleExpr=StyleTxt }

    { 18  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Pmt. Discount Date";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             RecalcApplnAmount;
                           END;
                            }

    { 65  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Pmt. Disc. Tolerance Date" }

    { 20  ;2   ;Field     ;
                SourceExpr="Original Pmt. Disc. Possible";
                Visible=FALSE }

                SourceExpr="Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
                OnValidate=BEGIN
                             RecalcApplnAmount;
                           END;
                            }

    { 51  ;2   ;Field     ;
                CaptionML=ENU=Appln. Pmt. Disc. Possible;
                SourceExpr=CalcApplnRemainingAmount("Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible");
                AutoFormatType=1;
                AutoFormatExpr=ApplnCurrencyCode }

                SourceExpr="Max. Payment Tolerance" }

                CaptionML=ENU=Available Amount }

                CaptionML=ENU=Balance }

    { 42  ;4   ;Field     ;
                Name=ControlBalance;
                CaptionML=ENU=Balance;
                SourceExpr=AppliedAmount + (-PmtDiscAmount) + ApplyingAmount + ApplnRounding;
                AutoFormatType=1;
                AutoFormatExpr=ApplnCurrencyCode;
                Editable=FALSE }

  }
  CODE
  {
    VAR
      ApplyingCustLedgEntry@1035 : TEMPORARY Record 21;
      AppliedCustLedgEntry@1001 : Record 21;
      Currency@1002 : Record 4;
      CurrExchRate@1003 : Record 330;
      GenJnlLine@1004 : Record 81;
      GenJnlLine2@1005 : Record 81;
      SalesHeader@1006 : Record 36;
      ServHeader@1045 : Record 5025624;
      Cust@1007 : Record 18;

      GLSetup@1009 : Record 98;
      TotalSalesLine@1010 : Record 37;
      TotalSalLine@1109400011 : Record 37;
      TotalSalesLineLCY@1011 : Record 37;
      CustEntrySetApplID@1013 : Codeunit 101;
      GenJnlApply@1014 : Codeunit 225;
      SalesPost@1015 : Codeunit 80;
      PaymentToleranceMgt@1048 : Codeunit 426;
      Navigate@1012 : Page 344;
      AppliedAmount@1017 : Decimal;
      ApplyingAmount@1018 : Decimal;
      PmtDiscAmount@1041 : Decimal;
      ApplnDate@1019 : Date;
      ApplnCurrencyCode@1020 : Code[10];
      ApplnRoundingPrecision@1021 : Decimal;
      ApplnRounding@1022 : Decimal;
      ApplnType@1023 : ' ,Applies-to Doc. No.,Applies-to ID';
      AmountRoundingPrecision@1024 : Decimal;
      VATAmount@1025 : Decimal;
      VATAmountText@1026 : Text[30];
      StyleTxt@1016 : Text;
      ProfitLCY@1027 : Decimal;
      ProfitPct@1028 : Decimal;
      CalcType@1029 : 'Direct,GenJnlLine,SalesHeader';
