      ShowAppliedEntries@1038 : Boolean;
      Text003@1039 : TextConst 'ENU=You must post the application from the window where you entered the applying entry.';
      Text004@1030 : TextConst 'ENU=You are not allowed to set Applies-to ID while selecting Applies-to Doc. No.';
      OK@1043 : Boolean;
      EarlierPostingDateErr@1044 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot apply and post an entry to an entry with an earlier posting date.\\Instead, post the document of type %1 with the number %2 and then apply it to the document of type %3 with the number %4.';
      PostingDone@1000 : Boolean;
      "Applies-to IDVisible"@19043506 : Boolean INDATASET;
      Text012@1036 : TextConst 'ENU=The application was successfully posted.';
      Text013@1033 : TextConst 'ENU=The %1 entered must not be before the %1 on the %2.';
      Text019@1040 : TextConst 'ENU=Post application process has been canceled.';

    PROCEDURE SetGenJnlLine@1(NewGenJnlLine@1000 : Record 81;ApplnTypeSelect@1001 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      GenJnlLine := NewGenJnlLine;

      IF GenJnlLine."Account Type" = GenJnlLine."Account Type"::Customer THEN
        ApplyingAmount := GenJnlLine.Amount;
      IF GenJnlLine."Bal. Account Type" = GenJnlLine."Bal. Account Type"::Customer THEN
        ApplyingAmount := -GenJnlLine.Amount;
      ApplnDate := GenJnlLine."Posting Date";
      ApplnCurrencyCode := GenJnlLine."Currency Code";
      CalcType := CalcType::GenJnlLine;

      CASE ApplnTypeSelect OF
        GenJnlLine.FIELDNO("Applies-to Doc. No."):
          ApplnType := ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No.";
        GenJnlLine.FIELDNO("Applies-to ID"):
          ApplnType := ApplnType::"Applies-to ID";
      END;

      SetApplyingCustLedgEntry;
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetSales@2(NewSalesHeader@1000 : Record 36;VAR NewCustLedgEntry@1001 : Record 21;ApplnTypeSelect@1002 : Integer);
    VAR
      TotalAdjCostLCY@1003 : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      SalesHeader := NewSalesHeader;
      COPYFILTERS(NewCustLedgEntry);

      SalesPost.SumSalesLines(
        SalesHeader,0,TotalSalesLine,TotalSalesLineLCY,
        VATAmount,VATAmountText,ProfitLCY,ProfitPct,TotalAdjCostLCY);

      CASE SalesHeader."Document Type" OF
        SalesHeader."Document Type"::"Return Order",
        SalesHeader."Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
          ApplyingAmount := -TotalSalesLine."Amount Including VAT"
        ELSE
          ApplyingAmount := TotalSalesLine."Amount Including VAT";
      END;

      ApplnDate := SalesHeader."Posting Date";
      ApplnCurrencyCode := SalesHeader."Currency Code";
      CalcType := CalcType::SalesHeader;

      CASE ApplnTypeSelect OF
        SalesHeader.FIELDNO("Applies-to Doc. No."):
          ApplnType := ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No.";
        SalesHeader.FIELDNO("Applies-to ID"):
          ApplnType := ApplnType::"Applies-to ID";
      END;

      SetApplyingCustLedgEntry;
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetCustLedgEntry@13(NewCustLedgEntry@1000 : Record 21);
    BEGIN
      Rec := NewCustLedgEntry;
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetApplyingCustLedgEntry@9();
    VAR
      "CustEntry-Edit"@1000 : Codeunit 103;
    BEGIN
      CASE CalcType OF
        CalcType::SalesHeader:
          BEGIN
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." := 1;
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Posting Date" := SalesHeader."Posting Date";
            IF SalesHeader."Document Type" = SalesHeader."Document Type"::"Return Order" THEN
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type" := SalesHeader."Document Type"::"Credit Memo"
            ELSE
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type" := SalesHeader."Document Type";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document No." := SalesHeader."No.";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Customer No." := SalesHeader."Bill-to Customer No.";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry.Description := SalesHeader."Posting Description";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Currency Code" := SalesHeader."Currency Code";
            IF ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type" = ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type"::"Credit Memo" THEN  BEGIN
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry.Amount := -TotalSalesLine."Amount Including VAT";
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount" := -TotalSalesLine."Amount Including VAT";
            END ELSE BEGIN
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry.Amount := TotalSalesLine."Amount Including VAT";
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount" := TotalSalesLine."Amount Including VAT";
            END;
            CalcApplnAmount;
          END;
      // Start PA032441
      // Stop PA032441
        CalcType::Direct:
          BEGIN
            IF "Applying Entry" THEN BEGIN
              IF ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." <> 0 THEN
                CustLedgEntry := ApplyingCustLedgEntry;
              "CustEntry-Edit".RUN(Rec);
              IF "Applies-to ID" = '' THEN
                SetCustApplId;
              CALCFIELDS(Amount);
              ApplyingCustLedgEntry := Rec;
              IF CustLedgEntry."Entry No." <> 0 THEN BEGIN
                Rec := CustLedgEntry;
                "Applying Entry" := FALSE;
                SetCustApplId;
              END;
              SETFILTER("Entry No.",'<> %1',ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No.");
              ApplyingAmount := ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount";
              ApplnDate := ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Posting Date";
              ApplnCurrencyCode := ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Currency Code";
            END;
            CalcApplnAmount;
          END;
        CalcType::GenJnlLine:
          BEGIN
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." := 1;
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Posting Date" := GenJnlLine."Posting Date";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type" := GenJnlLine."Document Type";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document No." := GenJnlLine."Document No.";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Customer No." := GenJnlLine."Account No.";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry.Description := GenJnlLine.Description;
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Currency Code" := GenJnlLine."Currency Code";
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry.Amount := GenJnlLine.Amount;
            ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount" := GenJnlLine.Amount;
            CalcApplnAmount;
          END;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetCustApplId@11();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0210554.210446
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(CustLedgEntry);
      CheckCustLedgEntry(CustLedgEntry);
      // Stop EU.0210554.210446

      CustLedgEntry.COPY(Rec);
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(CustLedgEntry);

      CustEntrySetApplID.SetApplId(CustLedgEntry,ApplyingCustLedgEntry,GetAppliesToID);

      CalcApplnAmount;
    END;

    [External]
    PROCEDURE CheckCustLedgEntry@61(VAR CustLedgerEntry@1000 : Record 21);
    VAR
      RaiseError@1001 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0210554.210446
      IF CustLedgerEntry.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          IF CalcType = CalcType::GenJnlLine THEN BEGIN
            RaiseError := ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Posting Date" < CustLedgerEntry."Posting Date";
            OnBeforeEarlierPostingDateError(ApplyingCustLedgEntry,CustLedgerEntry,RaiseError,CalcType);
            IF RaiseError THEN
              ERROR(
                EarlierPostingDateErr,ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document Type",ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Document No.",
                CustLedgerEntry."Document Type",CustLedgerEntry."Document No.");
          END;

          IF ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." <> 0 THEN
            GenJnlApply.CheckAgainstApplnCurrency(
              ApplnCurrencyCode,CustLedgerEntry."Currency Code",GenJnlLine."Account Type"::Customer,TRUE);
        UNTIL CustLedgerEntry.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop EU.0210554.210446
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GetAppliesToID@16() AppliesToID : Code[50];
    BEGIN
      CASE CalcType OF
        CalcType::GenJnlLine:
          AppliesToID := GenJnlLine."Applies-to ID";
        CalcType::SalesHeader:
          AppliesToID := SalesHeader."Applies-to ID";
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcApplnAmount@4();
    VAR
      ExchAccGLJnlLine@1000 : Codeunit 366;
    BEGIN
      AppliedAmount := 0;
      PmtDiscAmount := 0;
      DifferentCurrenciesInAppln := FALSE;

      CASE CalcType OF
        CalcType::Direct:
          BEGIN
            FindAmountRounding;
            CustEntryApplID := USERID;
            IF CustEntryApplID = '' THEN
              CustEntryApplID := '***';

            CustLedgEntry := ApplyingCustLedgEntry;

            AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open,Positive);
            AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Customer No.");
            AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Open,TRUE);
            AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Applies-to ID",CustEntryApplID);

            IF ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." <> 0 THEN BEGIN
              CustLedgEntry.CALCFIELDS("Remaining Amount");
              AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETFILTER("Entry No.",'<>%1',ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No.");
            END;

            HandlChosenEntries(0,
              CustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount",
              CustLedgEntry."Currency Code",
              CustLedgEntry."Posting Date");
          END;

        CalcType::GenJnlLine:
          BEGIN
            FindAmountRounding;
            IF GenJnlLine."Bal. Account Type" = GenJnlLine."Bal. Account Type"::Customer THEN
              ExchAccGLJnlLine.RUN(GenJnlLine);

            CASE ApplnType OF
              ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No.":
                BEGIN
                  AppliedCustLedgEntry := Rec;
                  WITH AppliedCustLedgEntry DO BEGIN
                    CALCFIELDS("Remaining Amount");
                    IF "Currency Code" <> ApplnCurrencyCode THEN BEGIN
                      "Remaining Amount" :=
                        CurrExchRate.ExchangeAmtFCYToFCY(
                          ApplnDate,"Currency Code",ApplnCurrencyCode,"Remaining Amount");
                      "Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible" :=
                        CurrExchRate.ExchangeAmtFCYToFCY(
                          ApplnDate,"Currency Code",ApplnCurrencyCode,"Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible");
                      "Amount to Apply" :=
                        CurrExchRate.ExchangeAmtFCYToFCY(
                          ApplnDate,"Currency Code",ApplnCurrencyCode,"Amount to Apply");
                    END;

                    IF "Amount to Apply" <> 0 THEN
                      AppliedAmount := ROUND("Amount to Apply",AmountRoundingPrecision)
                    ELSE
                      AppliedAmount := ROUND("Remaining Amount",AmountRoundingPrecision);

                    IF PaymentToleranceMgt.CheckCalcPmtDiscGenJnlCust(
                         GenJnlLine,AppliedCustLedgEntry,0,FALSE) AND
                       ((ABS(GenJnlLine.Amount) + ApplnRoundingPrecision >=
                         ABS(AppliedAmount - "Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible")) OR
                        (GenJnlLine.Amount = 0))
                    THEN
                      PmtDiscAmount := "Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";

                    IF NOT DifferentCurrenciesInAppln THEN
                      DifferentCurrenciesInAppln := ApplnCurrencyCode <> "Currency Code";

                  END;
                  CheckRounding;
                END;

              ApplnType::"Applies-to ID":
                BEGIN
                  GenJnlLine2 := GenJnlLine;
                  AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.",Open,Positive);
                  AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Customer No.",GenJnlLine."Account No.");
                  AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Open,TRUE);
                  AppliedCustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Applies-to ID",GenJnlLine."Applies-to ID");

                  HandlChosenEntries(1,
                    GenJnlLine2.Amount,
                    GenJnlLine2."Currency Code",
                    GenJnlLine2."Posting Date");
                END;
              END;
          END;
      // Start PA032441
      // Stop PA032441
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcApplnRemainingAmount@6(Amount@1000 : Decimal) : Decimal;
    VAR
      ApplnRemainingAmount@1001 : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      ValidExchRate := TRUE;
      IF ApplnCurrencyCode = "Currency Code" THEN
        EXIT(Amount);

      IF ApplnDate = 0D THEN
        ApplnDate := "Posting Date";
      ApplnRemainingAmount :=
        CurrExchRate.ApplnExchangeAmtFCYToFCY(
          ApplnDate,"Currency Code",ApplnCurrencyCode,Amount,ValidExchRate);
      EXIT(ApplnRemainingAmount);
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcApplnAmounttoApply@10(AmounttoApply@1000 : Decimal) : Decimal;
    VAR
      ApplnAmounttoApply@1001 : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      ValidExchRate := TRUE;

      IF ApplnCurrencyCode = "Currency Code" THEN
        EXIT(AmounttoApply);

      IF ApplnDate = 0D THEN
        ApplnDate := "Posting Date";
      ApplnAmounttoApply :=
        CurrExchRate.ApplnExchangeAmtFCYToFCY(
          ApplnDate,"Currency Code",ApplnCurrencyCode,AmounttoApply,ValidExchRate);
      EXIT(ApplnAmounttoApply);
    END;

    PROCEDURE FindAmountRounding@7();
    BEGIN
      IF ApplnCurrencyCode = '' THEN BEGIN
        Currency.INIT;
        Currency.Code := '';
        Currency.InitRoundingPrecision;
      END ELSE
        IF ApplnCurrencyCode <> Currency.Code THEN
          Currency.GET(ApplnCurrencyCode);

      AmountRoundingPrecision := Currency."Amount Rounding Precision";
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckRounding@3();
    BEGIN
      ApplnRounding := 0;

      CASE CalcType OF
      // Start PA032441
        CalcType::SalesHeader:
      // Stop PA032441
          EXIT;
        CalcType::GenJnlLine:
          IF (GenJnlLine."Document Type" <> GenJnlLine."Document Type"::Payment) AND
             (GenJnlLine."Document Type" <> GenJnlLine."Document Type"::Refund)
          THEN
            EXIT;
      END;

      IF ApplnCurrencyCode = '' THEN
        ApplnRoundingPrecision := GLSetup."Appln. Rounding Precision"
      ELSE BEGIN
        IF ApplnCurrencyCode <> "Currency Code" THEN
          Currency.GET(ApplnCurrencyCode);
        ApplnRoundingPrecision := Currency."Appln. Rounding Precision";
      END;

      IF (ABS((AppliedAmount - PmtDiscAmount) + ApplyingAmount) <= ApplnRoundingPrecision) AND DifferentCurrenciesInAppln THEN
        ApplnRounding := -((AppliedAmount - PmtDiscAmount) + ApplyingAmount);
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetCustLedgEntry@5(VAR CustLedgEntry@1000 : Record 21);
    BEGIN
      CustLedgEntry := Rec;
    END;

    PROCEDURE FindApplyingEntry@12();
    BEGIN
      IF CalcType = CalcType::Direct THEN BEGIN
        CustEntryApplID := USERID;
        IF CustEntryApplID = '' THEN
          CustEntryApplID := '***';

        CustLedgEntry.SETCURRENTKEY("Customer No.","Applies-to ID",Open);
        CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Customer No.","Customer No.");
        CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Applies-to ID",CustEntryApplID);
        CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE(Open,TRUE);
        CustLedgEntry.SETRANGE("Applying Entry",TRUE);
        IF CustLedgEntry.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
          CustLedgEntry.CALCFIELDS(Amount,"Remaining Amount");
          ApplyingCustLedgEntry := CustLedgEntry;
          SETFILTER("Entry No.",'<>%1',CustLedgEntry."Entry No.");
          ApplyingAmount := CustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount";
          ApplnDate := CustLedgEntry."Posting Date";
          ApplnCurrencyCode := CustLedgEntry."Currency Code";
        END;
        CalcApplnAmount;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE HandlChosenEntries@14(Type@1000 : 'Direct,GenJnlLine,SalesHeader';CurrentAmount@1001 : Decimal;CurrencyCode@1002 : Code[10];"Posting Date"@1003 : Date);
    VAR
      AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp@1004 : TEMPORARY Record 21;
      PossiblePmtDisc@1007 : Decimal;
      OldPmtDisc@1008 : Decimal;
      CorrectionAmount@1009 : Decimal;
      CanUseDisc@1005 : Boolean;
      FromZeroGenJnl@1010 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      IF AppliedCustLedgEntry.FINDSET(FALSE,FALSE) THEN BEGIN
        REPEAT
          AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp := AppliedCustLedgEntry;
          AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.INSERT;
        UNTIL AppliedCustLedgEntry.NEXT = 0;
      END ELSE
        EXIT;

      FromZeroGenJnl := (CurrentAmount = 0) AND (Type = Type::GenJnlLine);

      REPEAT
        IF NOT FromZeroGenJnl THEN
          AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.SETRANGE(Positive,CurrentAmount < 0);
        IF AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
          ExchangeAmountsOnLedgerEntry(Type,CurrencyCode,AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp,"Posting Date");

          CASE Type OF
            Type::Direct:
              CanUseDisc := PaymentToleranceMgt.CheckCalcPmtDiscCust(CustLedgEntry,AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp,0,FALSE,FALSE);
            Type::GenJnlLine:
              CanUseDisc := PaymentToleranceMgt.CheckCalcPmtDiscGenJnlCust(GenJnlLine2,AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp,0,FALSE)
            ELSE
              CanUseDisc := FALSE;
          END;

          IF CanUseDisc AND
             (ABS(AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Amount to Apply") >= ABS(AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" -
                AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible"))
          THEN BEGIN
            IF (ABS(CurrentAmount) > ABS(AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" -
                  AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible"))
            THEN BEGIN
              PmtDiscAmount := PmtDiscAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
              CurrentAmount := CurrentAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" -
                AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
            END ELSE
              IF (ABS(CurrentAmount) = ABS(AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" -
                    AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible"))
              THEN BEGIN
                PmtDiscAmount := PmtDiscAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible" + PossiblePmtDisc;
                CurrentAmount := CurrentAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" -
                  AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible" - PossiblePmtDisc;
                PossiblePmtDisc := 0;
                AppliedAmount := AppliedAmount + CorrectionAmount;
              END ELSE
                IF FromZeroGenJnl THEN BEGIN
                  PmtDiscAmount := PmtDiscAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
                  CurrentAmount := CurrentAmount +
                    AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" - AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
                END ELSE BEGIN
                  PossiblePmtDisc := AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
                  IF (CurrentAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" >= 0) <> (CurrentAmount >= 0) THEN BEGIN
                    PmtDiscAmount := PmtDiscAmount + PossiblePmtDisc;
                    AppliedAmount := AppliedAmount + CorrectionAmount;
                  END;
                  CurrentAmount := CurrentAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" -
                    AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible";
                END;
          END ELSE BEGIN
            IF (((CurrentAmount - PossiblePmtDisc + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Amount to Apply") * CurrentAmount) <= 0) THEN BEGIN
              PmtDiscAmount := PmtDiscAmount + PossiblePmtDisc;
              CurrentAmount := CurrentAmount - PossiblePmtDisc;
              PossiblePmtDisc := 0;
              AppliedAmount := AppliedAmount + CorrectionAmount;
            END;
            CurrentAmount := CurrentAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Amount to Apply";
          END;
        END ELSE BEGIN
          AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.SETRANGE(Positive);
          AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.FINDFIRST;
          ExchangeAmountsOnLedgerEntry(Type,CurrencyCode,AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp,"Posting Date");
        END;

        IF (OldPmtDisc <> PmtDiscAmount) THEN
          AppliedAmount := AppliedAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount"
        ELSE
          AppliedAmount := AppliedAmount + AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Amount to Apply";
        OldPmtDisc := PmtDiscAmount;

        IF PossiblePmtDisc <> 0 THEN
          CorrectionAmount := AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Remaining Amount" - AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Amount to Apply"
        ELSE
          CorrectionAmount := 0;

        IF NOT DifferentCurrenciesInAppln THEN
          DifferentCurrenciesInAppln:= ApplnCurrencyCode <> AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp."Currency Code";

        AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.DELETE;
        AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.SETRANGE(Positive);

      UNTIL NOT AppliedCustLedgEntryTemp.FINDFIRST;
      CheckRounding;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmounttoApplyOnAfterValidate@19038179();
    BEGIN
      IF ApplnType <> ApplnType::"Applies-to Doc. No." THEN BEGIN
        CalcApplnAmount;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE RecalcApplnAmount@19051222();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      CalcApplnAmount;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE LookupOKOnPush@19031339();
    BEGIN
      OK := TRUE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE PostDirectApplication@15();
    VAR
      CustEntryApplyPostedEntries@1000 : Codeunit 226;
      PostApplication@1002 : Page 579;
      ApplicationDate@1001 : Date;
      NewApplicationDate@1003 : Date;
      NewDocumentNo@1004 : Code[20];
    BEGIN
      IF CalcType = CalcType::Direct THEN BEGIN
        IF ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." <> 0 THEN BEGIN
          Rec := ApplyingCustLedgEntry;
          ApplicationDate := CustEntryApplyPostedEntries.GetApplicationDate(Rec);
          PostApplication.SetValues("Document No.",ApplicationDate);
          IF ACTION::OK = PostApplication.RUNMODAL THEN BEGIN
            PostApplication.GetValues(NewDocumentNo,NewApplicationDate);
            IF NewApplicationDate < ApplicationDate THEN
              ERROR(Text013,FIELDCAPTION("Posting Date"),TABLECAPTION);
          END ELSE
            ERROR(Text019);

          CustEntryApplyPostedEntries.Apply(Rec,NewDocumentNo,NewApplicationDate);

          MESSAGE(Text012);
          PostingDone := TRUE;
          CurrPage.CLOSE;
        END ELSE
          ERROR(Text002);
      END ELSE
        ERROR(Text003);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExchangeAmountsOnLedgerEntry@20(Type@1003 : 'Direct,GenJnlLine,SalesHeader';CurrencyCode@1000 : Code[10];VAR CalcCustLedgEntry@1001 : Record 21;PostingDate@1004 : Date);
    VAR
      CalculateCurrency@1002 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      CalcCustLedgEntry.CALCFIELDS("Remaining Amount");

      IF Type = Type::Direct THEN
        CalculateCurrency := ApplyingCustLedgEntry."Entry No." <> 0
      ELSE
        CalculateCurrency := TRUE;

      IF (CurrencyCode <> CalcCustLedgEntry."Currency Code") AND CalculateCurrency THEN BEGIN
        CalcCustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount" :=
          CurrExchRate.ExchangeAmount(
            CalcCustLedgEntry."Remaining Amount",
            CalcCustLedgEntry."Currency Code",
            CurrencyCode,PostingDate);
        CalcCustLedgEntry."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible" :=
          CurrExchRate.ExchangeAmount(
            CalcCustLedgEntry."Remaining Pmt. Disc. Possible",
            CalcCustLedgEntry."Currency Code",
            CurrencyCode,PostingDate);
        CalcCustLedgEntry."Amount to Apply" :=
          CurrExchRate.ExchangeAmount(
            CalcCustLedgEntry."Amount to Apply",
            CalcCustLedgEntry."Currency Code",
            CurrencyCode,PostingDate);
      END;
    END;

    [Integration]
    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnBeforeEarlierPostingDateError@19(ApplyingCustLedgerEntry@1000 : Record 21;CustLedgerEntry@1001 : Record 21;VAR RaiseError@1002 : Boolean;CalcType@1003 : Option);
    BEGIN
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031550   04.03.10 Changes for the EAP: Control "Applies-To ID" rearranged
      PA032441   01.07.11 GC NAV 2009 SP1 W1 General Ledger Integration
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA032651   25.04.12 DR 6012646: DEU and ENU Captions corrected
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA035901   09.10.14 TS NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration.
      PA038205   08.07.15 TS Merge NAV 2013 R2 Cumulative Update 20.
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0156444 27.03.23 GD 156502 Modification in OnQueryClosePage, SetCustApplId() to not check if the applyment is being done in an earlier posting date.
      EU.0210554 20.01.26 HP 210446 Roll back the changes 156502 and adapting changes from Cronus.
                                    Added funtion CheckCustLedgEntry() and event OnBeforeEarlierPostingDateError,
                                    Modified OnQueryClosePage, to restrict posting entries with earlier posting date.
    }
    END.

    END;

    END;

                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 1109400002;1 ;Action    ;
                      Name=List Overview;

                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=List;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 RepSelectionL@1109400000 : Record 77;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start PA039784.54256
                                 RepSelectionL.FILTERGROUP(2);
                                 CASE ReportUsage2 OF
                                   ReportUsage2::Inquiry:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Inquiry");
                                   ReportUsage2::Order:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Order");
                                   ReportUsage2::Invoice:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Inv.");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Credit Memo":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Cr.Memo");
                                   ReportUsage2::Receipt:
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Receipt");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Purchase Document - Test":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Test");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Return Order":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Ret.Order");
                                   ReportUsage2::"Return Shipment":
                                     RepSelectionL.SETRANGE(Usage,RepSelectionL.Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment");
                                 END;
                                 RepSelectionL.FILTERGROUP(0);
                                 RepSelectionL.SETCURRENTKEY(Usage,"Location Code","Make Code",Sequence);
                                 IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, RepSelectionL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
                                   EXIT;
                                 MakeUsageG := RepSelectionL."Make Code";
                                 LocationUsageG := RepSelectionL."Location Code";
                                 SetUsageFilter();
                                 CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);

                                 // Stop PA039784.54256
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400004;1 ;Action    ;
                      Name=Previous;

      LocationUsageG@1109400003 : Code[20];
      NextEnabledG@1109400004 : Boolean INDATASET;
      BackEnabledG@1109400005 : Boolean INDATASET;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SetUsageFilter@1();
    BEGIN
      FILTERGROUP(2);
      CASE ReportUsage2 OF
        ReportUsage2::Inquiry:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Inquiry");
        ReportUsage2::Order:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Order");
        ReportUsage2::Invoice:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Inv.");
        ReportUsage2::"Credit Memo":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Cr.Memo");
        ReportUsage2::Receipt:
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Receipt");
        ReportUsage2::"Purchase Document - Test":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Test");
      // Start INC
        ReportUsage2::"Return Order":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Ret.Order");

        ReportUsage2::"Return Shipment":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment");
      // Start PA041199.68194
        ReportUsage2::"Return Order Picklist":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick");
      // Stop PA041199.68194
      // Start EU.0074599
        ReportUsage2::"ADR Document":
          SETRANGE(Usage,Usage::"ADR Document");
      // Stop EU.0074599
      END;

      SETRANGE("Make Code",MakeUsageG);

      SETRANGE("Location Code", LocationUsageG);
      //Stop INC
      FILTERGROUP(0);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReportUsage2OnAfterValidate@19038799();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE MakeUsageGOnAfterValidate@19064971();
    BEGIN
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE LocationUsageGOnAfterValidate@19067914();
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop INC
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE GroupRecordStep@1109400001(StepP@1109400003 : Integer);
    VAR
      InDifferentGroupL@1109400000 : Boolean;
      RepSelectionL@1109400002 : Record 77;
    BEGIN
      // @ GroupRecordStep - Used when pushing next or previous button to show the next
      // @ or previous group of records that have the same usage, location code and make code.
      // @ param stepP - Integer

      // Start PA039784.54256
      RepSelectionL := Rec;
      RepSelectionL.SETCURRENTKEY(Usage,"Location Code","Make Code",Sequence);
      // Start PA041199.68194
      RepSelectionL.SETFILTER(Usage,'%1|%2|%3|%4|%5|%6|%7|%8|%9',Usage::"P.Inquiry",Usage::"P.Order",
        Usage::"P.Inv.",Usage::"P.Cr.Memo",Usage::"P.Receipt",Usage::"P.Test",Usage::"P.Ret.Order",Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment",Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick");
      // Stop PA041199.68194
      REPEAT
        RepSelectionL.NEXT(StepP);
        InDifferentGroupL := NOT InTheSameGroup(RepSelectionL,Rec);
      UNTIL InDifferentGroupL;
      SetReportUsage2(RepSelectionL);
      MakeUsageG := RepSelectionL."Make Code";
      LocationUsageG := RepSelectionL."Location Code";
      SetUsageFilter();
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE RefreshButtons@1109400002();
    VAR
      FirstRepSelectionL@1109400000 : Record 77;
      LastRepSelectionL@1109400001 : Record 77;
      RepSelectionL@1109400002 : Record 77;
    BEGIN
      // @ RefreshButtons - Used to Refresh the next, previous buttons

      // Start PA039784.54256
      BackEnabledG := FALSE;
      NextEnabledG := FALSE;
      RepSelectionL := Rec;
      RepSelectionL.SETCURRENTKEY(Usage,"Location Code","Make Code",Sequence);
      // Start PA041199.68194
      RepSelectionL.SETFILTER(Usage,'%1|%2|%3|%4|%5|%6|%7|%8|%9',Usage::"P.Inquiry",Usage::"P.Order",
        Usage::"P.Inv.",Usage::"P.Cr.Memo",Usage::"P.Receipt",Usage::"P.Test",Usage::"P.Ret.Order",Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment",Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick");
      // Start PA041199.68194
      FirstRepSelectionL.SETVIEW(RepSelectionL.GETVIEW);
      LastRepSelectionL.SETVIEW(RepSelectionL.GETVIEW);
      IF FirstRepSelectionL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        LastRepSelectionL.FINDLAST;
        BackEnabledG := PreviousGroupExists(FirstRepSelectionL);
        NextEnabledG := NextGroupExists(LastRepSelectionL);
      END;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE InTheSameGroup@1109400003(RepSelection1P@1109400000 : Record 77;RepSelection2P@1109400001 : Record 77) InTheSameGroupR : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ InTheSameGroup - Used to check if 2 records have the same Usage, Make Code and Location Code
      // @ param RepSelection1P - Record Report Selection
      // @ param RepSelection2P - Record Report Selection
      // @ retval InTheSameGroupR - Boolean

      // Start PA039784.54256
      InTheSameGroupR:= (RepSelection1P.Usage = RepSelection2P.Usage) AND
        (RepSelection1P."Make Code" = RepSelection2P."Make Code") AND
        (RepSelection1P."Location Code" = RepSelection2P."Location Code") ;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE PreviousGroupExists@1109400004(RepSelectionP@1109400000 : Record 77) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ PreviousGroupExists - Used to check if a previous group of records exists
      // @ param RepSelectionP - Record Report Selection
      // @ retval - Boolean

      // Start PA039784.54256
      IF (Usage < RepSelectionP.Usage) THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF Usage > RepSelectionP.Usage THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Location Code" < RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Location Code" > RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Make Code" < RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Make Code" > RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NextGroupExists@1109400005(RepSelectionP@1109400000 : Record 77) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ NextGroupExists - Used to check if a next group of records exists
      // @ param RepSelectionP - Record Report Selection
      // @ retval - Boolean

      // Start PA039784.54256
      IF (Usage >  RepSelectionP.Usage) THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF Usage < RepSelectionP.Usage THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Location Code" > RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Location Code" < RepSelectionP."Location Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);

      IF ("Make Code" > RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(FALSE);

      IF ("Make Code" < RepSelectionP."Make Code") THEN
        EXIT(TRUE);
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SetReportUsage2@1109400007(RepSelectionP@1109400000 : Record 77);
    BEGIN
      // @ SetReportUsage2 - Used to map the records usage with the option ReportUsage2
      // @ param RepSelectionP - Record Report Selection

      // Start PA039784.54256
      CASE RepSelectionP.Usage OF
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Inquiry":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Inquiry;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Order":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Order;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Inv.":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Invoice;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Cr.Memo":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Credit Memo";
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Receipt":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::Receipt;
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Test":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Purchase Document - Test";
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Ret.Order":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Return Order";
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Ret.Shipment":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Return Shipment";
        // Start PA041199.68194
        RepSelectionP.Usage::"P.Ret.Order.Pick":
          ReportUsage2 := ReportUsage2::"Return Order Picklist";
        // Start PA041199.68194
      END;
      // Stop PA039784.54256
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area Parts
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA033052   23.05.11 PR Added new controls 'Report Title', 'Print Report Title', 'Print Add. Footer', 'Print Make Logo', 'Print Company Logo'.
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea style guide
      PA033336   17.10.12 SS 8746211 Removed "Print Footer Line" field control.
      PA033336   12.11.12 SS 8590628 Removed logo fields: "Print Company Logo", "Print Make Logo"
      PA035484   04.04.14 GF 20754 Renamed field "Print Add. Footer" to "Print Comp. Business Template"
      PA036461   01.09.14 KK 27591 Changed behavior of saving selected reports
      PA036547   06.11.14 GE Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0 - PA035484.20754.
      PA036548   22.12.14 GL Adjusted Source expressions of fields with changed names
      PA039931   28.01.16 GE Extend all make code variables to code20
      PA039932   02.02.16 GE Merge of PA039931

OBJECT Page 425 Vendor Bank Account Card

  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Vendor Bank Account Card;
    SourceTable=Table288;
    PageType=Card;
    OnModifyRecord=VAR
                     LastNamePageL@1109400000 : Page 5025369;
                   BEGIN
                     // Start INC
                     IF "Last Name" = '' THEN BEGIN
                       LastNamePageL.VendorBank(Rec);
                       LastNamePageL.LOOKUPMODE(TRUE);
                     // Start PA043931
                       IF LastNamePageL.RUNMODAL = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                         VALIDATE("First Name", LastNamePageL.GetFirstName());
                         VALIDATE("Last Name", LastNamePageL.GetLastName());
                       END;
                     // Stop PA043931
                     END;
                     // Start EU.0004648
                     AddressSetupG.GET;
                     IF ("Address No." = 0) AND (NOT AddressSetupG."Exclude Bank Acc. from Address") THEN
                     // Stop EU.0004648
                       AddressMgntG.CheckVendorBankAccountAddress(Rec, TRUE);
                     EXIT (TRUE);
                     // Stop INC
                   END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=VAR
                           SearchNameL@1109400000 : Code[50];
                         BEGIN
                           // Start PA041187.89458
                           // Start EU.0200720.203027
                           FirstNameEditableG := AddressMgntG.EditFirstName(AddressMgntG.IsBusiness("Address Salutation Code"), "First Name", "Last Name", SearchNameL);
                           // Stop EU.0200720.203027
                           // Stop PA041187.89458
                         END;

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      TransferExtendedText@1000 : Codeunit 378;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@5(Unconditionally@1000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransferExtendedText.FinChrgMemoCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,Unconditionally) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransferExtendedText.InsertFinChrgMemoExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransferExtendedText.MakeUpdate THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE FormUpdateAttachedLines@3();
    BEGIN
      IF CheckAttachedLines THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        UpdateAttachedLines;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdatePage@1101100000(SetSaveRecord@1000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA045176
      CurrPage.UPDATE(SetSaveRecord);
      // Stop PA045176
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE TypeOnAfterValidate@19069045();
    BEGIN
      InsertExtendedText(FALSE);
      FormUpdateAttachedLines;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterValidate@19066594();
    BEGIN
      InsertExtendedText(FALSE);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DocumentTypeOnAfterValidate@19030163();
    BEGIN
      FormUpdateAttachedLines;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DocumentNoOnAfterValidate@19031352();
    BEGIN
      FormUpdateAttachedLines;
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area GeneralLedger
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA032441   01.07.11 GC NAV 2009 SP1 W1 General Ledger Integration

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      PageNoEnable@19038903 : Boolean INDATASET;
      "___ INCADEA ___"@17452300 : Integer;
      PrintProformaManagementG@17452301 : Codeunit 5028809;

    PROCEDURE SalespersonCaptionDrilldown@1101207291(TypeP@1101207290 : Integer;FieldNoP@1100812959 : Integer);
    VAR
      FieldCaptionL@1101207291 : Record 5045614;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to open drill down page with specified filters
      // @ Parameters Type and Field Number
      // Start PA036728
      FieldCaptionL.RESET;
      FieldCaptionL.SETRANGE("Table No.",DATABASE::"Sales & Receivables Setup");
      FieldCaptionL.SETRANGE("Field No.",FieldNoP);
      FieldCaptionL.SETRANGE(Type,TypeP);
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Field Caption Definitions", FieldCaptionL);
      // Stop PA036728
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA032651   19.04.12 SM 7178403: Captions ML are removed in cases when they are not neede on the page. Caption ML is retreived
                             page a caption ML in the table on ehich a specific page lies. Changes are done by a specifications in a case.
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea style guide
      PA033765   19.12.12 GC EU Tire Data Regulation field added
      PA034291   31.07.13 SM New fields added :5045972 DefaultPrepmt. GL Account,5045973 Default Prepmt. Receivab. Acc.,
                             5045974 Default Payment Terms Code, 5045975 Default Payment Method Code,5045976 Default Reason Code,
                             5045977 Prepmt. Inv. Nos, 5045978 Posted Prepmt. Inv. Nos, 5045978 Posted Prepmt. Inv. Nos,
                             5045979 Posted Prepmt. Cr. Memo. Nos.
      PA034527   11.12.13 GG 19632 Field "EU Tire Data Regulation" modified to "EU Tire Label Regulation"
      PA036118   26.05.14 DR New Location / Branch check: Show new field "Sales Line Location Sync"
      PA036728   19.09.14 SW Added new controls for fields parts salesperson 2 caption and vehicle sales person 2 caption
                             New functions created to implement caption functionality for salesperson code 2
      PA036728   19.11.14 SW 30891 Caption setup fields made non editable
      PA035901   12.11.14 CH NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration.
      PA036966   25.11.14 TS NAV 2013 R2 General Ledger Integration - SEPA Credit Transfer, Direct Debit.
                             New Field "Direct Debit Mandate Nos.".
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      PA036547   06.11.14 GE Merge N.6.1.4 to N.7.1.0 - PA036118.
      PA036548   17.12.14 GL Merge of PA036728
      PA036549   15.01.15 TS 32635 Background Posting fasttab set to Visible - FALSE.
      PA036549   18.02.15 CH 34230 "Sales Line Location Sync" field removed.
      PA041687   24.01.17 IM New setups added to General fastTab.
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0090125 21.02.20 UU Downmerge of EU.0017374
                             - EU.0017374 MS Display new fields "ShipmProp Def. Auto Templ" and "ShipmProp Def. Auto Name" in "Shipment Proposal" FastTab
      EU.0032453 01.08.18 DR Show new fields "Lost Parts Sales Detection" and "Shopping Cart Expiry Formula".
      EU.0098776 22.05.20 GI 98820 Downmerge of EU.0032453
      EU.0060704 17.04.19 GI 61297 Item Query Implementation.
      EU.0060704 04.06.19 GI 67067 Modified the name of the Show Bins and Default Purch. Order Type fields.
      EU.0098776 22.05.20 GI 99044 Merge of EU.0060704
      EU.0114065 25.03.21 DS Fields Added for General Documents:
                              Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.
                              Posted Gen. Sales Invoice Nos.
                              Gen. Sales Cr. Memo Nos.
                              Posted Gen. Sales Cr. Memo
                              Gen. Sales Shipment Nos.
                              Gen. Sales Re. Receipt Nos.
      EU.0169755 22.12.23 EG 171507 Added new field "Cr. Lim. Inv. Post. Error" to check customer balance and popup document warning page when set.
      EU.0174523 29.02.24 DR Proforma Print: Show new setup fields: "Proforma Print DocStatus Parts" and "Proforma Print DocStatus Veh.".
      EU.0188840 15.11.24 DR Merge of EU.0174523

    PROCEDURE DealerCheckRunForm@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353001 : Record 79;
      DealerMgt@1101353000 : Codeunit 5086700;
    BEGIN
      // Start INC
      IF CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN
        IF DealerMgt.GetDealer <> '' THEN
          ERROR('');
      // Stop INC
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area PartsSales, VehicleSales, Service
      PA-Number  Date
      ------------------------------------------------
      PA031882   03.05.10 removed field "Job No."
      PA032651   31.08.11 PR #4889933: Modified code (due to the form caption re-naming of Form-5025685[Service Credit Memo]).
      PA033067   12.04.12 DR DE Captions implemented
      PA033259   09.08.12 AI Deletion of Start/Stop History in Code, update copyright and Version List
      PA033259   18.09.12 DR Variable names changed according to incadea styleguide
      PA034531   04.09.13 GD I001184 Modified "No."-OnLookup(), "No."-OnValidate() to use correct LookUp Trigger Logic.
      PA035597   10.02.14 GC NAV 2013 R2 Technical Upgrade
      --- 7.2.1 ---
      EU.0090125 24.02.20 UU Downmerge of EU.0056707 & EU.0025423
                             - EU.0056707 GE 56709 Temp fix of EU.0025423
                             - EU.0025423 DR use new functions from the Sales- and Purchase Header to open the correct Document Card Page IDs.
                                             All "&" removed in the Page Action Captions
    }
    END.
  }

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DoPostOnPushAction@17452300(PostingCodeunitP@17452300 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesPostPrintL@17452302 : Codeunit 82;
      ErrorL@17452301 : Text;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      UserSessionG.SetLock(TRUE);
      CLEARLASTERROR;
      IF NOT CODEUNIT.RUN(PostingCodeunitP,Rec) THEN
        ErrorL := GETLASTERRORTEXT;
      UserSessionG.SetLock(FALSE);
      IF ErrorL <> '' THEN
        ERROR(ErrorL);
      IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      xRec := Rec;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ShowCurrentStatus@1() : Text;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0111610.111441
      Status := CalcCurrentStatus(0);
      EXIT(FORMAT(Status));
      // Stop EU.0111610.111441
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowShipments@1101422630();
    VAR
      PageShippedLinesL@1101422630 : Page 5029020;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function to show shipment from the header
      // Start PA033978.I000905
      // Start PA036549.32181
      PageShippedLinesL.InitializeForm(DATABASE::"Sales Header","No.",0);
      // Stop PA036549.32181
      PageShippedLinesL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA033978.I000905
    END;

      { 1109400001;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Transfer Purchase Order to Cockpit;
                      Image=Export;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 PurchHeader@1109400001 : Record 38;
                                 MakeSetupL@1109400002 : Record 5028656;
                               BEGIN
                                 PurchHeader.COPY(Rec);
                                 PurchHeader.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                                 PurchHeader.SETRANGE("No.","No.");
                                 // Start INC
                                 IF MakeSetupL.GET("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code") THEN BEGIN
                                   IF MakeSetupL."Obj.ID Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp." <> 0 THEN BEGIN
                                     CASE MakeSetupL."Obj.T. Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp." OF
                                 // Start PA035597
                                       MakeSetupL."Obj.T. Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp."::Page :
                                 // Stop PA035597
                                         PAGE.RUNMODAL(MakeSetupL."Obj.ID Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp.",PurchHeader);
                                       MakeSetupL."Obj.T. Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp."::Report :
                                         REPORT.RUNMODAL(MakeSetupL."Obj.ID Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp.",TRUE,FALSE,PurchHeader);
                                       MakeSetupL."Obj.T. Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp."::Codeunit :
                                         CODEUNIT.RUN(MakeSetupL."Obj.ID Tr. Par.Purch.O. Cockp.",PurchHeader);
                                       ELSE
                                         REPORT.RUNMODAL(REPORT::"Purchasing to Cockpit",TRUE,FALSE,PurchHeader);
                                     END;
                                   END ELSE
                                     REPORT.RUNMODAL(REPORT::"Purchasing to Cockpit",TRUE,FALSE,PurchHeader);
                                 END ELSE
                                   REPORT.RUNMODAL(REPORT::"Purchasing to Cockpit",TRUE,FALSE,PurchHeader);
                                 // Stop INC
                               END;
                                }
    }
  }

OBJECT Page 5025407 Veh. Model Card
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=06/05/18;
    Time=[ 1:26:33 PM];
    Version List=N.7.2.0_SLA;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Veh. Model Card;
    SourceTable=Table27;
    SourceTableView=SORTING(Item Type,Make Code,No.)
                    WHERE(Item Type=CONST(Vehicle));
    PageType=Card;
    RefreshOnActivate=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             // Start PA037938.50963
             // Stop PA037938.50963
             "Unit VolumeEnable" := TRUE;
             "Last Landed Unit CostEnable" := TRUE;
             "Freight AmountEnable" := TRUE;
             "Freight %Enable" := TRUE;
             "Duty Due AmountEnable" := TRUE;
             "Duty Due %Enable" := TRUE;
             "Line Group CodeEnable" := TRUE;
             "Subgroup CodeEnable" := TRUE;
             "Main Group CodeEnable" := TRUE;
             ListPriceinclVATLCYEditable := TRUE;
             "List Price (LCY)Editable" := TRUE;
             "Unit Price incl. VATEditable" := TRUE;
             "Unit PriceEditable" := TRUE;
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 EnableImporterTab;
                 // Start PA032440
                 // Start PA032820
                 UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
                 HideVehicleCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Vehicle Cost";
                 // Stop PA032440
                 CheckPricingControl();
                 // Stop PA032820

                 // Start PA042440
                 RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                 UserSessionG.SetMake("Make Code", RecRefG);
                 // Stop PA042440
               END;

    OnClosePage=BEGIN
                  IF "Make Code" = '' THEN
                    IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Check Make Code",Rec) = ACTION::LookupOK THEN;
                END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Vehicle;
                  "Allow Invoice Disc." := FALSE;
                END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000003;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=RelatedInformation }
      { 103     ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Model }
      { 109     ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Picture;
                      Description=PA037533;
                      RunObject=Page 346;
                      RunPageLink=No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Date Filter=FIELD(Date Filter),
                                  Global Dimension 1 Filter=FIELD(Global Dimension 1 Filter),

                               VehicleL@1109400001 : Record 5025400;
                             BEGIN
                               VehicleL.SETCURRENTKEY("Model No.");
                               VehicleL.SETFILTER("Vehicle Status",'%1|%2|%3',
                                 VehicleL."Vehicle Status"::"New Vehicle",

                                 VehicleL."Vehicle Status"::"Demo Vehicle");

                                 VehicleL.SETFILTER("Location Code",'%1',FilterTextG);
                               FilterTextG := GETFILTER("Global Dimension 1 Filter");
                               IF FilterTextG <> '' THEN
                                 VehicleL.SETFILTER("Department Code",'%1',FilterTextG);

                               PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Vehicle List",VehicleL);
                             END;

                QuickEntry=FALSE }

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400006();
    VAR
      UserSetupL@1109400000 : Record 91;
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA032820

      "Unit PriceEditable" := TRUE;
      "Unit Price incl. VATEditable" := TRUE;
      "List Price (LCY)Editable" := TRUE;
      ListPriceinclVATLCYEditable := TRUE;

      IF (NOT UserSetupG."Change Item Unit Price") THEN BEGIN
        "Unit PriceEditable" := FALSE;
        "Unit Price incl. VATEditable" := FALSE;
        "List Price (LCY)Editable" := FALSE;
        ListPriceinclVATLCYEditable := FALSE;
      END;
      // Stop PA032820
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __IMS__@1101353000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableImporterTab@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353000 : Record 79;
    BEGIN
      IF NOT CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN BEGIN
        "Main Group CodeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Subgroup CodeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Line Group CodeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Duty Due %Enable" := FALSE;
        "Duty Due AmountEnable" := FALSE;
        "Freight %Enable" := FALSE;
        "Freight AmountEnable" := FALSE;
        "Last Landed Unit CostEnable" := FALSE;
        "Unit VolumeEnable" := FALSE;
      // Start PA037938.50963
      // Stop PA037938.50963
      END;
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area Vehicle
      +----------------------------------------------+
      | Copyright (c) incadea                        |
      +----------------------------------------------+

                 // Start PA032877

                   CurrPage.SalesLines.PAGE.MarkLine(LineG."Document Type",LineG."Document No.",LineG."Line No.");
                 EnableImporterTab;

                 // Start PA033011.5997953

               END;

                  // Start PA040025

    OnDeleteRecord=VAR
                     VehOptionInvL@1109400000 : Record 5025464;
                   BEGIN
                     // Start PA041864
                     CheckCloseOpportunity();
                     // Stop PA041864
                     VehOptionInvL.RESET;
                     VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                     VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
                     VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Available in Separate Invoice",TRUE);
                     IF VehOptionInvL.FIND('-') THEN BEGIN
                       VehOptionInvL.CALCFIELDS("Own Invoice No.");
                       ERROR(C_INC001,"No.",VehOptionInvL."Own Invoice No.");
                     END;
                     VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Available in Separate Invoice",TRUE);
                     VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Avail. in Separate Posted Inv.",TRUE);
                     IF VehOptionInvL.FIND('-') THEN BEGIN
                       VehOptionInvL.CALCFIELDS("Posted Own Invoice No.");
                       ERROR(C_INC002,"No.",VehOptionInvL."Posted Own Invoice No.");
                     END;
                     // Start PA041187.88322
                     // Start EU.0035974
                     // Stop EU.0035974
                     // Stop PA041187.88322
                     CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
                     // Start PA035472
                     MODIFY;
                     // Stop PA035472
                     IF ConfirmDeletion THEN BEGIN
                       EXIT(TRUE);
                     END ELSE
                       EXIT(FALSE);
                   END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DoPostOnPushAction@17452301(PostingCodeunitP@17452300 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesPostPrintL@17452302 : Codeunit 82;
      ErrorL@17452301 : Text;
      SkipTriggerL@18884100 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0188841.191671
      OnBeforeDoPostOnPushActionEvent(Rec, SkipTriggerL);
      IF SkipTriggerL THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop EU.0188841.191671
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      UserSessionG.SetLock(TRUE);
      CLEARLASTERROR;
      IF NOT CODEUNIT.RUN(PostingCodeunitP,Rec) THEN
        ErrorL := GETLASTERRORTEXT;
      UserSessionG.SetLock(FALSE);
      IF ErrorL <> '' THEN
        ERROR(ErrorL);
      IF "Job Queue Status" = "Job Queue Status"::"Scheduled for Posting" THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      xRec := Rec;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters@88000() RecordChangedR : Boolean;
    VAR
      RecL@88001 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0162969.163739
      IF HASFILTER THEN
        IF RecL.GET(RECORDID) THEN BEGIN
          RecL.COPY(Rec, ISTEMPORARY);
          RecL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
          RecL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
          RecL.SETRANGE("No.", "No.");
          IF NOT RecL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
            CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
            IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillClose, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              CurrPage.CLOSE;
            END ELSE BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillShowAnotherRecord, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              xRec := Rec;
              CurrPage.UPDATE;
            END;
            EXIT(TRUE);
          END;
        END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0162969.163739
    END;

    PROCEDURE MarkLine@1109400010(DocTypeP@1109400000 : Integer;DocNoP@1109400001 : Code[20];LineNoP@1109400002 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF LineG.GET(DocTypeP,DocNoP,LineNoP) THEN
        MarkedG := TRUE
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_IMS__@1101353000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableImporterTab@1101353001();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353000 : Record 79;
    BEGIN
      IF NOT CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN BEGIN
        "Dealer CodeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer ConfirmedEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer Confirmed DateEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer Confirmed TimeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer Confirmed User IDEnable" := FALSE;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_IMS__@17452300();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckMessageButtonEditable@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032665
      // Start PA038224
      // Start PA038224.48059
      EnableMessageG := "Message Notification" <> '';
      // Stop PA038224.48059
      // Stop PA038224
      // Stop PA032665
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400003();
    VAR
      UserSetupL@1109400000 : Record 91;
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA033011.5997953
      UserSetupL.GET(USERID);
      "Item Sales Price GroupEditable" := UserSetupL."Change Item Sales Price Group";
      ItemSalesPriceGroupEditableG := UserSetupL."Change Item Sales Price Group";
      // Stop PA033011.5997953
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE MessageSentVehiclesOnPush@19075412();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032665
      // Start PA038224
      CLEAR(MessageMgtG);
      MessageMgtG.ShowSentMessageDocument(MessageListG.Area::"Vehicle Sales","Document Type","No.");
      // Stop PA038224
      // Stop PA032665
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SetDocNoVisible@16439801();

      // Stop EU.0164398.164837
    END;

OBJECT Page 5025441 Vehicle Sales Order Subform
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=12/11/25;
    Time=[ 7:03:59 AM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Lines;
    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table37;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Order),
                          Order Type=FILTER('Vehicle Sales & Purchases'));
    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             AmountIncludingVATEditableG := TRUE;
             AmountEditableG := TRUE;
             UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
             "EU Tire Data CodeVisible" := TRUE;
             "EU Tire Data CodeEditable" := TRUE;
             // Start EU.0104306
             AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive();
             BothAmountFieldsVisibleG := TRUE;
             // Stop EU.0104306
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start PA032440
                 UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
                 // Stop PA032440
                 // Start PA033765
                 SalesReceivablesSetupG.GET();
                 // Start PA034527.19632
                 EUTireDataCodeVisibleG := SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation";
                 // Stop PA034527.19632
                 // Start PA035597
                 // Stop PA035597
                 // Stop PA033765
                 OnActivateForm;
                 // Start EU.0038938
                 VehicleSetupG.GET;
                 // Start EU.0112354
                 ParkingLotBayVisibleG := VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Sales" <> VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Sales"::" ";
                 // Stop EU.0112354
                 // Stop EU.0038938
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       RecRefL@1119427000 : RecordRef;
                       VehicleL@1109400000 : Record 5025400;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0104306
                       IF "Document No." <> SalesHdrG."No." THEN
                         IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
                           AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       // Start PA032178
                       // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                       LineWarningG := FALSE;
                       // Start PA032178
                       IF ("Item Type" = "Item Type":: Item) AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
                       // Stop PA032178
                         RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                         LineWarningG := RTCMgmtG.LineWarning(RecRefL);
                       END;
                       // Stop PA032178
                       // Start PA032440
                       HideUnitCostG := (UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item)) OR
                         (UserSetupG."Hide Vehicle Cost" AND
                         ("Item Type" IN ["Item Type"::Vehicle,"Item Type"::"Own Option","Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"]));
                       // Stop PA032440
                       // Start PA032820
                       CheckPricingControl();
                       // Stop PA032820
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                       OnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                       // Start PA038140
                       EnableCreatePurchaseOrderFromSales;
                       // Stop PA038140
                       // Start PA042665
                       EnableEmissionFieldsG := (VIN = '') AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle);
                       // Stop PA042665
                       // Start PA041687
                       IsVehicleDetailsVisibleG := "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle;
                       // Start EU.0141665.143994
                       StyleExprPropertyG := 'Standard';
                       // Stop EU.0141665.143994
                       IF LineWarningG THEN
                         StyleExprPropertyG := 'Attention';
                       // Start PA041187.91164
                       IF NOT VehicleL.GET(VIN) AND NOT LineWarningG AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle) AND (VIN <> '') THEN
                         StyleExprPropertyG := 'AttentionAccent';
                       // Stop PA041187.91164
                       // Stop PA041687
                       // Start EU.0141665.143994
                       IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::" " THEN
                         StyleExprPropertyG := 'Standard';
                       // Stop EU.0141665.143994
                       // Start EU.0055937
                       IsVehicleLineG := ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle);
                       // Stop EU.0055937
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  // Start PA032178
                  // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                  LineWarningG := FALSE;
                  // Stop PA032178
                  // Start PA041187.91164
                  // Start EU.0141665.143994
                  StyleExprPropertyG := 'Standard';
                  // Stop EU.0141665.143994
                  // Stop PA041187.91164
                  "Item Type" := xRec."Item Type";
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN BEGIN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Vehicle;
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  END;

                  IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";

                  Quantity := 1;
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases";
                  "Allow Invoice Disc." := FALSE;
                  IF (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::" ") THEN
                    Quantity := 0;
                  // Start PA032820
                  CheckPricingControl();
                  // Stop PA032820
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                  OnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA032440
                     HideUnitCostG := (UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item)) OR
                       (UserSetupG."Hide Vehicle Cost" AND
                       ("Item Type" IN ["Item Type"::Vehicle,"Item Type"::"Own Option","Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"]));
                     // Stop PA032440
                     // Start PA032820
                     CheckPricingControl();
                     // Stop PA032820
                   END;

    OnModifyRecord=BEGIN
                     // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                     // Start PA035597
                     CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                     // Stop PA035597
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=VAR
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL@1109400000 : Record 5025464;
                   BEGIN
                     // Start EU.0177226.179162
                     IF ("Quantity Shipped" <> 0) OR ("Quantity Invoiced" <> 0) THEN
                       ERROR(C_INC_ErrorConditionForQty, "Line No.");
                     // Stop EU.0177226.179162
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL.RESET;
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "Document No.");
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document Line No.", "Line No.");
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Separate Invoice for Line", TRUE);
                     VehicleOrderOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Avail. in Separate Posted Inv.",TRUE);
                     IF VehicleOrderOptionInvL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                       VehicleOrderOptionInvL.CALCFIELDS("Posted Own Invoice No.");
                       ERROR(C_INC011,"Line No.",VIN,VehicleOrderOptionInvL."Posted Own Invoice No.")
                     END ELSE BEGIN
                       VehicleOrderOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Avail. in Separate Posted Inv.");
                       IF VehicleOrderOptionInvL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
                         VehicleOrderOptionInvL.CALCFIELDS("Own Invoice No.");
                         IF VehicleOrderOptionInvL."Own Invoice No." <> '' THEN
                           ERROR(C_INC010, "Line No.", VIN, VehicleOrderOptionInvL."Own Invoice No.")
                         ELSE
                           ERROR(C_INC009, "Line No.", VIN);
                       END;
                     END;
                     // Start PA042761
                     UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
                     // Stop PA042761
                   END;

                      Description=EU.0055937;
                      Enabled=IsVehicleLineG;
                      Image=ProdBOMMatrixPerVersion;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 ItemL@1101103000 : Record 27;
                                 ModelL@1101103001 : Record 27;
                                 SalesLineL@1101103002 : Record 37;
                                 OwnOptionsListL@1101103003 : Page 5025495;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0055937
                                 IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
                                   EXIT;
                                 ItemL.RESET;
                                 IF ModelL.GET("No.") THEN BEGIN
                                   ItemL.FILTERGROUP(2);
                                   ItemL.SETCURRENTKEY("Item Type","Make Code","No.");
                                   ItemL.SETRANGE("Item Type", ModelL."Item Type"::"Own Option");
                                   ItemL.SETRANGE("Make Code", ModelL."Make Code");
                                   IF ModelL."Vehicle Category Code" <> '' THEN
                                     ItemL.SETFILTER("Vehicle Category Code", '%1|%2', ModelL."Vehicle Category Code", '');
                                   ItemL.SETFILTER("Model Code", '%1|%2', OwnOptionsListL.GetModelFilter(Rec), '');
                                   ItemL.FILTERGROUP(0);
                                   OwnOptionsListL.SETTABLEVIEW(ItemL);
                                 END;
                                 OwnOptionsListL.LOOKUPMODE(TRUE);

                                 IF OwnOptionsListL.RUNMODAL = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                                   OwnOptionsListL.SETSELECTIONFILTER(ItemL);
                                   IF ItemL.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
                                     REPEAT
                                       SalesLineL.INIT;
                                       SalesLineL."Document No." := "Document No.";
                                       SalesLineL."Document Type" := "Document Type";
                                       SalesLineL."Line No." := SalesLineL.GetNextLineNo();
                                       SalesLineL.Type := Type::Item;
                                       SalesLineL.SetValidateAvailableQty(TRUE);
                                       SalesLineL.VALIDATE("Item Type", SalesLineL."Item Type"::"Own Option");
                                       SalesLineL.VALIDATE("No.", ItemL."No.");
                                       SalesLineL.VALIDATE(Quantity, 1); // Set "Qty. to Ship" and "Qty. to Invoice"
                                       SalesLineL."Vehicle Line No." := "Line No.";
                                       SalesLineL.VALIDATE("Unit Price", ItemL."Unit Price");
                                       SalesLineL.VALIDATE(Amount);
                                       SalesLineL.INSERT(TRUE);
                                     UNTIL ItemL.NEXT = 0;
                                     UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
                                     CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                                   END;
                                 END;
                                 // Stop EU.0055937
                               END;
                                }

                                 TempVehicleSearchParamL."Session ID" := SESSIONID;

                                 TempVehicleSearchParamL."Vehicle Status" := TempVehicleSearchParamL."Vehicle Status"::All;
                                 TempVehicleSearchParamL."Availability Status" := TempVehicleSearchParamL."Vehicle Status"::All;
                                 VehicleSearchL.RunSearch(TempVehicleSearchParamL);
                                 VehSearchResultL.SETRANGE(VIN, VIN);
                                 // Start PA044486
                                 IF NOT VehSearchResultL.ISEMPTY THEN
                                 // Stop PA044486
                                   PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Vehicle Details", VehSearchResultL);
                                 // Stop PA041687
                               END;
                                }
      { 1109400024;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Technical Data;
                      Description=EU.0020651;
                      Image=ViewWorksheet;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 TechDataValueL@1109400000 : Record 5205856;
                               BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0020651
                                 TechDataValueL.OpenTechDataPage(Rec);
                                 // Stop EU.0020651
                               END;
                                }
      { 5       ;1   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Text Editor;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Text;
                      ToolTipML=ENU=Open a multiline text editor.;
                      Description=EU.0195242;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Edit;
                      PromotedOnly=Yes;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0195242

                                 // Stop EU.0195242
                               END;

    }

      C_INC_ErrorConditionForQty@17722600 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot delete line %1, because a shipped and/or invoiced quantity has been assigned to it.';

    PROCEDURE OpenPurchOrderForm@4();

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524200();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 37;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdateSalesDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@5(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.InsertSalesExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransfExtTextG.MakeUpdate() THEN
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowSalTradeIns@10();
    VAR
      VehicleTradeInL@1109400000 : Record 5025442;
    BEGIN
      IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        ERROR(C_INC001);
      // Start PA041187.90211
      IF "No." = '' THEN
        ERROR(C_INC_TradeIn);
      // Stop PA041187.90211
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "Document No.");
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Document Line No.", "Line No.");

    END;

    PROCEDURE StartTradeIn@19074670();
    VAR
      AddressLinkL@1109400000 : Record 5029112;
      PurchHeadL@1109400002 : Record 38;
      VehicleTradeInL@1109400003 : Record 5025442;
      CreateTradeInReportL@1109400004 : Report 5025451;
      VendCodeL@1109400001 : Code[20];
      NoOfTotalLinesL@1109400005 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ StartTradeIn - check and run Vehicle Trade in report
      IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        ERROR(C_INC001);

      IF "Quantity Invoiced" <> 0 THEN
        ERROR(C_INC002);
      // Start PA032636
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "Document No.");
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Document Line No.", "Line No.");
      IF VehicleTradeInL.ISEMPTY THEN
        ERROR(C_INC003);

      NoOfTotalLinesL := VehicleTradeInL.COUNT;
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE(VIN, '');
      IF NOT VehicleTradeInL.ISEMPTY THEN
        ERROR(C_INC004);
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE(VIN);
      VehicleTradeInL.SETFILTER("Posted Purch. Invoice No.", '<>%1', '');
      IF VehicleTradeInL.COUNT = NoOfTotalLinesL THEN
        ERROR(C_INC006);
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE("Posted Purch. Invoice No.");
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRANGE(Assigned, FALSE);
      IF VehicleTradeInL.ISEMPTY THEN
        ERROR(C_INC005);

      VehicleTradeInL.FINDFIRST;
      IF (VehicleTradeInL."Purch. Invoice No." <> '') AND (VehicleTradeInL."Posted Purch. Invoice No." = '') THEN BEGIN
        PurchHeadL.GET(PurchHeadL."Document Type"::Invoice, VehicleTradeInL."Purch. Invoice No.");
        VendCodeL := PurchHeadL."Buy-from Vendor No.";
      END;
      IF VendCodeL = '' THEN BEGIN
        CustG.GET(VehicleTradeInL."Customer No.");
        AddressLinkL.SETRANGE("Address No.", CustG."Address No.");
        AddressLinkL.SETRANGE(Type, AddressLinkL.Type::Vendor);
        IF AddressLinkL.FINDFIRST THEN
          VendCodeL := AddressLinkL."No.";
      END;

      CLEAR(CreateTradeInReportL);
      // Start PA041187.87656
      CreateTradeInReportL.SETTABLEVIEW(VehicleTradeInL);
      VehicleTradeInL.SETRECFILTER;
      // Stop PA041187.87656
      CreateTradeInReportL.SetTradeIn(PurchHeadL."No.", VendCodeL);
      // Start PA038476
      CreateTradeInReportL.SetStartingPoint(TRUE,FALSE,PurchHeadL."Document Type"::Invoice); //Starting Point is Sale, Sale is unposted, Document Type is Invoice
      // Stop PA038476
      // Start PA041187.87656
      // Stop PA041187.87656
      CreateTradeInReportL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA032636
    END;
