    PROCEDURE InsertLine@19();
    VAR
      VehicleAvailOnHandL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028660;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032178
      SalesLineTempG := Rec;
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        "No." := '';
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      "No." := SalesLineTempG."No.";

      IF (Quantity = 0) OR (Quantity = 1) THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          VehicleAvailOnHandL.CalculateSalesLine(Rec);
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN BEGIN
        VehicleUnitG.MakeSalLineOption(Rec);
        VehicleUnitG.MakeSalLineFromOption(Rec);
        SalesPriceCalculation();
        GetOptionPrice();
      END;
      FormUpdateG := CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      // Start PA035101.19477
      UpdateaAddtlItemQuantity();
      // Stop PA035101.19477

      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597

      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts
      // @ FormUpdate condition skipped in RTC as the record is not saved when only the Model No. is entered without a VIN.
      // @ Moreover the behaviour is different for Page Update in RTC.

      // Start PA035597
      MODIFY;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA032178
    END;

      IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN

    PROCEDURE DisplayInsurances@19079343();
    VAR
      VehicleInsurancePurchL@1109400000 : Record 5025499;
      VehicleInsuranceL@1109400001 : Record 5025430;
      FormVehicleInsurancePurchL@1109400002 : Page 5045480;
      FormVehicleInsuranceL@1109400003 : Page 5025460;
    BEGIN
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN BEGIN
        IF NOT VehicleG.GET(VIN) THEN BEGIN
          VehicleInsurancePurchL.RESET;
          VehicleInsurancePurchL.FILTERGROUP(2);
          VehicleInsurancePurchL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
          VehicleInsurancePurchL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
          VehicleInsurancePurchL.SETRANGE("Document Line","Line No.");
          VehicleInsurancePurchL.FILTERGROUP(0);
          FormVehicleInsurancePurchL.SETTABLEVIEW(VehicleInsurancePurchL);
          FormVehicleInsurancePurchL.RUNMODAL;
        END ELSE BEGIN
          VehicleInsuranceL.RESET;
          VehicleInsuranceL.FILTERGROUP(2);
          VehicleInsuranceL.SETRANGE(VIN,VIN);
          VehicleInsuranceL.FILTERGROUP(0);
          VehicleInsuranceL.SETCURRENTKEY("Vehicle Book No.","Line No.");
          VehicleInsuranceL.SETRANGE("Vehicle Book No.","Book No.");
          IF VehicleInsuranceL.FINDLAST THEN
            ;
          VehicleInsuranceL.SETRANGE("Vehicle Book No.");
          FormVehicleInsuranceL.SETTABLEVIEW(VehicleInsuranceL);
          FormVehicleInsuranceL.Def("Book No.");
          FormVehicleInsuranceL.RUNMODAL;
        END;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400006();
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA032636
      // Start EU.0104306
      CASE TRUE OF
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Item Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::"Account (G/L)") AND ("Labor No." > ''):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Labor Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Vehicle Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::"Own Option"):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Own Option Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Veh Transfer Unit Price";
        ELSE
          UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
      END;
      AmountEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        IF UnitPriceEditableG THEN
          IF GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() THEN
            IF SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic" = SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic"::"Amount + VAT" THEN
              AmountIncludingVATEditableG := FALSE
            ELSE
              AmountEditableG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      // Stop EU.0104306
      // Stop PA032636
    END;

    PROCEDURE DisplayVehicleCustomer@19054222();
    VAR
      VehicleCustL@1109400001 : Record 5025469;
      FormVehicleCustsL@1109400003 : Page 5025542;
    BEGIN
      // @ Opens the Vehicle Customer List
      IF ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle) AND (VIN <>'') THEN BEGIN

        VehicleCustL.FILTERGROUP(0);
        IF VehicleCustL.FINDLAST THEN
          ;
        FormVehicleCustsL.SETTABLEVIEW(VehicleCustL);
        FormVehicleCustsL.RUNMODAL;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE VehicleProfile@1100855255();

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterValidate@19066594();

      SalesHeaderL@1101286983 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      InsertLine();
      // Start PA033985.18807

        EXIT;

      // Stop PA033984

    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE VINOnAfterValidate@19046725();
    VAR
      ItemChargeL@1109400004 : Record 5805;
      VehUsageL@1109400001 : Record 5025470;
      VehicleOptionL@1109400005 : Record 5025422;
      SalesHeaderL@1101286983 : Record 36;
      SalesLineExtL@20395100 : Record 37;
      SalesLineL@1119427001 : Record 37;
      PurchLineL@1109400002 : Record 39;
      TransferExtendedTextL@19853700 : Codeunit 378;
      UnitCostL@1109400003 : Decimal;
      FoundVehTransferL@1109400006 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      SalesLineTempG := Rec;
      "No." := '';
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      GET("Document Type", "Document No.", "Line No.");
      "No." := SalesLineTempG."No.";
      COMMIT;
      VehUsageL.BuildDisplay("Document Type", "Document No.", VIN);
      VehicleOptionL.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN,"Copy-to Setting",Type);
      VehicleOptionL.SETRANGE(VIN,VIN);
      VehicleOptionL.SETRANGE("Copy-to Setting", VehicleOptionL."Copy-to Setting"::"To Own Doc. Line");
      VehicleOptionL.SETRANGE(Type, VehicleOptionL.Type::"Other Item");
      IF VehicleOptionL.FIND('-') THEN BEGIN
        SalesLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.",VIN);
        SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
        SalesLineL.SETRANGE(VIN,VIN);
        SalesLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type","Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer");
        IF NOT SalesLineL.FIND('-') THEN
          FoundVehTransferL := TRUE;
      END;
      IF ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle) AND (IsVINChangedG OR FoundVehTransferL) THEN BEGIN
        DeleteRelatedLines(FALSE);
        VehicleUnitG.MakeSalLineOption(Rec);
        VehicleUnitG.MakeSalLineFromOption(Rec);
        SalesPriceCalculation();
        IF ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle) AND Promotion THEN BEGIN
          IF ("Unit Price" <> 0) THEN
            VALIDATE("Amount Including VAT", "Promotion Price incl. VAT");
        END;
        GetOptionPrice();
        CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      END;
      IF "VAT Calculation Type" = "VAT Calculation Type"::"Differential Tax" THEN BEGIN
        PurchLineL.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN);
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE(VIN,VIN);
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type"::Order);
      // Start EU.0116400.118174
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Order Type", PurchLineL."Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type", PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Stop EU.0116400.118174
        IF PurchLineL.FIND('-') THEN BEGIN
          MESSAGE(C_INC013, VehicleG.TABLECAPTION, VIN, PurchLineL."Document No.", FORMAT("VAT Calculation Type"));
          UnitCostL := PurchLineL."Unit Cost (LCY)";
          ItemChargeL.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN,"Book No.");
          ItemChargeL.SETRANGE(VIN, PurchLineL.VIN);
          ItemChargeL.SETRANGE("Book No.", PurchLineL."Book No.");
        END ELSE BEGIN
          VehicleOptionL.GET(VIN,10000);
          UnitCostL := VehicleOptionL."Unit Cost";
          ItemChargeL.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN,"Book No.");
          ItemChargeL.SETRANGE(VIN, VIN);
          ItemChargeL.SETRANGE("Book No.","Book No.");
        END;
        IF ItemChargeL.FIND('-') THEN
          REPEAT
            UnitCostL := UnitCostL + ItemChargeL."Amount to Assign";
          UNTIL ItemChargeL.NEXT = 0;
        VALIDATE("Unit Cost (LCY)",UnitCostL);
      END;
      // Start PA033984
      // Start PA033985.18808
      IF ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle) AND IsVINChangedG THEN
        VehicleUnitG.InsertSalesDefaultTransFees(Rec,FALSE);
      // Start PA033985
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA033985.18808
        SalesHeaderL.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        SalesIncentiveMgmtG.UpdateSalesIncentivesSale(SalesHeaderL,Rec);
      END;
      // Stop PA033985
      // Stop PA033984
      // Start EU.0142312
      // Start EU.0035974
      CreateAutoOpportunity();
      // Stop EU.0035974
      // Stop EU.0142312
      // Start PA035597
      // Start EU.0198537.202023
      // Start EU.0203951.207523
      SalesLineExtL.RESET;
      SalesLineExtL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.",VIN);
      SalesLineExtL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      SalesLineExtL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
      SalesLineExtL.SETRANGE(VIN,VIN);
      SalesLineExtL.SETRANGE("Item Type","Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer");
      IF SalesLineExtL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          IF TransferExtendedTextL.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(SalesLineExtL, FALSE) THEN
             TransferExtendedTextL.InsertSalesExtText(SalesLineExtL);
        UNTIL SalesLineExtL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop  EU.0203951.207523
      // Stop EU.0198537.202023
      MODIFY;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop PA035597

      CheckPostingGroup();
      // Start EU.0037204
      UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
      // Stop EU.0037204
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnAfterGetCurrRecord@19077479();
    VAR
      ItemL@1101221267 : Record 27;
    BEGIN
      xRec := Rec;
      // Start PA033765
      EUTireDataCodeEditableG := FALSE;
      // Start PA034527.19632
      IF SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation" THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA034527.19632
        IF Type = Type::Item THEN BEGIN
          EUTireDataCodeEditableG := ItemL.GET("No.") AND ItemL."Tire Item";
        END;
      END;
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA033765
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnActivateForm@19002417();
    BEGIN
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") AND ("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" = '') THEN
        "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExpectedShippingWeekOnAfterInp@19053069(VAR Text@19053070 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      CollectionUnitG.EnterDateAsWeek(Text);
    END;

    PROCEDURE EnableCreatePurchaseOrderFromSales@1109400003();
    BEGIN
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        EnablePurchFromSalesG := TRUE
      ELSE
        EnablePurchFromSalesG := FALSE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE PurchaseOrderExists@1109400004();
    VAR
      PurchaseLineL@1109400000 : Record 39;
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks if the Purchase Order Exist for the current Sales Line
      PurchaseLineL.SETRANGE("From Sales Document Type","Document Type");
      PurchaseLineL.SETRANGE("From Sales Document No.","Document No.");
      PurchaseLineL.SETRANGE("From Sales Line No.","Line No.");
      IF PurchaseLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
        ERROR(C_INC_PurchaseLinkExist, "Document Type", "Document No.", "Line No.",
          PurchaseLineL."Document Type", PurchaseLineL."Document No.",PurchaseLineL."Line No.");
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenPurchaseOrder@1109400009();
    VAR
      PruchaseHeaderL@1109400004 : Record 38;
      PurchaseLineL@1109400001 : Record 39;
      PurchaseOrderPageL@1109400002 : Page 5025448;
      ArchivedPruchHeaderL@1109400005 : Record 5046908;
      ArchivedPurchLineL@1109400000 : Record 5046909;
      ArchivedPurchOrderPageL@1109400003 : Page 5046921;
    BEGIN
      // @ Opens a Purchase Order if it exist for the current Sales Line
      // Start PA040509
      PurchaseLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","From Purch. Document Type");
      PurchaseLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","From Purch. Document No.");
      PurchaseLineL.SETRANGE("Line No.","From Purch. Line No.");
      // Stop PA040509
      IF PurchaseLineL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        PruchaseHeaderL.SETRANGE("Document Type",PurchaseLineL."Document Type");
        PruchaseHeaderL.SETRANGE("No.",PurchaseLineL."Document No.");
        PurchaseOrderPageL.SETTABLEVIEW(PruchaseHeaderL);
        PurchaseOrderPageL.RUN;
      // Start PA040509
        EXIT;
      END;

      ArchivedPurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","From Purch. Document Type");
      ArchivedPurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","From Purch. Document No.");
      ArchivedPurchLineL.SETRANGE("Line No.","From Purch. Line No.");
      // Stop PA040509
      IF ArchivedPurchLineL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        ArchivedPruchHeaderL.SETRANGE("Document Type",ArchivedPurchLineL."Document Type");
        ArchivedPruchHeaderL.SETRANGE("No.",ArchivedPurchLineL."Document No.");
        ArchivedPurchOrderPageL.SETTABLEVIEW(ArchivedPruchHeaderL);
        ArchivedPurchOrderPageL.RUN;
      // Start PA040509
        EXIT;
      // Stop PA040509
      END;
      // Start PA040509
      ERROR(C_INC_PurchaseLinkNotExist);
      // Stop PA040509
    END;

    PROCEDURE RunVehicleSearch@1109400005();
    VAR
      ModVehOfInterestL@1109400001 : Record 5207809;
      VehicleSearchL@1109400000 : Page 5205930;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function provides start of the Multicompany Vehicle Search with selected parameters.

      // Start PA040026
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        VehicleSearchL.InsertSalesLineFilters(Rec);

      // Start PA040025
      VehicleSearchL.SetSalesDocumentCaller();
      // Stop PA040025
      VehicleSearchL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA040026
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesTotalFactbox@1000000002();
    BEGIN
      // @ This function refreshes the Sales Total Factbox.
      // Start PA042761
      CurrPage.UPDATE; // <-- Refresh of Sales line for line based fact box
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type", "Document No.") THEN
        SalesHdrG.MODIFY; // <-- Refresh of Sales Header for header based fact box
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectedRecords@1109400000(VAR TempRecP@1000 : TEMPORARY Record 37);
    VAR
      SalesLineL@1001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function provides a temporal set of records based on the selected records on the page
      // @ param TempRecP : temporary record based on Sales Line
      // Start EU.0000369
      // Start EU.0090125
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(SalesLineL);
      IF SalesLineL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          TempRecP := SalesLineL;
          TempRecP.INSERT;
        UNTIL SalesLineL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop EU.0090125
      // Stop EU.0000369
    END;

OBJECT Page 5025449 Vehicle Purchase Order Subf
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=04/24/25;
    Time=[ 2:14:39 PM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Lines;
    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table39;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Order),
                          Order Type=FILTER('Vehicle Sales & Purchases'));
    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    RefreshOnActivate=Yes;
    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start EU.0038938
                 VehicleSetupG.GET;
                 // Start EU.0112354
                 ParkingLotBayVisibleG := VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Purchase" <> VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Purchase"::" ";
                 // Stop EU.0112354
                 ParkingLotEnableG := "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle;
                 // Stop EU.0038938
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                       // Start PA042665
                       EnableEmissionFieldsG := (VIN = '') AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle);
                       // Stop PA042665
                       // Start PA041687
                       IsVehicleDetailsVisibleG := "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle;
                       // Stop PA041687
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  "Item Type" := xRec."Item Type";
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN BEGIN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Vehicle;
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  END;
                  IF PurchHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN BEGIN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := PurchHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                    "Location Code" := PurchHdrG."Location Code";
                  END;
                  Quantity := 1;
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases";
                  "Allow Invoice Disc." := FALSE;
                  IF (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::" ") THEN
                    Quantity := 0;
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                END;

    OnModifyRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA034250
                     ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnModify,ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post,'');
                     // Stop PA034250
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042761
                     UpdatePurchLineTotalFactbox();
                     // Stop PA042761
                   END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=BEGIN
                           // Start EU.0038938
                           ParkingLotEnableG := ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle) AND ("Quantity Received" = 0);
                           IF ParkingLotG.GET("Parking Lot") THEN
                             ParkingBayEnableG := ParkingLotG."Enable Parking Bay" AND ParkingLotEnableG;
                           // Stop EU.0038938
                         END;

    VAR
      VehicleSetupG@3893806 : Record 5025401;

      C_INC003@1101341136 : TextConst 'ENU="There is no %1 record with %2 = %3!"';

      C_INC_VehicleOnly@1109400013 : TextConst 'ENU=A new request can only be created for vehicles and models!';

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EXITPOINT__@4();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPointCall@5025380(MakeCoddeP@1109400003 : Code[20];TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50];VAR EPRecRefP@1109400005 : RecordRef) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      EXIT(ExitPointUnitG.RunExitPoint(
        ExitPointSetupG."Object Type"::Page,
        PAGE::"Vehicle Purchase Order Subf",
        MakeCoddeP, TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefP, EPRecRef2G, ExitPointParamG));
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPoint@5025450(TriggerP@1119452001 : Integer;TypeP@1119432000 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1119432001 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(xRec);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE VehicleExitPoint@1101342660(VAR VehicleP@1101342643 : Record 5025400;TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(VehicleP);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall(VehicleP."Make Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(VehicleP);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EXITPOINT__@5025451();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenSalesOrderPage@5();
    VAR

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524201();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 39;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdatePurchaseDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@6(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.PurchCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.InsertPurchExtText(Rec);
      END;
      // Start PA035597
      IF TransfExtTextG.MakeUpdate() THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
      // Stop PA035597
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowVehicle@12();
    VAR
      VehiclePurchL@1109400000 : Record 5025446;
      VehiclePurchPageL@1109400001 : Page 5025497;
    BEGIN
      IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        ERROR(C_INC001);

      CLEAR(VehiclePurchPageL);
      VehiclePurchL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      VehiclePurchL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
      VehiclePurchL.SETRANGE("Document Line No.","Line No.");

      VehiclePurchPageL.SETTABLEVIEW(VehiclePurchL);
      IF "Quantity Received" = 1 THEN
        VehiclePurchPageL.EDITABLE := FALSE;
      VehiclePurchPageL.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@13();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032178
      PurchLineTempG := Rec;
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        "No." := '';
      // Start PA032651.5992741
      // Stop PA032651.5992741
      // Start PA032542.5879513
      IF NOT SkipSaveRecordG THEN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      // Stop PA032542.5879513

      "No." := PurchLineTempG."No.";
      IF (Quantity = 0)  OR  (Quantity = 1) THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          PageUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN BEGIN
        VehicleUnitG.MakePurchOptionLines(Rec);
        VehicleUnitG.MakePurchVehicleLines(Rec);
        VehicleUnitG.MakePurchLinesFromOption(Rec);
        GetOptionPrice();
      END;
      PageUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        PageUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts
      // @ PageUpdate condition skipped in RTC as the record is not saved when only the Model No. is entered without a VIN.
      // @ Moreover the behaviour is different for Page Update in RTC.

      // Start PA035597
      MODIFY;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA032178
    END;

    PROCEDURE Def@14(PurchLineP@1109400000 : Record 39);
    BEGIN
      Rec := PurchLineP;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowPurchProtectedCode@1109400000();
    BEGIN
      PurchProtectedVehCodeShow;
    END;

    PROCEDURE VehicleProfile@1100855255();
    VAR
      VehicleL@1100855256 : Record 5025400;
      VehProfileMgmtL@1100855255 : Codeunit 5205903;
      RecordrefL@1109400000 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ Shows Vehcile Profile Questionnaire Card
      // Start PA036841
      IF VIN = '' THEN
        EXIT;
      IF NOT VehicleL.GET(VIN) THEN BEGIN
        MESSAGE(STRSUBSTNO(C_INC003, VehicleL.TABLECAPTION, VehicleL.FIELDNAME(VIN), VIN));
        EXIT;
      END;
      // Start PA036841.31328
      // Start PA044254
      RecordrefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      VehProfileMgmtL.ShowProfileQuestionnaireCard(VehicleL, '', 0, RecordrefL);
      // Stop PA044254
      // Stop PA036841.31328
      // Stop PA036841
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterValidate@19066594();
    VAR
      PurchHeaderL@1101286983 : Record 38;
    BEGIN
      InsertLine();
      // Start PA033985.18807
      IF "Item Type" <> "Item Type"::Vehicle THEN
        EXIT;
      PurchHeaderL.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
      SalesIncentiveMgmtG.UpdateSalesIncentivesPurch(PurchHeaderL,Rec);

      // Start PA033984
      IF "No." <> xRec."No." THEN
        VehicleUnitG.InsertPurchaseDefaultTransFees(Rec,FALSE);
      // Stop PA033984
      // Start PA033985.18807
    END;

OBJECT Page 5025649 Service Order
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=11/10/25;
    Time=[ 2:44:50 PM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Service Order;
    Description=PA032795;
    SaveValues=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table5025624;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=CONST(Order));
    PageType=Document;
    RefreshOnActivate=Yes;
    PromotedActionCategoriesML=ENU=New,Process,Print,Reserve,Posting,Order,Documents,Vehicle,Customer,Item,Shopping Cart;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             // Start EU.0104306
             ShowEnhancedVATCalcLogicFieldG := GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() AND
               (GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display VAT Calculation Logic" = GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display VAT Calculation Logic"::"Show Field in Documents");
             // Stop EU.0104306
             // Start PA038224.48059
             // Stop PA038224.48059
             LaborChargingCodeEditableG := TRUE;
             ItemSalesPriceGroupEditableG := TRUE;
             ResTimeSplitTypeEditableG := TRUE;
             UpdateLaborTimeEditableG := TRUE;
             TotalAmountAccEnableG := TRUE;
             TotalAmountRequEnableG := TRUE;
             NoOfWarrLinesincorrEnableG := TRUE;
             NoOfWarrClaimsexpectedEnableG := TRUE;
             WarrantyStatusCodeEnableG := TRUE;
             // Start EU.0021021
             ServSetupG.GET;
             // Start EU.0090163
             // Stop EU.0090163
             // Stop EU.0021021
             // Start PA038218.45493
             TimeClockVisibleFlagG := TRUE;
             // Stop PA038218.45493
             // Start PA041510
             ReserveAllG := TRUE;
             // Stop PA041510
             // Start EU.0032453
             UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
             ShoppingCartActionsVisibleG := UserSetupG."Allow Shopping Carts";
             ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG := UserSetupG."Last Shopping Cart No." <> '';
             // Start EU.0000485
             EnableCreateCaseG := UserSetupG."Allow Case Creation";
             // Stop EU.0000485
             VisibleCreateCaseG := EnableCreateCaseG;
             // Stop EU.0032453
             // Start EU.0071195
             TireHotelDetailsVisibleG := UserSessionG.TireHotelLicensePermissionCheck();
             // Stop EU.0071195
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start EU.0032453
                 IF ShoppingCartMgtG.GetCurrentCartHeader(UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG) THEN
                   CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
                 CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetServiceHeader(Rec);
                 // Stop EU.0032453
                 IF DefExecutedG THEN BEGIN
                   CurrPage.ServLines.PAGE.StartDisplayInLine(DefaultDocNoG, DefaultLineNoG);
                   DefExecutedG := FALSE;
                 END;
                 // Start PA032877
                 // Stop PA032877
                 // Start PA030522
                 IF MarkedG THEN
                   CurrPage.ServLines.PAGE.MarkLine(LineG."Document Type", LineG."Document No.", LineG."Line No.");
                 // Stop PA030522
                 // Start PA028431
                 CheckLedgerEntry("No.");
                 // Stop PA028431
                 // Start PA032178.1096144
                 // Stop PA032178.1096144
                 // Start PA032820
                 CheckPricingControl();
                 // Stop PA032820
                 // Start PA038456.44408
                 RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                 UserSessionG.SetMake("Make Code", RecRefG);
                 // Stop PA038456.44408
                 // Start EU.0032453
                 // Stop EU.0032453
                 // Start EU.0000369
                 EnableReserveG := ReservMgtG.CheckAllowReserveForService("Document Type", FALSE);
                 // Stop EU.0000369
                 // Start EU.0164398.164837
                 SetDocNoVisible();
                 // Start EU.0164398.164837
               END;

    OnClosePage=BEGIN
                  // Start PA034055
                  ExitPoint(ExitPointSetupG.Trigger::OnClosePage, ExitPointSetupG.Type::Post, '');
                  // Stop PA034055
                END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0032453
                       CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetServiceHeader(Rec);
                       // Stop EU.0032453
                       // Stop PA031526
                       // Start PA028431
                       CheckLedgerEntry("No.");
                       // Stop PA028431
                       // Start PA029956
                       WarrantyStatusCodeEnableG := FALSE;
                       NoOfWarrClaimsexpectedEnableG := FALSE;
                       NoOfWarrLinesincorrEnableG := FALSE;
                       TotalAmountRequEnableG := FALSE;
                       TotalAmountAccEnableG := FALSE;

                       MakeG.RESET;
                       IF MakeG.GET("Make Code") AND (MakeG."Warranty Claim Process" = MakeG."Warranty Claim Process"::"Open Order") THEN BEGIN
                         WarrantyStatusCodeEnableG := TRUE;
                         NoOfWarrClaimsexpectedEnableG := TRUE;
                         NoOfWarrLinesincorrEnableG := TRUE;
                         TotalAmountRequEnableG := TRUE;
                         TotalAmountAccEnableG := TRUE;
                       END;
                       // Stop PA029956
                       // Start PA038456.44408
                       RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                       UserSessionG.SetMake("Make Code", RecRefG);
                       CurrPage.SpecialFunctionPage.PAGE.Refresh("Make Code");
                       // Stop PA038456.44408

                       // Start PA029769
                       // Start PA038224.48059
                       // Stop PA038224.48059
                       // Stop PA029769
                       // Start PA034291
                       // Start PA041187.92397
                       CalculatePrepaymentAmounts(TotalPrpmtInvG, TotalPrpmtOpenG, TotalAmtInclVATandSurchargeG);
                       // Stop PA041187.92397
                       CalcNoOfOpenPrepmtInvoices(NoOfUnpostedPrepmtG);
                       // Stop PA034291
                       // Start EU.0085925
                       // Start EU.0129713.131718
                       CALCFIELDS("Total Scheduled Capacity", "Includes Repeat Repair");
                       // Stop EU.0129713.131718
                       // Start EU.0090163
                       // Stop EU.0090163
                       // Stop EU.0085925
                       // Start EU.0090163
                       // Stop EU.0090163
                       // Start EU.0106426.106711
                       // Stop EU.0106426.106711
                       // Start EU.0113943.113513
                       CLEAR(TotalScheduledCapacityG);
                       TotalScheduledCapacityG := -"Total Scheduled Capacity";
                       // Stop EU.0113943.113513
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  // Start EU.0106426.106711
                  // Stop EU.0106426.106711
                  // Start EU.0005636
                  EnableReserveG := ReservMgtG.CheckAllowReserveForService("Document Type", FALSE);
                  // Stop EU.00005636
                END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA036461.27600
                     // Stop PA036461.27600
                     ServMgtG.ServDocumentWarnings(Rec, TRUE, FALSE);

                     CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
                     // Start PA034291.I002224
                     PrepmtMgtG.CheckUnpostedServOrderExist("No.", FALSE);
                     // Stop PA034291.I002224
                     // Start EU.0131510
                     // Start PA035117
                     // Stop PA035117
                     // Stop EU.0131510
                     // Start EU.0136685.136811
                     IF ConfirmDeletion THEN
                       EXIT(TRUE);
                     // Stop EU.0136685.136811
                     EXIT(FALSE);
                   END;

    OnQueryClosePage=VAR
                       RecL@1101257463 : Record 5025624;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start PA035302
                       // Start PA035302.21320

                         EXIT;

                       // Stop PA035302
                     END;

                                 CurrPage.ServLines.PAGE.Refresh(FALSE);                              //Update needed, but only for lines and without saving

                               // Needed, because OnAfterValidate is not triggered from here
                               // Start PA036461.27600
                                 OpenServiceRemarksWindow();

                             END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EXITPOINT__@4();
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPointCall@5025380(MakeCoddeP@1109400003 : Code[20];TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50];VAR EPRecRefP@1109400005 : RecordRef) : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      EXIT(ExitPointUnitG.RunExitPoint(
        ExitPointSetupG."Object Type"::Page,
        PAGE::"Service Order",
        MakeCoddeP, TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefP, EPRecRef2G, ExitPointParamG));
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ExitPoint@5025450(TriggerP@1119452001 : Integer;TypeP@1119432000 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1119432001 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      EPRecRef2G.GETTABLE(xRec);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall("Make Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE VehicleExitPoint@1101342660(VAR VehicleP@1101342643 : Record 5025400;TriggerP@1109400002 : Integer;TypeP@1109400001 : Integer;ExitPointIDP@1109400000 : Text[50]) ReturnR : Boolean;
    VAR
      EPRecRefL@1109400004 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ This local function works as ExitPoint wrapper function. It will control the ExitPointCheck function call.
      // @ It passes thru all the handshake parameter values.
      // @ It takes care to provide the processing records as RecordReference to the ExitPointCheck function.
      // @ When possible a Make Code is also identified and passed to the called ExitPointCheck function.

      // Start PA036544
      EPRecRefL.GETTABLE(VehicleP);
      ReturnR := ExitPointCall(VehicleP."Make Code", TriggerP, TypeP, ExitPointIDP, EPRecRefL);
      EPRecRefL.SETTABLE(VehicleP);
      CLEAR(EPRecRef2G);
      // Stop PA036544
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EXITPOINT__@5025451();
    BEGIN
    END;

    PROCEDURE RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters@88000() RecordChangedR : Boolean;
    VAR
      RecL@88001 : Record 5025624;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0162969.163739
      IF HASFILTER THEN
        IF RecL.GET(RECORDID) THEN BEGIN
          RecL.COPY(Rec, ISTEMPORARY);
          RecL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
          RecL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
          RecL.SETRANGE("No.", "No.");
          IF NOT RecL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
            CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
            IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillClose, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              CurrPage.CLOSE;
            END ELSE BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillShowAnotherRecord, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              xRec := Rec;
              CurrPage.UPDATE;
            END;
            EXIT(TRUE);
          END;
        END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0162969.163739
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AddItemToCurrentShoppingCartOnAction@3245301();
    VAR
      RecL@3245302 : TEMPORARY Record 5025625;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032453
      CurrPage.ServLines.PAGE.GetSelectedRecords(RecL);
      ShoppingCartMgtG.AddServiceLinesToShoppingCart(RecL, UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG, "Bill-to Customer No.");
      CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CreateNewShoppingCartOnAction@3245302();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032453
      IF NOT ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG THEN
        ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG := TRUE;
      ShoppingCartMgtG.CreateNewShoppingCartHdr(UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG, "Bill-to Customer No.", VIN);
      CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OpenServiceRemarksWindow@1109400000();
    VAR
      ServiceJobLineL@19176600 : Record 5025627;
      JobCountL@19176601 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // @ Saves current record and displays remarks window.
      // Start PA036461.27600
      MODIFY(TRUE);
      // Start EU.0065317
      COMMIT;
      // Stop EU.0065317
      // Start EU.0191766
      ServiceJobLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
      ServiceJobLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.", "No.");
      JobCountL := ServiceJobLineL.COUNT;
      IF DisplayRemarksWindow() THEN
        GET("Document Type", "No.");
      IF JobCountL <> ServiceJobLineL.COUNT THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0191766
      RemarksCountG := ServRemarksG.CountRemarks(Rec);
      // Stop PA036461.27600
    END;

    PROCEDURE NoOfServiceRemarksOnDrillDown@1119432001();
    BEGIN
      // @ Start of the the Service Remarks page
      // Start PA032589
      // Start PA036549.33031
      CLEAR(ServRemarksG);
      // Stop PA036549.33031
      ServRemarksG.ShowRemarks(Rec);
      ServRemarksG.RUNMODAL;
      RemarksCountG := ServRemarksG.CountRemarks(Rec);
      // Start PA036461.27600
      // Stop PA036461.27600
      // Stop PA032589
    END;

    PROCEDURE DefStartDisplayInLine@5025351(NewNoP@1109400000 : Code[20];NewLineNoP@1109400001 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      DefaultLineNoG := NewLineNoP;
      DefaultDocNoG := NewNoP;
      DefExecutedG := TRUE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE MarkLine@1109400010(DocTypeP@1109400000 : Integer;DocNoP@1109400001 : Code[20];LineNoP@1109400002 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA030522
      IF LineG.GET(DocTypeP, DocNoP, LineNoP) THEN
        MarkedG := TRUE;
      // Stop PA030522
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckLedgerEntry@1109400002(OrderNoP@1109400000 : Code[20]);
    VAR
      TimeClockEntryL@1109400005 : Record 5208401;
      ServLedgEntryL@1109400002 : Record 5025620;
      TimeClockEntriesFoundL@1109400001 : Boolean;
      ServLedgFoundL@1109400004 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA028431
      // Start PA032861
      TimeClockEntriesFoundL := FALSE;
      // Stop PA032861
      ServLedgFoundL := FALSE;

      // Start PA032861
      TimeClockEntryL.RESET;
      TimeClockEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Service Order No.", Date, Time);
      TimeClockEntryL.SETRANGE("Service Order No.", OrderNoP);
      TimeClockEntryL.SETRANGE("Labor Standard Time Type", TimeClockEntryL."Labor Standard Time Type"::"No Reference");
      TimeClockEntryL.SETFILTER("Linked to Entry No.", '<>%1', 0);
      IF NOT TimeClockEntryL.ISEMPTY THEN
        TimeClockEntriesFoundL := TRUE;
      // Stop PA032861

      ServLedgEntryL.RESET;
      ServLedgEntryL.SETCURRENTKEY("Order No.", Type, "Entry Type");
      ServLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Order No.", OrderNoP);
      ServLedgEntryL.SETRANGE(Type, ServLedgEntryL.Type::Resource);
      ServLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Entry Type", ServLedgEntryL."Entry Type"::Usage);
      ServLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Resource Type", ServLedgEntryL."Resource Type"::Person);
      ServLedgEntryL.SETRANGE("Labor Standard Time Type", ServLedgEntryL."Labor Standard Time Type"::"No Reference");
      IF NOT ServLedgEntryL.ISEMPTY THEN
        ServLedgFoundL := TRUE;

      // Start PA032861
      IF TimeClockEntriesFoundL OR ServLedgFoundL THEN
      // Stop PA032861
        UpdateLaborTimeEditableG := FALSE
      ELSE
        UpdateLaborTimeEditableG := TRUE;
      // Stop PA028431
      // Start PA034057
      IF TimeClockEntriesFoundL OR ServLedgFoundL THEN
        ResTimeSplitTypeEditableG := FALSE
      ELSE
        ResTimeSplitTypeEditableG := TRUE;
      // Stop PA034057
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckMessageButtonEditable@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032665
      // Start PA038224.48059
      EnableMessageG := "Message Notification" <> '';
      // Stop PA038224.48059
      // Stop PA032665
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400003();
    VAR
      UserSetupL@1109400000 : Record 91;
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA032820
      UserSetupL.GET(USERID);
      ItemSalesPriceGroupEditableG := UserSetupL."Change Item Sales Price Group";
      // Start EU.0042002
      LaborChargingCodeEditableG := UserSetupL."Change Labor Charging Code";
      // Stop EU.0042002
      // Stop PA032820
    END;

      // Stop PA033978.I000905
    END;

{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=05/23/25;
    Time=11:12:47 AM;
    Version List=N.7.2.1;

  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Lines;
    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table5025625;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Order));
    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             AmountIncludingVATEditableG := TRUE;
             AmountEditableG := TRUE;
             UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
             // Start EU.0104306
             AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive();
             BothAmountFieldsVisibleG := GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display One or Both Amounts" = GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display One or Both Amounts"::"Both Fields ('Amount' and 'Amount incl. VAT')";
             // Stop EU.0104306
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start PA032440
                 UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
                 // Stop PA032440
                 // Start PA033765
                 SalesReceivablesSetupG.GET();
                 // Start PA034527.19632
                 EUTireDataCodeVisibleG := SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation";
                 // Stop PA034527.19632
                 // Start PA035597
                 // Stop PA035597
                 // Stop PA033765
                 "Find No." := TRUE;
                 // Start EU.0089938
                 UserSessionUnitG.SetKeyValue('IsCalledFromServOrdPage', TRUE);
                 // Stop EU.0089938
                 // Start EU.0115012
                 EnableWSAG := UserSessionUnitG.GetWSAProfileEnable;
                 // Stop EU.0115012
               END;

    OnClosePage=BEGIN
                  // Start EU.0089938
                  UserSessionUnitG.SetKeyValue('IsCalledFromServOrdPage', FALSE);
                  // Stop EU.0089938
                END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       RecRefL@1119427000 : RecordRef;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0104306
                       // Start EU.0124901.125228
                       IF ("Document No." <> ServHdrG."No.") OR ("Line No." = 10000) THEN
                       // Stop EU.0124901.125228
                         IF ServHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
                           AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(ServHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       // Start PA041510
                       // Start EU.0044955.50192
                       IF "No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                       // Stop EU.0044955.50192
                         RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                         ReservationSetupG.ApplyAvailabilityStatus(RecRefL);
                         RecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
                       // Start EU.0044955.50192
                       END;
                       // Stop EU.0044955.50192
                       // Stop PA041510
                       LookUpNoG := '';
                       "Find No." := TRUE;
                       // Start PA042806
                       // Stop PA036313
                       // Stop PA032440
                       // Start PA032820
                       // Stop PA032820
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                       // Start PA042806
                       PageOnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                       // Stop PA042806
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  CLEAR(InvtAvailableG);
                  // Start EU.0111610.113539
                  ExpectedQtyOnHandG := 0;
                  // Stop EU.0111610.113539
                  // Start PA041510
                  // Stop PA041510

                  LookUpNoG := '';
                  "Find No." := TRUE;
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  IF NOT xRec.ISEMPTY THEN
                    "Service Job No." := xRec."Service Job No.";
                  // Start PA033019.9267011
                  // Start EU.0052165
                  IF "Service Job No." > 0 THEN
                    "Fair Deal" := xRec."Fair Deal";
                  // Stop EU.0052165
                  // Stop PA033019.9267011
                  // Start PA032820
                  // Start PA042806
                  // Stop PA042806
                  // Stop PA032820
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                  // Start PA038447
                  CASE UserSetupG."Service Line Type" OF
                    UserSetupG."Service Line Type"::" ":
                      Type := Type::" ";
                    UserSetupG."Service Line Type"::"G/L Account":
                      Type := Type::"G/L Account";
                    UserSetupG."Service Line Type"::Item:
                      Type := Type::Item;
                    UserSetupG."Service Line Type"::Labor:
                      Type := Type::Labor;
                    UserSetupG."Service Line Type"::"Ext. Service":
                      Type := Type::"Ext. Service";
                  END;
                  // Stop PA038447
                  // Start PA042806
                  PageOnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                  // Stop PA042806
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042806
                     // Start PA034007.I000152
                     // Stop PA034007.I000152
                     // Start PA032440
                     // Stop PA032440
                     // Start PA032820
                     PageOnAfterGetCurrRecord();
                     // Stop PA042806
                     // Stop PA032820
                     // Start PA041326
                     CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                     // Stop PA041326
                   END;

    OnModifyRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042806
                     // Stop PA042806
                     IF ("Serv. Contract Type" = xRec."Serv. Contract Type") AND ("Bill-to Customer No." <> xRec."Bill-to Customer No.") THEN
                     // Start PA034007.I000152
                       IF NOT GetServContractFromServJobLine() THEN
                     // Stop PA034007.I000152
                         ShowServContract();

                     // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                     // Start PA035597
                     CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                     // Stop PA035597
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start EU.0027741
                     ServMgtG.ServLineDeleteDialog(Rec);
                     // Stop EU.0027741
                   END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=BEGIN
                           // Start PA042806
                           PageOnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                           // Stop PA042806
                         END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS

                             END;

    PROCEDURE ResetHdrRec@10430600();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0104306
      // Start EU.0124901.125228
      IF ServHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
        AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(ServHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
      // Stop EU.0124901.125228
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400006();
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      // Start EU.0104306
      CASE TRUE OF
        Type = Type::Item:
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Item Unit Price";
        Type = Type::Labor:
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Labor Unit Price";
        Type = Type::"Ext. Service":
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Ext. Service Unit Price";
        ELSE
          UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      END;
      AmountEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      IF UnitPriceEditableG THEN
        IF GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() THEN
          IF ServHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic" = ServHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic"::"Amount + VAT" THEN
            AmountIncludingVATEditableG := FALSE
          ELSE
            AmountEditableG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524201();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 5025625;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdateServiceDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@4(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.ServCheckIfExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.ServInsertExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransfExtTextG.Update THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE := TRUE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowCustomers@10();
    VAR
      ServHdrL@1109400001 : Record 5025624;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA034249
      // Start EU.0052165
      // Stop EU.0052165
      ServHdrL.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
      SrvCustSplitMgtG.EditServLineCust_User(ServHdrL,Rec);
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);  //<- must!; otherwise OnModify trigger of Page runs again -> big issue in case of own price!
      // Stop PA034249
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenPurchOrder@8();
    BEGIN
      PurchLineG.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Service Order No.","Service Order Line No.");
      PurchLineG.SETRANGE("Document Type",PurchLineG."Document Type"::Order);
      PurchLineG.SETRANGE("Service Order No.","Document No.");
      PurchLineG.SETRANGE("Service Order Line No.","Line No.");
      PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, PurchLineG);
    END;

    PROCEDURE SelectAssocPackage@9();
    BEGIN
      IF SelectServPkgG.ValidPkgVersExist(Rec) THEN BEGIN
      // This CurrForm.SAVERECORD is avoided in RTC because this is already done in CreateServiceLine() fn which is always executed.
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
        IF SelectServPkgG.SelectPackageVers(Rec) THEN BEGIN
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
          ServPkgProceedG := TRUE;
        END;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CreateServiceLine@1();
    BEGIN
      // This function creates the service line with the number pulled from the AssisEdit.
      // It is necessary in order to also create the service customer line.
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      IF (Type = Type::" ") AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
        VALIDATE("Service Job No.");
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      IF CreatedRelatedLines(Rec) THEN
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      IF Type = Type::Labor THEN
        SelectAssocPackage();
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDocumentLineTracking@3();
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(DocLineTrackingG);
      DocLineTrackingG.SetDoc(2, "Document No.", "Line No.");
      DocLineTrackingG.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@13();

    END;

    PROCEDURE StartDisplayInLine@5025351(NewDocNumberP@1109400000 : Code[20];NewLineNumberP@1109400001 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF FINDSET THEN
        ;
      IF GET("Document Type"::Order,NewDocNumberP,NewLineNumberP) THEN
        xRec.GET("Document Type"::Order,NewDocNumberP,NewLineNumberP);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@14();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0156444.155083
      IF "No." > '' THEN
        CheckForLineDuplicates();
      // Stop EU.0156444.155083
      // Start PA032178.1446608
      // Start PA041146.68559
      CLEAR(InvtAvailableG);
      // Stop PA041146.68559
      FormUpdateG := FALSE;
      ServPkgProceedG := FALSE;
      CreateServiceLine();
      // Start PA034057
      // Start EU.0090167.97078
      // Stop EU.0090167.97078
      // Start PA036950
      IF UserSessionUnitG.TimeManLicensePermissionCheck(FALSE) AND ("Resource No." <> '') THEN
      // Stop PA036950
      // Start EU.0090167.97078
        CALCFIELDS("No. of Resources");
      // Stop EU.0090167.97078
        IF "No. of Resources" > 0 THEN
          ServResourceMgtG.AlignServLine2ServResAssign(Rec);
      // Set default Resource No. from Job Line or Clocking Entries
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("Line No." <> 0) THEN
        SetDefaultResourceNo();
      // Stop PA034057
      IF (Quantity = 0) OR (Quantity = 1) THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"G/L Account", Type::"Ext. Service"] THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA041776.70856
      // Stop PA041776.70856
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
      // Start EU.0104306
        END;
      // Start PA042806
      IF "Service Job No." > 0 THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        ServiceJobNoOnValidate(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0104306
      // Stop PA042806
      IF Type = Type::Labor THEN
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      // Start PA035597
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA035597
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts

      // Start PA035597
      IF FormUpdateG THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
      END;
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA032178.1446608
      // Start PA041495.69914
      UpdateServiceTotalFactbox();
      // Stop PA041495.69914
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenPurchOrderForm@15(ServHdrP@1109400000 : Record 5025624);
    VAR
      PurchLinesL@1109400001 : Record 39;
      PurchOrderVehL@1109400002 : Page 518;
    BEGIN
      PurchLinesL.SETRANGE("Document Type",ServHdrP."Purch. Document Type");
      PurchLinesL.SETRANGE("Document No.",ServHdrP."Purch. Document No.");
      PurchLinesL.SETRANGE("Line No.",ServHdrP."Purch. Document Line No.");
      PurchOrderVehL.SETTABLEVIEW(PurchLinesL);
      PurchOrderVehL.EDITABLE := FALSE;
      PurchOrderVehL.RUN;
    END;

    PROCEDURE MarkLine@1109400010(DocTypeP@1109400002 : Integer;DocNoP@1109400001 : Code[20];LineNoP@1109400000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF GET(DocTypeP,DocNoP,LineNoP) THEN BEGIN
        MARK := TRUE;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
    END;

      // Stop PA032473
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowServContract@1117900000();
    VAR
      VehServContractL@1117900002 : Record 5061005;
      VehicleL@1117900001 : Record 5025400;
      ServHdrL@1117900000 : Record 5025624;
    BEGIN
      ServHdrL.GET("Document Type", "Document No.");
      // Start EU.0079233
      VehServContractL.RESET;
      VehServContractL.SETRANGE(VIN, ServHdrL.VIN);
      VehServContractL.SETRANGE("Serv. Contract Cust. No.", "Bill-to Customer No.");
      VehServContractL.SETFILTER("Beginning of Contract", '=%1|<=%2' , 0D, "Order Date");
      VehServContractL.SETFILTER("Expiration of Contract", '=%1|>=%2' , 0D, "Order Date");
      IF VehicleL.GET(ServHdrL.VIN) THEN BEGIN
        VehServContractL.SETFILTER("Max. Mileage", '=%1|>=%2' , 0, VehicleL.Mileage);
        VehServContractL.SETFILTER("Distance Kilometer", '=%1|>=%2' , 0, VehicleL.Mileage);
      END ELSE BEGIN
        VehServContractL.SETFILTER("Max. Mileage", '=%1|>=%2' , 0, ServHdrL.Mileage);
        VehServContractL.SETFILTER("Distance Kilometer", '=%1|>=%2' , 0, ServHdrL.Mileage);
      END;
      // Start PA033019
      IF VehServContractL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        IF VehServContractL.COUNT > 1 THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA042806
          COMMIT;
      // Stop PA042806
          IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, VehServContractL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
            VALIDATE("Serv. Contract Type", '')
          ELSE
            VALIDATE("Serv. Contract Type", VehServContractL."Contract Type");
        END ELSE
          VALIDATE("Serv. Contract Type", VehServContractL."Contract Type");
      END ELSE
        VALIDATE("Serv. Contract Type", '');
      // Stop PA033019
      // Stop EU.0079233
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetServContractFromServJobLine@1101368191() OK : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ If Service Line is associated with a Service Job Line that has filled Service Contract Type
      // @ then it's fetched from the Service Job Line.
      // @ OK : If the Service Contract Type Is Filled in the service job line

      // Start EU.0079233
      IF "Service Job No." > 0 THEN
      // Start EU.0052165
        IF ServJobLineG.GET("Document Type", "Document No.", "Service Job No.") THEN
          IF ServJobLineG."Serv. Contract Type" > '' THEN
            IF "Bill-to Customer No." =  ServJobLineG."Bill-to Customer No." THEN BEGIN
              IF "Serv. Contract Type" <> ServJobLineG."Serv. Contract Type" THEN
                VALIDATE("Serv. Contract Type", ServJobLineG."Serv. Contract Type");
      // Stop EU.0052165
              EXIT(TRUE);
            END ELSE
              IF "Serv. Contract Type" > '' THEN
                VALIDATE("Serv. Contract Type", '');
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0079233
    END;

    PROCEDURE SpecialFunctionCall@1101287075();

    END;

    PROCEDURE MultipleResAssignment@1100769810(FavoriteResSelectionP@1100769810 : Boolean);
    VAR
      ServLineL@1100769811 : Record 5025625;
    BEGIN
      // @ Assigns a selected Resource to all selected Service Lines
      // @ param: FavoriteResSelectionP - If True then Resource selection in 'My Favorite Resources List',
      // @        else selection in complete 'Resources List'

      // Start PA034057
      // Start PA036950
      // Start PA039784.57933
      IF UserSessionUnitG.TimeManLicensePermissionCheck(FALSE) THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA039784.57933
        ServLineL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
        CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(ServLineL);

        ServLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        ServLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
        ServResourceMgtG.MultipleResAssign4ServLines(ServLineL,FavoriteResSelectionP);
      END;
      // Stop PA036950
      // Stop PA034057
    END;

    PROCEDURE MultipleJobAssignment@1100769811();
    VAR
      ServLineL@1100769811 : Record 5025625;
    BEGIN
      // @ Assigns a selected Service Job No. to all selected Service Lines

      // Start PA034057
      ServLineL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(ServLineL);

      ServLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      ServLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
      ServMgtG.MultipleJobAssign4ServLines(ServLineL);
      // Stop PA034057
    END;

    PROCEDURE EditResAssignment@1100769813();
    BEGIN
      // @ Edit Resource Assignments for the current Service Line

      // Start PA034057
      // Start PA036950
      IF UserSessionUnitG.TimeManLicensePermissionCheck(FALSE) AND ("Resource No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
        IF Type = Type::" " THEN
          ERROR(C_ResAssignNotAllowed,TABLECAPTION,FIELDCAPTION(Type),Type);

        IF ServResourceMgtG.EditServLineResAssTmp(Rec) THEN BEGIN
          ServResourceMgtG.AlignServLine2ServResAssign(Rec);
          CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        END;
      END;
      // Stop PA036950
      // Stop PA034057
    END;

    PROCEDURE CreateDealerPackage@1101422631();
    VAR
      PackageL@1101422630 : Record 5025610;
      ServiceLineL@1101422631 : Record 5025625;
      RecRefL@1101422632 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // @ function to process the creation of Dealer Package, Package Version and Package BOM.
      // Start PA035258
      ServiceLineL.RESET;
      ServiceLineL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(ServiceLineL);

      RecRefL.GETTABLE(ServiceLineL);
      PackageL.CreateDealerPackage("Make Code",RecRefL);
      // Stop PA035258
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      // If a negative quantity was entered, then issue a remark
      IF Quantity < 0 THEN
        MESSAGE(C_INC003);
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      // Start PA033986.I000800
      // Stop PA033986.I000800
      END;
      // Start PA033986.I000800
      // Start PA042806
      // Stop PA042806
      // Stop PA033986.I000800
      // Start PA041495.69914
      UpdateServiceTotalFactbox();
      // Stop PA041495.69914
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE PageOnAfterGetCurrRecord@19077479();
    VAR
      RecRefL@1109400000 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0185559
      CurrRecG := Rec;
      CurrRecG.CALCFIELDS("Job Pos.");
      // Stop EU.0185559
      // Start PA042806
      CLEAR(InvtAvailableG);
      // Start EU.0111610.113539
      CLEAR(ExpectedQtyOnHandG);
      // Stop EU.0111610.113539
      IF (Type = Type::Item) AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
        ItemG.RESET;
        ItemG.GET("No.");
        ItemG.SETFILTER("Date Filter",'..%1',12319999D);
        ItemG.SETFILTER("Location Filter","Location Code");
        InvExpectedG := AvailabilityMgtG.ExpectedQtyOnHand(ItemG,TRUE,TRUE,0,InvtAvailableG,12319999D);

      // Start EU.0111610.113539
        ItemG.SETRANGE("Bin Filter","Bin Code");
        ItemG.CALCFIELDS(
          "Qty. on Purch. Order",
          "Qty. on Order/Invoice",
          "Net Change",
          "Scheduled Receipt (Qty.)",
          "Scheduled Need (Qty.)");
        ItemG.CALCFIELDS("Qty. on Service Order", "Qty. on Branch Order");

      // Start EU.0198818.199111
        OnAfterItemCalcfieldsEvent(ItemG);
      // Stop EU.0198818.199111

        ExpectedQtyOnHandG := AvailabilityMgtG.ExpectedQtyOnHand(ItemG,TRUE,TRUE,0,InvtAvailableG,12319999D);
      // Stop EU.0111610.113539

        ItemG.RESET;
      END;

      // Start PA041510
      // Stop PA041510
      // Start EU.0052165
      FieldIsControlledByJobLineG := ("Service Job No." <> 0) AND ServJobLineG.GET("Document Type", "Document No.", "Service Job No.") AND
        (ServJobLineG."Includes Fixed Price" OR CustLibG.IsInternalCustomer(ServJobLineG."Bill-to Customer No."));
      CASE TRUE OF
        LineWarningG:
          StyleExprWhenFieldIsControlledByJobLineG := 'Attention';
        FieldIsControlledByJobLineG:
          StyleExprWhenFieldIsControlledByJobLineG := 'Subordinate';
        ELSE
          StyleExprWhenFieldIsControlledByJobLineG := 'None';
      END;
      // Stop EU.0052165
      // Start PA032440
      // Start PA040256.59037
      EditUnitCostG := (Type = Type::"Ext. Service") OR (Type = Type::"G/L Account");
      // Stop PA040256.59037
      // Start PA036313
      HideItemCostG := (UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND (Type = Type::Item)) OR
        ((UserSetupG."Hide Labor Cost") AND (Type = Type::Labor));
      // Stop PA042806
      // Start PA033765
      EUTireDataCodeEditableG := FALSE;
      // Start PA034527.19632
      IF SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation" THEN
      // Stop PA034527.19632
        IF Type = Type::Item THEN
          EUTireDataCodeEditableG := ItemG.GET("No.") AND ItemG."Tire Item";
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA033765
      // Start PA040667
      // Start PA041187.89475
      CodedPartValuesEnabledG := ItemG.GET("No.") AND (Type = Type::Item) AND (ItemG."Coded Part Type" <> '');
      // Stop PA041187.89475
      // Stop PA040667
      // Start EU.0104306
      CheckPricingControl();
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterInput@19032305(VAR Text@19032306 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF LookUpNoG <> Text THEN
        "Find No." := TRUE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateServiceTotalFactbox@1000000002();
    VAR
      ExValueL@10430600 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function refreshes the Service Total Factbox.
      // Start PA041495
      // Start EU.0104306
      ExValueL := SkipServLineCustUpdate(TRUE);
      CurrPage.UPDATE; // <-- Refresh of Service Line for line based fact box
      SkipServLineCustUpdate(ExValueL);
      // Stop EU.0104306
      // Start EU.0065317
      // Stop EU.0065317
      //Stop PA041495
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectedRecords@1109400000(VAR TempRecP@1000 : TEMPORARY Record 5025625);
    VAR
      RecL@1001 : Record 5025625;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function provides a temporal set of records based on the selected records on the page
      // @ param TempRecP : temporary record based on Service Line
      // Start PA041510
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(RecL);
      IF RecL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          TempRecP := RecL;
          TempRecP.INSERT;
        UNTIL RecL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CheckEmptyVIN@16975500();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0169755.169736
      IF ServHdrG.VIN = '' THEN BEGIN
        ServSetupG.GET;
        IF ServSetupG."Mand. Veh. Check on Order" = ServSetupG."Mand. Veh. Check on Order"::Error THEN
          ERROR(C_INC_NoVIN);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0169755.169736
    END;

OBJECT Page 5025683 Service Invoice
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=10/10/25;
    Time=[ 3:20:20 PM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Service Invoice;
    Description=PA032651;
    InsertAllowed=No;
    SourceTable=Table36;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Invoice),
                          Order Type=FILTER(Service));
    PageType=Document;
    RefreshOnActivate=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             // Start EU.0104306
             ShowEnhancedVATCalcLogicFieldG := GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() AND
               (GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display VAT Calculation Logic" = GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display VAT Calculation Logic"::"Show Field in Documents");
             // Stop EU.0104306
             // Start EU.0032453
             UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
             ShoppingCartActionsVisibleG := UserSetupG."Allow Shopping Carts";
             ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG := UserSetupG."Last Shopping Cart No." <> '';
             // Stop EU.0032453
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start EU.0032453
                 IF ShoppingCartMgtG.GetCurrentCartHeader(UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG) THEN
                   CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
                 // Stop EU.0032453
                 // Start EU.0174569.174606
                 RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                 UserSessionG.SetMake("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", RecRefG);
                 // Stop EU.0174569.174606
               END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::Service;
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     ERROR(C_INC002);
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
                     EXIT(ConfirmDeletion);
                   END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=BEGIN
                           // Start EU.0195242.197226
                           IF CustomerG.GET("Bill-to Customer No.") THEN
                             CustomerG.GetPostingActionAccessPermission(DisablePostAndPrintG, DisablePostAndSendG);
                           // Stop EU.0195242.197226
                           // Start EU.0174569.174606
                           RecRefG.GETTABLE(Rec);
                           UserSessionG.SetMake("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code", RecRefG);
                           CurrPage.SpecialFunctionPage.PAGE.Refresh("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
                           // Stop EU.0174569.174606
                         END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000003;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=RelatedInformation }
      { 57      ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Invoice }
      { 128     ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Service &Order;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=Document;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0162969.163739
                                 IF RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters() THEN
                                   EXIT;
                                 // Stop EU.0162969.163739
                                 ShowServOrderG.SalesHeader(Rec);
                                 CLEAR(ShowServOrderG);
                               END;
                                }
      { 59      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Statistics;
                      RunObject=Page 160;
                      RunPageLink=Document Type=FIELD(Document Type),
                                  No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=Statistics;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0162969.163739
                                 IF RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters() THEN
                                   EXIT;
                                 // Stop EU.0162969.163739
                                 SalesSetupG.GET;
                                 IF SalesSetupG."Calc. Inv. Discount" THEN
                                   CurrPage.ServiceInvoiceLines.PAGE.CalcInvDisc;
                               END;
                                }
      { 60      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Card;
                      RunObject=Page 21;
                      RunPageLink=No.=FIELD(Sell-to Customer No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=EditLines }
      { 61      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Co&mments;
                      RunObject=Page 67;
                      RunPageLink=Document Type=FIELD(Document Type),
                                  No.=FIELD(No.),
                                  Document Line No.=CONST(0);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=ViewComments }
      { 1109400000;2 ;Action    ;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+Ctrl+D;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Dimensions;
                      Description=PA035597;
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Dimensions;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0162969.163739
                                 IF RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters() THEN
                                   EXIT;
                                 // Stop EU.0162969.163739
                                 // Start PA035597
                                 ShowDocDim;
                                 CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
                                 // Stop PA035597
                               END;
                                }
      { 18      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Price Calculations;
                      RunObject=Page 5025825;
                      RunPageLink=Order Type=CONST(Sales Order),
                                  Document Type=FIELD(Document Type),
                                  Document No.=FIELD(No.);
                      Visible=FALSE;
                      Image=Calculate }
