  {
    VAR
      GeneralLedgerSetupG@10430601 : Record 98;
      UserSetupG@3245304 : Record 91;
      SalesSetupG@3245305 : Record 311;
      CustomerG@19400602 : Record 18;
      ShoppingCartHdrG@3245303 : Record 5028930;
      MessageListG@20300300 : Record 5047002;
      ChangeExchRateG@1109400003 : Page 511;
      SalRemarksTextG@1109400004 : Page 5025541;
      ReportPrintG@1109400006 : Codeunit 228;
      SubtotalsG@1109400007 : Codeunit 5028659;
      ShowServOrderG@1109400008 : Codeunit 5025635;
      C_INC001@1109400009 : TextConst 'ENU=Service order %1 is already archived. Do you really want to re-activate the service order from the archive?';
      C_INC002@1109400010 : TextConst 'ENU=New Service Invoices can only be created by using ''Create Invoice'' fom Service Orders!';
      ShoppingCartMgtG@3245302 : Codeunit 5028930;
      UserSessionG@1000 : Codeunit 5028665;
      MessageMgtG@20300301 : Codeunit 5047001;
      ShoppingCartActionsVisibleG@3245301 : Boolean;
      ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG@3245300 : Boolean;
      ShowEnhancedVATCalcLogicFieldG@10430600 : Boolean;
      C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope@88002 : TextConst 'ENU=The action cannot be performed because the current %1 record is not available with the used filter %2.';
      C_INC_ThePageWillShowAnotherRecord@88001 : TextConst 'ENU=\The page will show the next record.';
      C_INC_ThePageWillClose@88000 : TextConst 'ENU=\No other record available. The page will close.';
      RecRefG@17425800 : RecordRef;
      DisablePostAndPrintG@19400601 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DisablePostAndSendG@19400600 : Boolean INDATASET;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DoPostOnPushAction@17452300(PostingCodeunitP@17452300 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesPostPrintL@17452302 : Codeunit 82;
      ErrorL@17452301 : Text;
      SkipTriggerL@18884100 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0188841.191671
      OnBeforeDoPostOnPushActionEvent(Rec, SkipTriggerL);
      IF SkipTriggerL THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop EU.0188841.191671
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      UserSessionG.SetLock(TRUE);
      CLEARLASTERROR;
      IF NOT CODEUNIT.RUN(PostingCodeunitP,Rec) THEN
        ErrorL := GETLASTERRORTEXT;
      UserSessionG.SetLock(FALSE);
      IF ErrorL <> '' THEN
        ERROR(ErrorL);
      IF "Job Queue Status" = "Job Queue Status"::"Scheduled for Posting" THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      xRec := Rec;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters@88000() RecordChangedR : Boolean;
    VAR
      RecL@88001 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0162969.163739
      IF HASFILTER THEN
        IF RecL.GET(RECORDID) THEN BEGIN
          RecL.COPY(Rec, ISTEMPORARY);
          RecL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
          RecL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
          RecL.SETRANGE("No.", "No.");
          IF NOT RecL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
            CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
            IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillClose, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              CurrPage.CLOSE;
            END ELSE BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillShowAnotherRecord, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              xRec := Rec;
              CurrPage.UPDATE;
            END;
            EXIT(TRUE);
          END;
        END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0162969.163739
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AddItemToCurrentShoppingCartOnAction@3245301();
    VAR
      RecL@3245302 : TEMPORARY Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032453
      CurrPage.ServiceInvoiceLines.PAGE.GetSelectedRecords(RecL);
      ShoppingCartMgtG.AddSalesLinesToShoppingCart(RecL, UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG, "Bill-to Customer No.");
      CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CreateNewShoppingCartOnAction@3245302();
    VAR
      ShoppingCartHdrL@3245301 : Record 5028930;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032453
      IF NOT ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG THEN
        ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG := TRUE;
      ShoppingCartMgtG.CreateNewShoppingCartHdr(UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG, "Bill-to Customer No.", "Supply VIN");
      CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EVENTS__@72000();
    BEGIN
    END;

    [Integration(DEFAULT,TRUE)]
    PROCEDURE OnBeforeDoPostOnPushActionEvent@18884103(VAR RecP@15174001 : Record 36;VAR SkipTriggerP@15174000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __STOP_EVENTS__@72004();
    BEGIN
    END;

    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table37;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;

    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             // Start EU.0135165.126936
             AmountEditableG := TRUE;
             AmountIncludingVATEditableG := TRUE;
             // Stop EU.0135165.126936
             // Start EU.0104306
             AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive();
             BothAmountFieldsVisibleG := GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display One or Both Amounts" = GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display One or Both Amounts"::"Both Fields ('Amount' and 'Amount incl. VAT')";
             // Stop EU.0104306
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start PA032440
                 UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
                 // Stop PA032440
                 // Start PA033765
                 SalesReceivablesSetupG.GET();
                 // Start PA034527.19632
                 EUTireDataCodeVisibleG := SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation";
                 // Stop PA034527.19632
                 // Start PA035597
                 // Stop PA035597
                 // Stop PA033765
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       RecRefL@1119427000 : RecordRef;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0104306
                       IF "Document No." <> SalesHdrG."No." THEN
                         IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
                           AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       DescriptionIndentG := 0;
                       // Start PA031550
                       // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                       IF (Type = Type:: Item) AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
                         RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                       // Start PA032473
                       // Start EU.0104306
                         IF RTCMgtG.LineWarning(RecRefL) THEN
                           FieldStyleExprG := 'Attention';
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       // Stop PA032473
                       END;
                       // Stop PA031550
                       // Start PA042870
                       CheckPricingControl();
                       // Start PA032820
                       // Stop PA032820
                       // Start EU.0104306
                       DescriptionOnFormat();
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       // Stop PA042870
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  // Start PA031550
                  // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                  // Start EU.0104306
                  FieldStyleExprG := '';
                  // Stop EU.0104306
                  // Stop PA031550

                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::Service;
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::Item THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Item;
                  IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN BEGIN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                    "Order Type" := SalesHdrG."Order Type";
                  // Start EU.0012448.13245
                    "Service Order No." := SalesHdrG."Service Order No.";
                  // Stop EU.0012448.13245
                  END;
                  // Start PA042870
                  // Stop PA042870
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042870
                     // Stop PA042870
                   END;

    OnModifyRecord=BEGIN
                     // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                     // Start PA035597
                     CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                     // Stop PA035597
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042761
                     UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
                     // Stop PA042761
                   END;

    OnAfterGetCurrRecord=VAR
                           ItemL@1109400000 : Record 27;
                         BEGIN
                           // Start PA042870
                           CheckPricingControl();
                           // Start PA033765
                           EUTireDataCodeEditableG := FALSE;
                           // Start PA034527.19632
                           IF SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation" THEN
                           // Stop PA034527.19632
                             IF Type = Type::Item THEN
                               IF "Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item THEN
                                 IF ItemL.GET("No.") THEN
                                   EUTireDataCodeEditableG := ItemL."Tire Item";
                           // Start PA035597
                           // Stop PA035597
                           // Stop PA033765
                           // Stop PA042870
                         END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS

  {
    VAR
      GeneralLedgerSetupG@10430601 : Record 98;
      UserSetupG@1119432002 : Record 91;
      SalesHdrG@1109400001 : Record 36;
      SalesReceivablesSetupG@1109400010 : Record 311;
      ItemG@1109990003 : Record 27;
      OnLookupItemG@1101286982 : Record 27;
      TransfExtTextG@1109400002 : Codeunit 378;
      CollectionUnitG@1109400003 : Codeunit 5028657;

      FormUpdateG@1109400005 : Boolean;

      EUTireDataCodeVisibleG@1101221268 : Boolean INDATASET;
      EUTireDataCodeEditableG@1101221269 : Boolean INDATASET;

      AmountEditableG@19000309 : Boolean INDATASET;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG@13759400 : Boolean;

      CodedPartValuesEnabledG@1109400007 : Boolean;

      BothAmountFieldsVisibleG@10430602 : Boolean;

    PROCEDURE ResetHdrRec@10430600();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0104306
      // Start EU.0124901.125228
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
        AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
      // Stop EU.0124901.125228
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDisc@8();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Calc. Discount",Rec);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524200();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 37;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdateSalesDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@7(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.InsertSalesExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransfExtTextG.MakeUpdate() THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowPriceCalculation@11();
    VAR
      ShowPriceCalcL@1109400001 : Page 5025825;
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(ShowPriceCalcL);
      ShowPriceCalcL.SetLine(Rec);
      ShowPriceCalcL.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@12();
    VAR
      ItemAvailabilityL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028701;
    BEGIN
      ItemAvailabilityL.DisplayBySalesLine('',Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@13();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA042870
      CheckPricingControl();
      // Stop PA042870
      // Start PA032178.1446608
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      FormUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      IF (Quantity = 0) OR (Quantity = 1) THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts

      IF FormUpdateG THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
        MODIFY;
      // Stop PA035597
      END;
      // Stop PA032178.1446608
      // Start PA042761
      UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400006();
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA032820
      // Start PA033019
      UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
      // Start PA042870
      CASE TRUE OF
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Item Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::"Account (G/L)") AND ("Labor No." > ''):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Labor Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Vehicle Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::"Own Option"):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Own Option Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Veh Transfer Unit Price";
        ELSE
          UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
      END;
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      AmountEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      IF UnitPriceEditableG THEN
        IF GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() THEN
          IF SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic" = SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic"::"Amount + VAT" THEN
            AmountIncludingVATEditableG := FALSE
          ELSE
            AmountEditableG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936

      HideItemCostG :=
        (UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" IN ["Item Type"::Item])) OR
        (UserSetupG."Hide Labor Cost" AND (Type = Type::"Account (G/L)") AND ("Labor No." > '')) OR
        (UserSetupG."Hide Vehicle Cost" AND (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" IN ["Item Type"::Vehicle,"Item Type"::"Own Option","Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"]));

      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      LineAmountG := CalcLineAmount();
      LineAmountInclVATG := CalcLineAmountIncludingVAT();
      // Start PA040667
      CodedPartValuesEnabledG := (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item) AND ItemG.GET("No.") AND (ItemG."Coded Part Type" <> '');
      // Stop PA040667
      // Stop PA042870
      // Stop PA033019
      // Stop PA032820
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnFormat@19023855();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0104306
      IF Indentation > 0 THEN
        DescriptionIndentG := Indentation - 1;

      FieldStyleExprG := '';
      IF Type IN [Type::Header,Type::"Begin-Total",Type::"End-Total"] THEN
        FieldStyleExprG := 'Strong';
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
      // Start PA042761
      UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UnitofMeasureCodeOnAfterValida@19057939();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReserveOnAfterValidate@19004502();
    BEGIN
      IF (Reserve = Reserve::Always) AND ("Outstanding Qty. (Base)" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CalcLineAmount@19014598() : Decimal;
    VAR
      NL@1109400002 : Integer;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA042870
      // Start EU.0182532
      // Stop EU.0182532
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal);
        EXIT(Subtotal);
      END;
      EXIT(Amount);
      // Stop PA042870
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CalcLineAmountIncludingVAT@19052024() : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA042870
      // Start EU.0182532
      // Stop EU.0182532
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS("Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        EXIT("Subtotal Incl.VAT");
      END;
      EXIT("Amount Including VAT");
      // Stop PA042870
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesTotalFactbox@1000000002();
    BEGIN
      // @ This function refreshes the Sales Total Factbox.
      // Start PA042761
      CurrPage.UPDATE(); // <-- Refresh of Sales Line for line based fact box
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type", "Document No.") THEN
        SalesHdrG.MODIFY; // <-- Refresh of Sales Header for header based fact box
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectedRecords@3245300(VAR TempRecP@1000 : TEMPORARY Record 37);
    VAR
      RecL@1001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function provides a temporal set of records based on the selected records on the page
      // @ param TempRecP : temporary record based on the SubPage SourceTable
      // Start EU.0032453
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(RecL);
      IF RecL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          TempRecP := RecL;
          TempRecP.INSERT;
        UNTIL RecL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    BEGIN
    {
      // @ Area Service

OBJECT Page 5028667 Purch. Posting Prompt
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=07/17/25;
    Time=[ 4:20:45 PM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Purchase Posting Prompt;
    Description=PA036549.32799;
    InsertAllowed=No;
    DeleteAllowed=No;
    SourceTable=Table38;
    DataCaptionExpr='';
    PageType=StandardDialog;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             // Start PA036549.32799
             CashLargeReceiptEditableG := TRUE;
             CashSmallReceiptEditableG := TRUE;
             PostReceiptAndInvoiceEditableG := TRUE;
             PostInvoiceEditableG := TRUE;
             PostReceiptEditableG := TRUE;
             CombineReceiptsEditableG := TRUE;
             // Stop PA036549.32799
             // Start EU.0067500
             PurchSetupG.GET();
             ExternalDocumentNoMandatoryG := PurchSetupG."Ext. Doc. No. Mandatory";
             // Stop EU.0067500
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 FILTERGROUP(2);
                 SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
                 SETRANGE("No.","No.");
                 FILTERGROUP(0);
                 // Start PA031550
                 //Initialize CheckBoxes with current value of RadioButtons
                 SetPostOption(PostOptionG);
                 SetCashOption(CashOptionG);
                 // Stop PA035597
                 // Start EU.0017374
                 VendorInvoiceNoVisibleG := NOT ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::"Return Order"]);
                 // Stop EU.0017374
                 // Stop PA031550
                 // Start PA032178.Defect0088
                 CurrDocNoG := '';
                 // Stop PA032178.Defect0088
                 // Start PA032473
                 // Start PA034943
                 CombineReceiptsEditableG := "Document Type" = "Document Type"::Order;
                 // Stop PA036549.32799
                 // Stop PA034943
                 // Stop PA032473
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       // Start PA034943
                       IF "Document Type" <> "Document Type"::Order THEN
                         "Combine Receipts" := FALSE;

                       // Start PA036549.32799
                       CombineReceiptsEditableG := "Combine Receipts";
                       // Stop PA036549.32799
                       // Stop PA034943

                       // Start PA032178.Defect0088
                       //@ Make sure that OnAfterGetRecord runs only once for a record
                       IF CurrDocNoG = "No." THEN
                         EXIT;
                       CurrDocNoG := "No.";
                       // Stop PA032178.Defect0088
                       // Start PA037938.50961
                       // Start PA039364
                       // Stop PA039364
                       // Stop PA037938.50961
                       Receive := FALSE;
                       Ship := FALSE;
                       Invoice := FALSE;
                       // Start PA034943
                       // Stop PA034943
                       IF "Combine Receipts" THEN BEGIN
                         IF NOT DocWarningExistsG THEN BEGIN
                       // Start PA031550
                       // Start PA033319.7801296
                           SetPostOption(PostOptionG::Receive);
                       // Stop PA033319.7801296
                       // Start PA033733.9050188
                       // Stop PA033733.9050188
                       // Stop PA031550
                         END;
                         LockReleasePostingOption(FALSE);
                       END ELSE BEGIN
                       // Start PA032178.Defect0088
                         IF NOT DocWarningExistsG THEN BEGIN
                           SetPostOption(PostOptionG::Both);
                       // Start PA033733.9050188
                       // Stop PA033733.9050188
                       // Start PA034943
                           LockReleasePostingOption(TRUE);
                       // Stop PA034943
                         END;
                       // Start PA034943
                       // Stop PA034943
                       // Stop PA032178.Defect0088
                       END;
                       // Start PA035398.28560
                       // Start PA038216.40461
                       IF NOT ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::Order, "Document Type"::"Credit Memo","Document Type"::"Return Order"]) THEN
                       // Stop PA038216.40461
                       // Stop PA035398.28560
                         LockReleasePostingOption(FALSE);
                       IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN BEGIN
                       // Start PA031550
                       // Start PA033319.7801296
                         SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Receive,FALSE);
                       // Stop PA033319.7801296
                         SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Invoice,FALSE);
                         SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Both,FALSE);
                       // Stop PA031550
                       END;
                       // Start EU.0017374
                       // Stop EU.0017374
                       // Start PA031550
                       IF NOT "Cash Payment" THEN BEGIN
                         SetCashOption(CashOptionG::" ");
                         SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",FALSE);
                         SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",FALSE);
                       END ELSE BEGIN
                         IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN BEGIN
                           SetCashOption(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt");
                           SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",FALSE);
                           SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",FALSE);
                         END ELSE BEGIN
                           SetCashOption(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip");
                           SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",TRUE);
                           SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",TRUE);
                         END;
                       END;
                       // Stop PA031550
                     END;

    OnQueryClosePage=BEGIN
                       IF CloseAction IN [ACTION::Cancel,ACTION::LookupCancel] THEN
                         CancelOnPush;
                       IF CloseAction IN [ACTION::OK,ACTION::LookupOK] THEN
                           OKOnPush;
                     END;

  }

    PROCEDURE DocWarnings@29() : Boolean;
    VAR
      DocWarningTempL@1109400002 : TEMPORARY Record 5045369;
      PurchLineL@1109400005 : Record 39;
      PurchLineTempL@1109400026 : TEMPORARY Record 39;
      VehOptionInvL@1109400007 : Record 5025464;
      VehPurchLineL@1109400001 : Record 5025446;
      ItemL@1109400016 : Record 27;
      VehicleL@1109400022 : Record 5025400;
      PostedSalesTradeInL@1109400000 : Record 5025443;
      ItemLedgEntryL@8524400 : Record 32;
      ParkingLotL@11235400 : Record 5205869;
      ValidationRoutinesforPurchL@19853700 : Codeunit 5025351;
      RecRefL@1109400015 : RecordRef;
      ItemNoL@1109400024 : Code[20];
      SerialNoL@1109400023 : Code[20];
      UnitCostBeforeL@1109400021 : Decimal;
      ApplEntryNoL@1109400025 : Integer;
      LogLineL@1109400010 : Boolean;
      NoReceiptPostingPermissionL@1101342643 : Boolean;
      EventL@1109400019 : 'Check,Send,Invoice';
      TransferLinesL@1109400027 : Integer;
      ErrorTextL@1101342645 : Text[1024];
    BEGIN
      // Start PA033019
      UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
      ItemNoL := '';
      SerialNoL := '';
      DocWarningTempL.DELETEALL;
      DocWarningTempL.INIT;
      DocWarningTempL."Document Type" := "Document Type";
      DocWarningTempL."Document No." := "No.";
      DocWarningTempL.Area := DocWarningTempL.Area::"Parts Purchases";
      DocWarningTempL.INSERT;
      CampValidationG.SetCampaignValidation(EventL::Invoice, "Posting Date");
      CampValidationG.RUN(DocWarningTempL);

      DocWarningTempL.RESET;
      IF NOT DocWarningTempL.FINDLAST THEN
        DocWarningTempL."Entry No." := 0;
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
      ValidationRoutinesforPurchL.DocumentPrintWarnings(DocWarningTempL, Rec);
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
      // Start PA042951
      LicPermissionG.GET(LicPermissionG."Object Type"::Codeunit, CODEUNIT::"Archive Sales Header");
      IF LicPermissionG."Execute Permission" <> LicPermissionG."Execute Permission"::Yes THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
        DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_ComfortModuleIsMissingInFLF',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
          Rec,
          PurchLineL,
          DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          C_INC_ComfortModuleIsMissingInFLF,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Stop PA042951

      // Start PA033988
      IF ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::"Return Order"]) THEN BEGIN
        GlSetupG.GET;
        IF (GlSetupG."Reason Code Mandatory") AND ("Reason Code" = '')THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_ReasonCodeMandatory',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
      // Start EU.0017374
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Stop EU.0017374
            C_INC_ReasonCodeMandatory,
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      END;
      // Stop PA033988

      // Check partial shipments and partial invoicing
      PurchLineL.RESET;
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      PurchLineL.SETFILTER(Type,'<>%1',PurchLineL.Type::" ");
      PurchLineL.SETFILTER("No.",'<>%1','');
      IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          IF (PurchLineL.Type = PurchLineL.Type::Item) AND (PurchLineL."Serial No." = '') THEN
            IF ItemL.GET(PurchLineL."No.") THEN
              IF ItemL."Check of Serial No." THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_FieldIsEmptyPleaseCheck',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_FieldIsEmptyPleaseCheck, PurchLineL.FIELDCAPTION("Serial No."), PurchLineL."Line No."),
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Start EU.0152364.152757
          IF (PurchLineL.Type = PurchLineL.Type::"Account (G/L)") AND (PurchLineL.VIN <> '') THEN
            IF VehicleL.GET(PurchLineL.VIN) THEN
              IF VehicleL."Vehicle Status" IN [VehicleL."Vehicle Status"::"Customer Vehicle",VehicleL."Vehicle Status"::"Consignment Vehicle"] THEN
                IF NOT PurchSetupG."Allow Add.Cost Post. CustVeh." THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                  DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_PurchAddlCostError',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                    Rec,
                    PurchLineL,
                    DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                    C_INC_PurchAddlCostError,
                    DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Stop EU.0152364.152757
          LogLineL := TRUE;
          IF ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND
             (PurchLineL."Item Type" <> PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle)
          THEN BEGIN
            VehOptionInvL.RESET;
            VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
            VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
            VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Separate Invoice for Line",TRUE);
            VehOptionInvL.SETRANGE("Document Line No.",PurchLineL."Line No.");
            IF NOT VehOptionInvL.ISEMPTY THEN
              LogLineL := FALSE;
          END;
          IF LogLineL THEN BEGIN
            CASE TRUE OF
              (PurchLineL."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" = '') AND (PurchLineL."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" = ''):
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_DepartmentCodeAndMakeCodeAreEmpty',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_DepartmentCodeAndMakeCodeAreEmpty,PurchLineL.TABLECAPTION,PurchLineL."Line No."),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
              PurchLineL."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" = '':
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_MakeCodeIsEmpty',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0017374
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_MakeCodeIsEmpty, PurchLineL.TABLECAPTION, PurchLineL."Line No.", PurchLineL.FIELDCAPTION("Shortcut Dimension 2 Code")),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
      // Stop EU.0017374
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
              PurchLineL."Shortcut Dimension 1 Code" = '':
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_DepartmentCodeIsEmpty',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start PA036114.23677
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_DepartmentCodeIsEmpty,PurchLineL.TABLECAPTION,PurchLineL."Line No.", PurchLineL.FIELDCAPTION("Shortcut Dimension 1 Code")),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
      // Stop PA036114.23677
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
            END;

            IF ((PurchLineL."Quantity Received" + PurchLineL."Qty. to Receive") < PurchLineL.Quantity) AND
               (PurchLineL."Qty. to Receive" > 0)
            THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_PartialShipment',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                Rec,
                PurchLineL,
                DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                C_INC_PartialShipment,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);

            IF ((PurchLineL."Quantity Invoiced" + PurchLineL."Qty. to Invoice") < PurchLineL.Quantity) AND
               (PurchLineL."Qty. to Invoice" > 0)
            THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_Partialinvoice',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                Rec,
                PurchLineL,
                DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                C_INC_Partialinvoice,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);

            IF PurchLineL."Direct Unit Cost" = 0 THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_PurchasePriceMissing',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                Rec,
                PurchLineL,
                DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_PurchasePriceMissing,PurchLineL.TABLECAPTION,PurchLineL."Line No."),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                UserSetupG."Check for Empty Price Fields");
          END;

          IF (PurchLineL."Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND
             (PurchLineL."Item Type" = PurchLineL."Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer")
          THEN BEGIN
            PurchLineTempL := PurchLineL;
            PurchLineTempL.INSERT;
          END;

          IF ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::"Return Order"]) AND
             ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND (PurchLineL.Type = PurchLineL.Type::Item) AND
             (((PurchLineL."No." <> '') AND (PurchLineL."No." <> ItemNoL)) OR
             ((SerialNoL <> PurchLineL."Serial No.") AND (PurchLineL."Serial No." <> '')))
          THEN BEGIN
            SerialNoL := PurchLineL."Serial No.";
            ItemNoL := PurchLineL."No.";
            UnitCostBeforeL := PurchLineL."Unit Cost (LCY)";
            ApplEntryNoL := PurchLineL."Appl.-to Item Entry";

            IF VehColUnitG.UnitCostChanged(
               PurchLineL."No.",
               ApplEntryNoL,
               PurchLineL."Serial No.",
               PurchLineL."Qty. per Unit of Measure",
               PurchLineL."Unit Cost (LCY)",
               TRUE)
            THEN BEGIN
              PurchLineL."Unit Cost (LCY)" := VehColUnitG.ItemUnitCostGet(
                PurchLineL."No.",
                ApplEntryNoL,
                PurchLineL."Serial No.",
                PurchLineL."Qty. per Unit of Measure",
                TRUE);
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_UpdateUnitCost',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                Rec,
                PurchLineL,
                DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_UpdateUnitCost,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  PurchLineL.FIELDCAPTION("Unit Cost (LCY)"),
                  ItemL.TABLECAPTION,
                  PurchLineL."No.",
                  UnitCostBeforeL - PurchLineL."Unit Cost (LCY)"),
                DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
            END;
          END;
      // Start PA045085
          CheckToBeReceived(PurchLineL, ToBeReceivedG);
      // Stop PA045085
      // Start PA033978
      // Start EU.0017374
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('CheckNegativeStock',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
            PurchLineL.CheckNegativeStock(),
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Stop PA033978

          IF ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::"Return Order"]) AND
             ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases") AND (PurchLineL.Type = PurchLineL.Type::Item) AND
             (PurchLineL."Appl.-to Item Entry" <> 0)
          THEN
            IF ItemLedgEntryL.GET(PurchLineL."Appl.-to Item Entry") THEN BEGIN
              ReservEntryG.RESET;
              ReservMgtG.InitFilterAndSortingLookupFrom(ReservEntryG, TRUE);
              ReservMgtG.ItemLedgEntryFilterReservFrom(ReservEntryG, ItemLedgEntryL);
              ReservEntryG.SETFILTER("For Type", '%1|%2', ReservEntryG."For Type"::Sales, ReservEntryG."For Type"::Service);
              ReservEntryG.SETFILTER(Quantity, '>0');
              IF ReservEntryG.FINDSET THEN
                REPEAT
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                  DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_LedgerEntryIsReserved',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                    Rec,
                    PurchLineL,
                    DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                    STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_LedgerEntryIsReserved, ItemLedgEntryL.TABLECAPTION, PurchLineL."Appl.-to Item Entry", PurchLineL."Line No.", ReservMgtG.CreateForText(ReservEntryG)),
                    DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
                UNTIL ReservEntryG.NEXT = 0;
            END;
      // Stop EU.0017374
        UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;

      PurchLineTempL.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN);
      IF PurchLineTempL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          PurchLineTempL.SETRANGE(VIN,PurchLineTempL.VIN);
          PurchLineTempL.SETRANGE("No.",PurchLineTempL."No.");
          PurchLineTempL.FINDSET;
          TransferLinesL := 0;
          REPEAT
            TransferLinesL := TransferLinesL + PurchLineTempL."Quantity (Base)";
            PurchLineTempL.DELETE;
          UNTIL PurchLineTempL.NEXT = 0;
          IF ABS(TransferLinesL) > 1 THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_QuantityMustBe1ForVehicleTransfer',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
              Rec,
              PurchLineTempL,
              DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_QuantityMustBe1ForVehicleTransfer,PurchLineTempL."No.",PurchLineTempL.VIN),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
          PurchLineTempL.SETRANGE(VIN);
          PurchLineTempL.SETRANGE("No.");
        UNTIL PurchLineTempL.NEXT = 0;

      // Check posting and shipping
      // Abort if no permission for invoicing or receive exists
      // Start PA033019
      // Start PA043221
      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service THEN
        IF NOT NoReceiptPostingPermissionL AND ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::Service) THEN BEGIN
          ErrorTextL := '';
          PurchLineL.RESET;
          PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
          PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
          IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::"Return Order"] THEN
            PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Return Qty. to Ship", '<>0')
          ELSE
            PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Qty. to Receive", '<>0');
          IF UserSetupG."Service Item Line" <> UserSetupG."Service Item Line"::"Modify/Ship+Receive" THEN BEGIN
            PurchLineL.SETRANGE(Type, PurchLineL.Type::Item);
            IF PurchLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
              ErrorTextL += ', ' + FORMAT(PurchLineL.Type);
          END;
          IF UserSetupG."Service Item Line" <> UserSetupG."Service Item Line"::"Modify/Ship+Receive" THEN BEGIN
            PurchLineL.SETRANGE(Type, PurchLineL.Type::"Charge (Item)");
            IF PurchLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
              ErrorTextL += ', ' + FORMAT(PurchLineL.Type);
          END;
          IF UserSetupG."Service G/L Account Line" <> UserSetupG."Service G/L Account Line"::"Modify/Ship+Receive" THEN BEGIN
            PurchLineL.SETRANGE(Type, PurchLineL.Type::"Account (G/L)");
            IF PurchLineL.FINDFIRST THEN
              ErrorTextL += ', ' + FORMAT(PurchLineL.Type);
          END;
      // Start PA043222.92573
          IF ErrorTextL > '' THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_NoPermissionToPost',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
              Rec,
              PurchLineL,
              DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              C_INC_NoPermissionToPost + ' : ' + COPYSTR(ErrorTextL,3),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
            NoReceiptPostingPermissionL := TRUE;
          END;
      // Stop PA043222.92573
        END;
      // Stop PA043221
      // Start PA033988
      // Start PA043221
      IF NoReceiptPostingPermissionL OR NoPermissionForInvoicingOrShippingExists() THEN
      // Stop PA043221
      // Stop PA033988
      // Stop PA033019
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
        DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_NoPermissionToPost',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
          Rec,
          PurchLineL,
          DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          C_INC_NoPermissionToPost,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);

      // Abort if invoicing permission exists, but there is no shipping permissions
      // Start PA033019
      // Start PA033988
      // Start PA043221
      IF InvoicingPermissionExistsWithoutShippingPermission() THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA043221
      // Stop PA033988
        IF NOT ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::Invoice]) THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_NoShippingPermission',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            C_INC_NoShippingPermission,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
      // Stop PA033019
      // Start PA031550
          SetPostOption(PostOptionG::Invoice);
      // Start PA033319.7801296
          SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Receive,FALSE);
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
          SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Both,FALSE);
      // Stop PA031550
        END ELSE BEGIN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_NoShippingPermission',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            C_INC_NoShippingPermission,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Start PA031550
          SetPostOption(PostOptionG::Both);
      // Stop PA031550
        END;
        DocWarningExistsG := TRUE;
      END;
      // Start PA033019
      PurchLineL.RESET;
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
      // Start PA033733.9445355
      IF "Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Credit Memo" THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA033733.9445355
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Return Qty. to Ship", '<>0');
      // Start PA035101
        IF PurchLineL.ISEMPTY THEN BEGIN
          PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Return Qty. to Ship");
          PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Return Qty. Shipped Not Invd.",'<>0');
        END;
      // Stop PA035101
        IF PurchLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_MustHaveReturnShippmentQuantity',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_MustHaveQuantity,PurchLineL.FIELDCAPTION("Return Qty. to Ship")),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      END ELSE BEGIN
      // Start PA033733
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Qty. to Invoice", '<>0');
      // Stop PA033733
        IF PurchLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_MustHaveInvoiceQuantity',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_MustHaveQuantity,PurchLineL.FIELDCAPTION("Qty. to Invoice")),
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      END;
      // Start PA043221
      // Stop PA043221

      // Abort if receiving permission exists, but there is no invoicing permission
      // Start PA033988
      // Start PA043221
      IF ShippingPermissionExistsWithoutInvoicingPermission() THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA043221
      // Stop PA033988
        IF NOT ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::Invoice]) THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_NoInvoicingPermission',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            C_INC_NoInvoicingPermission,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
      // Stop PA033019
      // Start PA033319.7801296
          SetPostOption(PostOptionG::Receive);
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
          SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Invoice,FALSE);
          SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Both,FALSE);
        END ELSE BEGIN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
          DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_NoInvoicingPermission',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            Rec,
            PurchLineL,
            DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
            C_INC_NoInvoicingPermission,
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
            DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Start PA031550
          SetPostOption(PostOptionG::Both);
      // Stop PA031550
        END;
        DocWarningExistsG := TRUE;
      END;
      IF ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND
         ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo", "Document Type"::"Return Order"])
      THEN BEGIN
        PurchLineL.RESET;
        PurchLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.", "Item Type",VIN,"Order Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type",PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER(VIN,'<>%1','');
        IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
          REPEAT
            VehColUnitG.OnRemoveVehicleCheckIsNotUsed(PurchLineL.VIN,TRUE,DocWarningTempL);
            IF PurchLineL."Qty. to Invoice" <> 0 THEN
              VehColUnitG.OnRemoveVehicleCheckItemCharge(PurchLineL.VIN,Rec,TRUE,DocWarningTempL);
          UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;
      END;
      // Document Warning Error while posting the PO before incase the Service Order is not completly invoiced.
      // To prevent blocking of Service Order incase the Purchase Order is posted before the SO is Invoiced.
      // The posting of PO changes the Gen. Prod. Posting Group of Vehicle and does not allow SO to be posted.

      IF "Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases" THEN BEGIN
        PurchLineL.RESET;
        PurchLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.", "Item Type",VIN,"Order Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type",PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER(VIN,'<>%1','');
      // Start PA041187.90422
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Vehicle Status", '<>%1', PurchLineL."Vehicle Status"::"New Vehicle");
      // Start PA038058
      // Stop PA038058
        IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
          REPEAT
            IF VehPurchLineL.GET(PurchLineL."Document Type",PurchLineL."Document No.",PurchLineL."Line No.") THEN BEGIN
              IF VehPurchLineL.Mileage = 0 THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_EmptyMileage',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_EmptyMileage,VehicleL.TABLECAPTION,PurchLineL.VIN),
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
              IF VehPurchLineL."Initial Registration" = 0D THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_EmptyRegistrationDate',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_EmptyRegistrationDate,VehicleL.TABLECAPTION,PurchLineL.VIN),
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Remark);
              IF VehPurchLineL."License No." = '' THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_EmptyLicenseNo',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_EmptyLicenseNo,VehicleL.TABLECAPTION,PurchLineL.VIN),
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Remark);
              END;
          UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop PA041187.90422
      END;

      // Start PA033019.9233031
      // Check if Vehicle Is Sold
      IF ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND
         ("Document Type" = "Document Type"::"Credit Memo")
      THEN BEGIN
        PurchLineL.RESET;
        PurchLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.", "Item Type",VIN,"Order Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type",PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
      // Start EU.0059337
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Return Shipment No.", '');
      // Stop EU.0059337
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER(VIN,'<>%1','');
        IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
          REPEAT
            VehicleL.SearchVehicleIsSold(PurchLineL.VIN, PurchLineL."Book No.", PurchLineL."Line No.", DocWarningTempL,TRUE);
          UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;
      END;
      // Stop PA033019.9233031

      // Start PA042846
      IF "Trade-In for Order No."<>'' THEN BEGIN
        PurchLineL.RESET;
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE(PurchLineL."Item Type",PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER(PurchLineL.VIN,'<>%1','');
        IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
          REPEAT
            PostedSalesTradeInL.RESET;
            PostedSalesTradeInL.SETRANGE("Purch. Document Type",PurchLineL."Document Type");
            PostedSalesTradeInL.SETRANGE("Purch. Invoice No.",PurchLineL."Document No.");
            PostedSalesTradeInL.SETRANGE(VIN,PurchLineL.VIN);
            IF PostedSalesTradeInL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
      // Start EU.0113943.104759
              IF ROUND(PostedSalesTradeInL."Unit Cost Incl. VAT (LCY)",1)<>ROUND(PurchLineL."Amount Including VAT",1) THEN
      // Stop EU.0113943.104759
      // Start EU.0017374
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_TradeInPrice',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                  Rec,
                  PurchLineL,
                  DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                  STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_TradeInPrice, PurchLineL."Amount Including VAT", PostedSalesTradeInL."Unit Cost Incl. VAT (LCY)", PurchLineL.VIN, PurchLineL."Line No."),
                  DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
            END;
          UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop EU.0017374
      END;
      // Stop PA042846

      // Start PA041187.93643
      // Check whether open sales incentives exist (All,Posted,Not Closed,Amount Received > 0)
      IF ("Order Type" = "Order Type"::"Vehicle Sales & Purchases") AND
         ("Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Credit Memo","Document Type"::"Return Order"])
      THEN BEGIN
        PurchLineL.RESET;
        PurchLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.",VIN);
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
        PurchLineL.SETFILTER(VIN,'<>%1','');
        PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type",PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
        IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
          REPEAT
            IF CheckOpenSalesIncentivesExist(PurchLineL.VIN,-1) THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
              DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_VINOpenSalesIncentiveLine',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                Rec,
                PurchLineL,
                DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::" ",
                STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_VINOpenSalesIncentiveLine,PurchLineL.VIN),
                DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
          UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;
      END;
      // Stop PA041187.93643
      // Start EU.0112354
      IF VehicleSetupG.GET THEN
        IF VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Purchase" <> VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Purchase"::" " THEN BEGIN
          PurchLineL.RESET;
          PurchLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Document Type","Document No.",VIN);
          PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
          PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","No.");
          PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Item Type",PurchLineL."Item Type"::Vehicle);
          PurchLineL.SETFILTER(VIN,'<>%1','');
          IF PurchLineL.FINDSET THEN
            IF PurchLineL."Document Type" = PurchLineL."Document Type"::Order THEN
              REPEAT
                IF VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Purchase" = VehicleSetupG."Mand. Veh. Pos. for Purchase"::Error THEN BEGIN
                  IF PurchLineL."Parking Lot" = '' THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                    DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_ParkingLot',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                    Rec,
                    PurchLineL,
                    DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                    STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_ParkingLot,PurchLineL.VIN),
                    DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Start EU.0112354
                  IF ParkingLotL.GET(PurchLineL."Parking Lot") THEN
                    IF ParkingLotL."Enable Parking Bay" THEN
                      IF PurchLineL."Parking Bay" = '' THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                        DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_ParkingBay',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                        Rec,
                        PurchLineL,
                        DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                        STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_ParkingBay,PurchLineL.VIN),
                        DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
      // Stop EU.0112354
                END ELSE BEGIN
                  IF PurchLineL."Parking Lot" = '' THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                    DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_ParkingLot',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                      Rec,
                      PurchLineL,
                      DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                      STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_ParkingLot,PurchLineL.VIN),
                      DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
      // Start EU.0112354
                  IF ParkingLotL.GET(PurchLineL."Parking Lot") THEN
                    IF ParkingLotL."Enable Parking Bay" THEN
                      IF PurchLineL."Parking Bay" = '' THEN
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
                        DocWarningTempL.AddPurchaseWarningLine('C_INC_ParkingLot',
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
                          Rec,
                          PurchLineL,
                          DocWarningTempL."Error Type"::Field,
                          STRSUBSTNO(C_INC_ParkingBay,PurchLineL.VIN),
                          DocWarningTempL.Category::Warning);
      // Stop EU.0112354
                END;
              UNTIL PurchLineL.NEXT = 0;
        END;
      // Stop EU.0112354
      RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      DocWarningSetupG.GetWarnings(DocWarningTempL,RecRefL,'');
      // Start EU.0200720.202488
      OnAfterDocumentWarningLinesCreatedEvent(DocWarningTempL, Rec);
      // Stop EU.0200720.202488
      DocWarningTempL.RESET;
      IF DocWarningTempL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
        IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, DocWarningTempL) <> ACTION::LookupOK THEN
          EXIT(FALSE);
        DocWarningTempL.RESET;
        DocWarningTempL.SETRANGE(Category,DocWarningTempL.Category::Error);
        IF DocWarningTempL.FINDFIRST THEN
      // Stop PA033019
          EXIT(FALSE);
      END;
      EXIT(TRUE);
    END;

    PROCEDURE LockReleasePostingOption@4(ChangeP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA033319.7801296
      SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Receive,ChangeP);
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
      SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Invoice,ChangeP);
      SetPostOptionEditable(PostOptionG::Both,ChangeP);
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetPostOption@1119432002(PostOptionNoP@1119432000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA031550
      // Start PA033319.7801296
      IF NOT (PostOptionNoP IN [PostOptionG::Receive,PostOptionG::Invoice,PostOptionG::Both]) THEN
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
        ERROR(C_INC032);
      // Start PA033319.7801296
      PostCheckBoxG[1] := (PostOptionNoP = PostOptionG::Receive);
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
      PostCheckBoxG[2] := (PostOptionNoP = PostOptionG::Invoice);
      PostCheckBoxG[3] := (PostOptionNoP = PostOptionG::Both);
      PostOptionG := PostOptionNoP;
      // Stop PA031550
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetPostOptionEditable@1119432000(PostOptionNoP@1119432000 : Integer;EditableP@1119432001 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA031550
      // Start PA033319.7801296
      IF NOT (PostOptionNoP IN [PostOptionG::Receive,PostOptionG::Invoice,PostOptionG::Both]) THEN
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
        ERROR(C_INC032);
      // Stop PA036549.32799
      CASE PostOptionNoP OF
      // Start PA033319.7801296
        PostOptionG::Receive:
          PostReceiptEditableG := EditableP;
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
        PostOptionG::Invoice:
          PostInvoiceEditableG := EditableP;
        PostOptionG::Both:
          PostReceiptAndInvoiceEditableG := EditableP;
      END;
      // Stop PA036549.32799
      // Stop PA031550
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetCashOptionOnSetPostOption@1119432001(PostOptionNoP@1119432000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA031550
      //Set cash payment PostOptionG depending on current posting option
      CASE PostOptionNoP OF
      // Start PA033319.7801296
        PostOptionG::Receive:
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
          BEGIN
            SetCashOption(CashOptionG::" ");
            SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",FALSE);
            SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",FALSE);
          END;

        PostOptionG::Invoice:
          BEGIN
            IF (PostOptionG IN [PostOptionG::Invoice,PostOptionG::Both]) AND "Cash Payment" THEN BEGIN
              IF CashOptionG = CashOptionG::" " THEN
                SetCashOption(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip");
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",TRUE);
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",TRUE);
            END ELSE BEGIN
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",FALSE);
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",FALSE);
            END;
          END;

        PostOptionG::Both:
          BEGIN
            IF (PostOptionG IN [PostOptionG::Invoice,PostOptionG::Both]) AND "Cash Payment" THEN BEGIN
              IF CashOptionG = CashOptionG::" " THEN
                CashOptionG := CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip";
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",TRUE);
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",TRUE);
            END ELSE BEGIN
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip",FALSE);
              SetCashOptionEditable(CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt",FALSE);
            END;
          END;
      END;
      // Stop PA031550
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetCashOption@1119432005(CashOptionNoP@1119432000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA031550
      IF NOT (CashOptionNoP IN [CashOptionG::" ", CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip", CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt"]) THEN
        ERROR(C_INC033);
      CashCheckBoxG[1] := (CashOptionNoP = CashOptionG::" ");
      CashCheckBoxG[2] := (CashOptionNoP = CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip");
      CashCheckBoxG[3] := (CashOptionNoP = CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt");
      CashOptionG := CashOptionNoP;
      // Stop PA031550
    END;

    PROCEDURE SetCashOptionEditable@1119432004(CashOptionNoP@1119432000 : Integer;EditableP@1119432001 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      // Start PA031550
      IF NOT (CashOptionNoP IN [CashOptionG::" ", CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip", CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt"]) THEN
        ERROR(C_INC033);
      // Stop PA036549.32799
      CASE CashOptionNoP OF
        CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt Slip" :
          CashSmallReceiptEditableG := EditableP;
        CashOptionG::"Cash Receipt":
          CashLargeReceiptEditableG := EditableP;
      END;
      // Stop PA036549.32799
      // Stop PA031550
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoPermissionForInvoicingOrShippingExists@1101219227() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ Abort if no permission for invoicing or receive exists.
      // @ retval of type Boolean.

      // Start PA033988
      CASE "Document Type" OF
        "Document Type"::Order,"Document Type"::Invoice:
      // Start PA043221
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Receipt" AND NOT UserSetupG."Post Purchase Invoice");
        "Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Purch. Return Order" AND NOT UserSetupG."Post Purch. Credit Memo");
      // Stop PA043221
      END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA033988
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE InvoicingPermissionExistsWithoutShippingPermission@1101219229() : Boolean;
    VAR
      PurchLineL@1055600 : Record 39;
    BEGIN
      // @ TRUE if invoicing/crediting permission exists without receiving/returning permission. In case of Invoice and Credit Memo, it also checks the possible
      // @ receipts not invoiced that got into the Invoice and the possible return shipments not credited that got into the Credit Memo
      // @ retval of type Boolean.

      // Start PA033988
      CASE "Document Type" OF
      // Start PA043221
      // Start PA045085
        "Document Type"::Order:
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Receipt" AND UserSetupG."Post Purchase Invoice");
        "Document Type"::Invoice:
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Receipt" AND ToBeReceivedG AND UserSetupG."Post Purchase Invoice");
        "Document Type"::"Return Order":
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Purch. Return Order" AND UserSetupG."Post Purch. Credit Memo");
        "Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Purch. Return Order" AND ToBeReceivedG AND UserSetupG."Post Purch. Credit Memo");
      // Stop PA045085
      // Stop PA043221
      END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA033988
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ShippingPermissionExistsWithoutInvoicingPermission@1101219233() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // @ Abort if shipping permission exists without a quantity to ship.
      // @ retval of type Boolean.

      // Start PA033988
      CASE "Document Type" OF
      // Start PA043221
        "Document Type"::Order,"Document Type"::Invoice:
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Purchase Invoice" AND UserSetupG."Post Receipt");
        "Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
          EXIT(NOT UserSetupG."Post Purch. Credit Memo" AND UserSetupG."Post Purch. Return Order");
      // Stop PA043221
      END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop PA033988
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckOpenSalesIncentivesExist@1109407003(VINP@1109400000 : Code[20];AreaP@1109400001 : Integer) : Boolean;
    VAR
      PostedSalesIncentiveLineL@1109400002 : Record 5025487;
    BEGIN
      // @ Function check if posted sales incentives exist, which have a received amount.
      // @ param VINP : VIN for which the sales incentives are searched.
      // @ param AreaP : Sales incentive area for which the sales incentives are searched.
      // @ retval of type Boolean, which means corresponding sales incentives exist.
      // Start PA041187.93643
      PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.SETCURRENTKEY(VIN,"Book No.");
      PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.SETRANGE(VIN,VINP);
      IF AreaP >= 0 THEN
        PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.SETRANGE(Area,AreaP);
      PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.SETRANGE(Posted,TRUE);
      PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.SETRANGE(Closed,FALSE);
      PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.SETFILTER("Amount Received (LCY)",'>0');
      EXIT(NOT PostedSalesIncentiveLineL.ISEMPTY);
      // Stop PA041187.93643
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OKOnPush@19066895();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0080818
      // Stop EU.0080818
      CASE PostOptionG OF
      // Start PA033319.7801296
        PostOptionG::Receive:
      // Stop PA033319.7801296
          BEGIN
            IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN BEGIN
              Receive := FALSE;
              Ship := TRUE;
            END ELSE BEGIN
              Receive := TRUE;
              Ship := FALSE;
            END;
            Invoice := FALSE;
          END;
        PostOptionG::Invoice:
          BEGIN
            Receive := FALSE;
            Ship := FALSE;
            Invoice := TRUE;
          END;
        PostOptionG::Both:
          BEGIN
            IF "Document Type" IN ["Document Type"::"Return Order","Document Type"::"Credit Memo"] THEN BEGIN
              Receive := FALSE;
              Ship := TRUE;
            END ELSE BEGIN
              Receive := TRUE;
              Ship := FALSE;
            END;
            Invoice := TRUE;
          END;
      END;
      // Start PA035222
      // Stop PA035222
      IF "Cash Payment" THEN BEGIN
        "Cash Payment Document Type" := CashOptionG;
      END ELSE BEGIN
        "Cash Payment Document Type" := "Cash Payment Document Type"::" ";
      END;
      // Start PA039250.51242
      SkipDocumentStatusCodeCheck();
      // Stop PA039250.51242
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      CurrPage.CLOSE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CancelOnPush@19054690();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA033019.9239546
      Receive := FALSE;
      Ship := FALSE;
      Invoice := FALSE;
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      // Start PA033019.9239546
      CurrPage.CLOSE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CheckToBeReceived@1055600(PurchLineP@1055601 : Record 39;VAR ToBeReceivedP@1055600 : Boolean);
    VAR
      PurchReceiptLineL@1055602 : Record 121;
      ReturnShipLineL@1055603 : Record 6651;
      QtyToReceiveL@1055604 : Decimal;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function checks if the line passed as a parameter is going to be received in case of Invoice or returned in case of Credit Memo
      // @ This is TRUE if the line is not related to any receipt/return shipment or has no pending receipts to invoice or return shipments to credit
      // @ param PurchLineP : record based on Purchase Line to check
      // @ param ToBeReceivedP : boolean with the result of the check by reference. There is no longer check in case the parameter is TRUE which means
      // @ a previous purchase line was found to be received
      // Start PA045085
      IF ToBeReceivedP THEN   // no further check if other line has already been found to be received
        EXIT;
      CASE PurchLineP."Document Type" OF
        PurchLineP."Document Type"::Invoice:
          BEGIN
            IF PurchReceiptLineL.GET(PurchLineP."Receipt No.", PurchLineP."Receipt Line No.") THEN BEGIN
              ToBeReceivedP := PurchLineP.Quantity > PurchReceiptLineL."Qty. Rcd. Not Invoiced";
            END ELSE
              ToBeReceivedP := PurchLineP.Quantity > 0;
          END;
        PurchLineP."Document Type"::"Credit Memo":
          BEGIN
            IF ReturnShipLineL.GET(PurchLineP."Return Shipment No.", PurchLineP."Return Shipment Line No.") THEN BEGIN
              ToBeReceivedP := PurchLineP.Quantity > ReturnShipLineL."Return Qty. Shipped Not Invd.";
            END ELSE
              ToBeReceivedP := PurchLineP.Quantity > 0;
          END;
      END;
      // Stop PA045085
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE __START_EVENTS__@72000();
    BEGIN
    END;

OBJECT Page 5028747 Req. Worksheet Compressed
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=01/12/24;
    Time=[ 6:26:44 AM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Req. Worksheet;
    SaveValues=No;
    SourceTable=Table246;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    DataCaptionFields=Journal Batch Name;
    PageType=Worksheet;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             // Start EU.0017374.16494
             ReserveAllG := TRUE;
             // Stop EU.0017374.16494
           END;

    OnOpenPage=VAR
                 JnlSelectedL@1119432000 : Boolean;
               BEGIN
                 // Start PA031550.0103
                 OpenedFromBatchG := ("Journal Batch Name" > '') AND ("Worksheet Template Name" = '');
                 IF OpenedFromBatchG THEN BEGIN
                   CurrJnlBatchNameG := "Journal Batch Name";
                   ReqWkshJnlMgntG.OpenJnl(CurrJnlBatchNameG,Rec);
                 // Start PA032834
                   AssignFilterValues("Worksheet Template Name","Journal Batch Name");
                 // Stop PA032834
                   EXIT;
                 END;
                 ReqWkshJnlMgntG.TemplateSelectionNew(PAGE::"Req. Worksheet Compressed",FALSE,0,Rec,JnlSelectedL);  //PA031550.738083
                 IF NOT JnlSelectedL THEN
                   ERROR('');
                 CurrJnlBatchNameG := "Journal Batch Name";
                 // Stop PA031550.0103

                 ReqWkshJnlMgntG.OpenJnl(CurrJnlBatchNameG,Rec);
                 IF (Type = Type::" ") AND (xRec.Type = xRec.Type::" ") THEN
                   Type := Type::Item;
                 // Start PA032399
                 ViewG := ViewG::Uncompressed;
                 // Stop PA032399
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0000370
                       ReqWkshFunctionsG.RefreshItemTransferSuggestion(Rec);
                       COMMIT;
                       // Stop EU.0000370
                       // Start PA040667
                       // Start PA041187.89475
                       CodedPartValuesEnabledG := ItemG.GET("No.") AND (Type = Type::Item) AND (ItemG."Coded Part Type" <> '');
                       // Stop PA041187.89475
                       // Stop PA040667

                       // Start PA032834
                       IF ("Worksheet Template Name" <> xRec."Worksheet Template Name") OR
                          ("Journal Batch Name" <> xRec."Journal Batch Name")
                       THEN
                         AssignFilterValues("Worksheet Template Name","Journal Batch Name");
                       // Stop PA032834
                       // Start EU.0000370
                       ReqWkshJnlMgntG.GetDescriptionAndRcptName(Rec, Description2G, BuyFromVendNameG);
                       CalculateTempItemUsage(FALSE);
                       CALCFIELDS("Available Qty. for Transfer");
                       // Stop EU.0000370
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=VAR
                  UserSessionL@1109400002 : Record 5028686;
                BEGIN
                  ReqWkshJnlMgntG.SetUpNewLine(Rec,xRec);
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  IF Type = Type::" " THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  UserSessionUnitG.GetUserSession(UserSessionL);
                  VALIDATE("Location Code",UserSessionL."Location Code");

                  // Start PA032834
                  IF ("Worksheet Template Name" <> xRec."Worksheet Template Name") OR
                     ("Journal Batch Name" <> xRec."Journal Batch Name")
                  THEN
                    AssignFilterValues("Worksheet Template Name","Journal Batch Name");
                   // Stop PA032834
                  // Start EU.0000370
                  ReqWkshJnlMgntG.GetDescriptionAndRcptName(Rec, Description2G, BuyFromVendNameG);
                  CalculateTempItemUsage(FALSE);
                  // Stop EU.0000370
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     IF ViewG = ViewG::Compressed THEN
                       ERROR(C_INC007);
                   END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000003;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=RelatedInformation }
      { 29      ;1   ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Item }
      { 30      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Card;
                      ShortCutKey=Shift+F7;
                      CaptionML=ENU=&Card;
                      RunObject=Codeunit 335;
                      Image=EditLines }

                      CaptionML=ENU=&Item Availability by }

                                 ItemAvailability(0);
