      { 81      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Reorder Inventory Items;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Reorder &Inventory Items;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      Image=Calculate;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 RequisitionWorksheetsL@1109400003 : Report 5028759;
                                 DemandRequisitionWorksheetL@1109400004 : Report 5028756;
                                 UserFilterL@1109400006 : Record 5060955;
                                 UserSessionL@1109400005 : Codeunit 5028665;
                                 RecRefL@1109400007 : RecordRef;
                               BEGIN
                                 ReqWkshNameG.GET("Worksheet Template Name","Journal Batch Name");
                                 ReqWkshNameG.TESTFIELD(ReqWkshNameG."Requisition Method");
                                 RequisitionMethodG.GET(ReqWkshNameG."Requisition Method");
                                 // Start PA044812
                                 IF ReqWkshNameG."Vendor Filter" > '' THEN
                                   RequisitionMethodG.TESTFIELD("Priority for Vendor Suggestion", RequisitionMethodG."Priority for Vendor Suggestion"::"Fixed Vendor");
                                 ItemG.RESET;
                                 // Start PA035597
                                 // Start EU.0000370;
                                 ItemG.SETFILTER("Make Code", ReqWkshNameG."Make Filter");
                                 ItemG.SETFILTER("Vendor No.", ReqWkshNameG."Vendor Filter");
                                 ItemG.SETFILTER("Location Filter", ReqWkshNameG."Location Filter");
                                 ItemG.SETFILTER("Bin Filter", ReqWkshNameG."Bin Filter");
                                 // Stop EU.0000370;
                                 // Stop PA035597
                                 // Stop PA044812
                                 RecRefL.GETTABLE(ItemG);
                                 IF UserFilterL.SetFilters(RecRefL) THEN BEGIN
                                   UserSessionL.SetFilter(TRUE,UserFilterL);
                                   ItemG.SETVIEW(RecRefL.GETVIEW);
                                 END;

                                 CASE RequisitionMethodG."Requisition System" OF
                                   RequisitionMethodG."Requisition System"::"Requirements Planning":
                                     BEGIN
                                       DemandRequisitionWorksheetL.SETTABLEVIEW(ItemG);
                                       DemandRequisitionWorksheetL.DefReqWkshTemplate("Worksheet Template Name","Journal Batch Name");
                                       DemandRequisitionWorksheetL.RUNMODAL;
                                       IF DemandRequisitionWorksheetL.StoreFilter(RecRefL) THEN BEGIN
                                         IF UserFilterL."User ID" = '' THEN BEGIN
                                           UserFilterL."User ID" := USERID;
                                 // Start PA044812
                                           UserFilterL."Table No." := DATABASE::Item;
                                 // Stop PA044812
                                         END;
                                         UserFilterL.StoreFilter(RecRefL);
                                       END;
                                       CLEAR(DemandRequisitionWorksheetL);
                                     END;
                                   RequisitionMethodG."Requisition System"::"Inventory Planning":
                                     BEGIN
                                       RequisitionWorksheetsL.SETTABLEVIEW(ItemG);
                                       RequisitionWorksheetsL.DefReqWkshTemplate("Worksheet Template Name","Journal Batch Name");
                                       RequisitionWorksheetsL.RUNMODAL;
                                       IF RequisitionWorksheetsL.StoreFilter(RecRefL) THEN BEGIN
                                         IF UserFilterL."User ID" = '' THEN BEGIN
                                           UserFilterL."User ID" := USERID;
                                 // Start PA044812
                                           UserFilterL."Table No." := DATABASE::Item;
                                 // Stop PA044812
                                         END;
                                         UserFilterL.StoreFilter(RecRefL);
                                       END;
                                       CLEAR(RequisitionWorksheetsL);
                                     END;
                                 END;
                               END;
                                }

      { 37      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Create Orders;
                      Ellipsis=Yes;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Create &Orders;
                      Promoted=Yes;
                      PromotedIsBig=Yes;
                      Image=MakeOrder;
                      PromotedCategory=Process;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 MakePurchOrderL@1109400001 : Report 493;
                                 ContinueL@1109400002 : Boolean;
                                 ReordLineL@1109400003 : Record 246;
                                 VdrOrderTypeL@1109400004 : Record 5028746;
                                 RespectPkgQuantitiesL@1116500001 : Boolean;
                               BEGIN
                                 ContinueL := TRUE;
                                 ItemTransferSuggestionG.SETRANGE(ItemTransferSuggestionG."Worksheet Template Name","Worksheet Template Name");
                                 ItemTransferSuggestionG.SETRANGE(ItemTransferSuggestionG."Journal Batch Name","Journal Batch Name");
                                 ItemTransferSuggestionG.SETRANGE(ItemTransferSuggestionG."Item Transfer Req. Worksheet",TRUE);
                                 ItemTransferSuggestionG.SETFILTER(ItemTransferSuggestionG."Quantity to Transfer",'>0');
                                 // Start EU.0000370;
                                 IF NOT ItemTransferSuggestionG.ISEMPTY THEN
                                   ContinueL := CONFIRM(C_INC005);
                                 // Stop EU.0000370;
                                 ReordLineL.SETCURRENTKEY("Worksheet Template Name", "Journal Batch Name", "Vendor No.");
                                 ReordLineL.SETRANGE("Worksheet Template Name","Worksheet Template Name");
                                 ReordLineL.SETRANGE("Journal Batch Name","Journal Batch Name");
                                 IF ReordLineL.FIND('-') THEN BEGIN
                                   ReqWkshNameG.GET("Worksheet Template Name",ReordLineL."Journal Batch Name");
                                   RequisitionMethodG.GET(ReqWkshNameG."Requisition Method");
                                   RespectPkgQuantitiesL := RequisitionMethodG."Respect Package Quantities";
                                   IF NOT RespectPkgQuantitiesL THEN BEGIN
                                     REPEAT
                                       VdrOrderTypeL.RESET;
                                       VdrOrderTypeL.SETRANGE("Vendor No.", ReordLineL."Vendor No.");
                                       VdrOrderTypeL.SETRANGE("Purch. Order Type", ReqWkshNameG."Purch. Order Type");
                                       VdrOrderTypeL.SETRANGE("Make Code", ReordLineL."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code");
                                       IF VdrOrderTypeL.FIND('-') THEN
                                         RespectPkgQuantitiesL := VdrOrderTypeL."Respect Package Quantities"
                                       ELSE BEGIN
                                         VdrOrderTypeL.SETRANGE("Make Code", '');
                                         IF VdrOrderTypeL.FIND('-') THEN
                                           RespectPkgQuantitiesL := VdrOrderTypeL."Respect Package Quantities";
                                       END;
                                       ReordLineL.SETRANGE("Vendor No.", ReordLineL."Vendor No.");
                                       ReordLineL.FIND('+');
                                       ReordLineL.SETRANGE("Vendor No.");
                                     UNTIL RespectPkgQuantitiesL OR (ReordLineL.NEXT = 0);
                                   END;
                                   IF RespectPkgQuantitiesL THEN BEGIN
                                     IF MarkMinOrderQtyNotReached(ReordLineL,"Worksheet Template Name", "Journal Batch Name") THEN BEGIN
                                       IF CONFIRM(C_INC006, TRUE) THEN
                                         PAGE.RUNMODAL(PAGE::"Purch. Order Qty below Min.", ReordLineL);
                                     END;
                                   END;
                                 END;
                                 IF ContinueL THEN BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0000370;
                                 // Stop EU.0000370;
                                   CheckMinOrderValueUndercutting(Rec);
                                   MakePurchOrderL.SetReqWkshLine(Rec);
                                 // Start PA040070.62802
                                   MakePurchOrderL.InitializeRequest("Expiration Date", "Order Date", WORKDATE, "Expected Receipt Date", '', FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA040070.62802
                                   MakePurchOrderL.RUNMODAL;
                                   MakePurchOrderL.GetReqWkshLine(Rec);
                                 // Start EU.0000370;
                                 // Stop EU.0000370;
                                   CurrJnlBatchNameG := GETRANGEMAX("Journal Batch Name");
                                   CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                                 END;
                               END;
                                }

      { 83      ;2   ;Action    ;
                      Name=Req. Worksheet in Another Purch. Order Type;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Req. Worksheet in Another Purch. Order Type;
                      Description=PA044812;
                      Image=Export;
                      OnAction=VAR
                                 NewReqWkshNameL@1109400001 : Record 245;
                                 NewReqLineL@1109400002 : Record 246;
                                 ReqLineL@1055600 : Record 246;
                               BEGIN
                                 // First delimit all Requisition Worksheet Lines
                                 // Start PA045116
                                 // Start EU.0103686.104337
                                 IF ReserveAllG THEN
                                   // Copy all lines
                                   ReqLineL.COPYFILTERS(Rec)
                                 ELSE
                                   // Copy only selected lines
                                   CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(ReqLineL);
                                 IF ReqLineL.ISEMPTY THEN
                                 // Start EU.0000370;
                                   ERROR(C_INC001);
                                 // Stop EU.0103686.104337
                                 IF PAGE.RUNMODAL(0, NewReqWkshNameL) = ACTION::LookupOK THEN BEGIN
                                   IF NewReqWkshNameL.Name = "Journal Batch Name" THEN BEGIN
                                     MESSAGE(C_INC002);
                                   END ELSE BEGIN
                                 // Start EU.0103686.104337
                                     ReqLineL.FINDSET;
                                 // Stop EU.0103686.104337
                                     REPEAT
                                 // Start EU.0103686.104337
                                       NewReqLineL := ReqLineL;
                                 // Stop EU.0103686.104337
                                       NewReqLineL."Worksheet Template Name" := NewReqWkshNameL."Worksheet Template Name";
                                       NewReqLineL."Journal Batch Name" := NewReqWkshNameL.Name;
                                       NewReqLineL."Line No." := NewReqLineL.GetNextLineNo();
                                       NewReqLineL.INSERT;
                                 // Start EU.0103686.104337
                                       IF ReqLineL."Reserved Qty. (Base)" <> 0 THEN BEGIN
                                 // Stop EU.0103686.104337
                                         NewReqLineL."Reserved Quantity" := 0;
                                         NewReqLineL."Reserved Qty. (Base)" := 0;
                                 // Start EU.0103686.104337
                                 // Start EU.0004860
                                         ReservMgntG.TransferReqLineToReqLine(ReqLineL, NewReqLineL, ReqLineL."Reserved Qty. (Base)");
                                 // Stop EU.0004860;
                                         ReqLineL.TESTFIELD("Reserved Qty. (Base)", 0);
                                         ReqLineL.MODIFY;
                                 // Stop EU.0103686.104337
                                       END;
                                       NewReqLineL.VALIDATE("No.");
                                       NewReqLineL.VALIDATE(Quantity);
                                       NewReqLineL.MODIFY(TRUE);
                                 // Start EU.0103686.104337
                                       ReqLineL.DELETE(TRUE);
                                     UNTIL ReqLineL.NEXT = 0;
                                 // Stop EU.0103686.104337
                                   END;
                                 END;
                                 // Stop EU.0000370;
                                 CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                                 // Stop PA045116
                               END;
                                }

    PROCEDURE CalculateTempItemUsage@2(ViewCompressedP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      TempItemUsageG.RESET;

      TempItemUsageG.DELETEALL;
      UsageQty12MG := 0;
      NoOfLines12MG := 0;
      // Start PA032509
      //"Manufacturer Req. Status" := '';
      // Stop PA032509
      "Replacement Status" := "Replacement Status"::" ";

      IF (Type <> Type::Item) AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;

      IF NOT ItemG.GET("No.") THEN
        EXIT;

      TempItemUsageG.INIT;
      TempItemUsageG."Item No." := "No.";

      IF ViewCompressedP THEN
        TempItemUsageG."Calculation level" := TempItemUsageG."Calculation level"::Item
      ELSE BEGIN
        TempItemUsageG."Calculation level" := TempItemUsageG."Calculation level"::Bin;
        TempItemUsageG."Location Code" := "Location Code";
        TempItemUsageG."Bin Code" := "Bin Code";
      END;
      CalculateItemUsageG.CalcRequi("No.",
        TempItemUsageG,
        CALCDATE('<-12M>',WORKDATE),
        WORKDATE);
      UsageQty12MG := TempItemUsageG."Sale Quantity";
      NoOfLines12MG := TempItemUsageG."Line Count";

      // Start PA032509
      CALCFIELDS("Replacement Status");
      // Stop PA032509
    END;

    PROCEDURE AssignFilterValues@1115000000(WorksheetTemplateNameP@1109400000 : Code[10];JnlBatchNameP@1109400001 : Code[10]);
    BEGIN
      // @ Defaults the (Make Filter, Vendor Filter, Location Filter, Bin Filter) from the selected 'Req. worksheet name'.
      // Start PA032834
      // Start EU.0000370
      IF NOT ReqWkshNameG.GET(WorksheetTemplateNameP, JnlBatchNameP) THEN
        CLEAR(ReqWkshNameG);
      // Stop EU.0000370
      // Stop PA032834
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ShowTransferFromLocationCodes@37000() : Text;
    VAR
      ItemTransferSuggestionL@37001 : Record 5028738;
      LocationCodeStringL@37000 : Text;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function will show for the current Rec all active "From Loaction codes + transfer qty in a string.
      // Start EU.0000370
      ItemTransferSuggestionL.SETRANGE("Worksheet Template Name", "Worksheet Template Name");
      ItemTransferSuggestionL.SETRANGE("Journal Batch Name", "Journal Batch Name");
      ItemTransferSuggestionL.SETRANGE("Line No.", "Line No.");
      ItemTransferSuggestionL.SETRANGE("Perform Quantity Transfer", TRUE);
      IF ItemTransferSuggestionL.FINDSET THEN BEGIN
        REPEAT
          LocationCodeStringL := LocationCodeStringL + '; ' + ItemTransferSuggestionL."From Location Code";
          IF ItemTransferSuggestionL."From Bin Code" > '' THEN
            LocationCodeStringL := LocationCodeStringL + ',' + ItemTransferSuggestionL."From Bin Code";
          LocationCodeStringL := LocationCodeStringL + ' (' + FORMAT(ItemTransferSuggestionL."Quantity to Transfer") + ')';
        UNTIL ItemTransferSuggestionL.NEXT = 0;
        LocationCodeStringL := COPYSTR(LocationCodeStringL, 3);
      END;
      EXIT(LocationCodeStringL);
      // Stop EU.0000370
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE SetAllTransferLines@37001(ItemTransferVaueP@37000 : Boolean);
    VAR
      ReqLineL@37001 : Record 246;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function can be used to activate/deactivate the "Item Transfer" field for all line in the current worksheet
      // Start EU.0000370
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      ReqLineL.COPY(Rec);
      ReqLineL.SETRANGE("Worksheet Template Name", "Worksheet Template Name");
      ReqLineL.SETRANGE("Journal Batch Name", "Journal Batch Name");
      ReqLineL.SETRANGE("Item Transfer", NOT ItemTransferVaueP);
      ReqLineL.SETRANGE(Type, ReqLineL.Type::Item);
      IF ReqLineL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          ReqWkshFunctionsG.RefreshItemTransferSuggestion(ReqLineL);
          ReqLineL.CALCFIELDS("Available Qty. for Transfer");
          IF ReqLineL."Available Qty. for Transfer" > 0 THEN
            ReqLineL.VALIDATE("Item Transfer", ItemTransferVaueP)
          ELSE
            IF ReqLineL."Item Transfer" THEN
              ReqLineL.VALIDATE("Item Transfer", FALSE);
          ReqLineL.MODIFY;
        UNTIL ReqLineL.NEXT = 0;
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0000370
    END;

OBJECT Page 5045779 Parts Purchase Order Subform
{
  OBJECT-PROPERTIES
  {
    Date=04/24/25;
    Time=[ 2:14:39 PM];
    Version List=N.7.2.1;
  }
  PROPERTIES
  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Lines;
    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table39;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Order));
    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start PA036549.33408
                 UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
                 // Stop PA036549.33408
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       ItemL@1109400000 : Record 27;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                       // Start PA036549.33408
                       HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                       // Stop PA036549.33408
                       // Start PA040667
                       // Start PA041187.89475
                       CodedPartValuesEnabledG := ItemL.GET("No.") AND (Type = Type::Item) AND (ItemL."Coded Part Type" <> '');
                       // Stop PA041187.89475
                       // Stop PA040667
                       // Start EU.0017374
                       CockpitNoOfIssuesStyleG := "No. of Cockpit Issues" > 0;
                       // Stop EU.0017374
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases";
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::Item THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::"Account (G/L)" THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::"G/L Account";
                  IF PurchHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN BEGIN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := PurchHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                  END;
                  // Start PA036549.33408
                  HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                  // Stop PA036549.33408
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA036549.33408
                     HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                     // Stop PA036549.33408
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042761
                     UpdatePurchLineTotalFactbox();
                     // Stop PA042761
                   END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS
    {
      { 1900000004;0 ;ActionContainer;
                      ActionContainerType=ActionItems }
      { 1906587504;1 ;ActionGroup;
                      CaptionML=ENU=F&unctions }
      { 1901741804;2 ;Action    ;
                      CaptionML=ENU=Calculate &Invoice Discount;
                      Image=CalculateInvoiceDiscount;
                      OnAction=BEGIN
                                 ApproveCalcInvDisc;
                               END;

  CODE
  {
    VAR
      UserSetupG@1109400005 : Record 91;
      PurchHdrG@1109400007 : Record 38;
      OnLookupItemG@1109400006 : Record 27;
      CockpitHdrG@1109400003 : Record 5025740;
      TransfExtTextG@1109400000 : Codeunit 378;
      DocLineTrackingG@1109400001 : Page 5206913;
      FormUpdateG@1109400004 : Boolean;
      C_IMS001@1101353000 : TextConst 'ENU=Purchase Order %1 Line %2 is linked to Import Costing.\Receipt before calculating Invoice Discount.';
      ShortcutDimCodeG@1109400002 : ARRAY [8] OF Code[20];
      C_INC066@1000000000 : TextConst 'ENU=The document is locked since it was transferred to the Cockpit interface.';
      HideItemCostG@1109400008 : Boolean INDATASET;
      CodedPartValuesEnabledG@1109400010 : Boolean;
      CockpitNoOfIssuesStyleG@8524400 : Boolean;

    PROCEDURE ApproveCalcInvDisc@7();
    VAR
      PurchLineL@1101353000 : Record 39;
    BEGIN
      PurchLineL.RESET;
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document Type","Document Type");
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Document No.","Document No.");
      PurchLineL.SETRANGE("Quantity Received",0);
      PurchLineL.SETFILTER("Import Costing No.",'<>%1','');
      IF PurchLineL.FIND('-') THEN
        ERROR(C_IMS001,"Document No.",PurchLineL."Line No.");

      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Purch.-Disc. (Yes/No)",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDisc@1();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Purch.-Calc.Discount",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE ExplodeBOM@3();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Purch.-Explode BOM",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenSalesOrderForm@5();
    VAR
      SalesHdrL@1109400000 : Record 36;
      SalesOrderL@1109400001 : Page 5045788;
    BEGIN
      SalesHdrL.SETRANGE("No.","Sales Order No.");
      SalesOrderL.SETTABLEVIEW(SalesHdrL);
      SalesOrderL.EDITABLE := FALSE;
      SalesOrderL.RUN;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524201();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 39;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdatePurchaseDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@6(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.PurchCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.InsertPurchExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransfExtTextG.MakeUpdate THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDocumentLineTracking@10();
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(DocLineTrackingG);
      DocLineTrackingG.SetDoc(1,"Document No.","Line No.");
      DocLineTrackingG.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE StartDisplayInLine@5025351(NewDocNumberP@1109400000 : Code[20];NewLineNumberP@1109400001 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF FIND('-') THEN
        ;
      IF GET("Document Type"::Order,NewDocNumberP,NewLineNumberP) THEN
        xRec.GET("Document Type"::Order,NewDocNumberP,NewLineNumberP);
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@5025352();
    VAR
      ItemAvailabilityL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028701;
    BEGIN
      ItemAvailabilityL.DisplayByPurchLine('',Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@5025353();
    VAR
      CampMgtL@1109400001 : Codeunit 5045777;
      AreaL@1109400000 : 'Purchase,Sale';
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032178.1446608
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;

      FormUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      IF Quantity = 0 THEN
      // Start PA032651.2480919
        IF (Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"]) AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA032651.2480919
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597

      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts

      // Start PA035597
      IF FormUpdateG THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA032178.1446608
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowSourceOfDemand@1119432000();
    BEGIN
      // @ The function has to call the list form with linked "Source of Demand" records.
      // Start PA032450
      ShowSourceOfDemand;
      // Stop PA032450
    END;

    PROCEDURE SpecialFunctionCall@1101287075();
    VAR
      RecordReferenceL@1101287076 : RecordRef;
      FormSpecialFunctionsL@1101287075 : Page 5206814;
    BEGIN
      // @ Sets the parameters to the special function form
      // Start PA033895.I000854

      RecordReferenceL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(FormSpecialFunctionsL);
      FormSpecialFunctionsL.SetParameters(PAGE::"Parts Purchase Order Subform",RecordReferenceL,"Shortcut Dimension 2 Code",'');
      FormSpecialFunctionsL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA033895.I000854
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
      // Start PA042761
      UpdatePurchLineTotalFactbox()
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UnitofMeasureCodeOnAfterValida@19057939();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReserveOnAfterValidate@19004502();
    BEGIN
      IF (Reserve = Reserve::Always) AND ("Outstanding Qty. (Base)" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoofCampaignsOnDeactivate@19054112();
    BEGIN
      IF GET("Document Type","Document No.","Line No.") THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckChangePermisionInForm@5025370();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA037059.31031
      IF "Order Type" <> "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases" THEN
        EXIT;
      IF PurchHdrG."Cockpit Entry No." = 0 THEN
        EXIT;
      IF NOT CockpitHdrG.GET(PurchHdrG."Cockpit Entry No.") THEN
        EXIT;
      IF (CockpitHdrG."Document Type" = CockpitHdrG."Orig. Document Type") AND
         (CockpitHdrG."Processing Status" < CockpitHdrG."Processing Status"::Closed)
      THEN
        ERROR(C_INC066);
      // Stop PA037059.31031
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdatePurchLineTotalFactbox@1000000000();
    BEGIN
      // @ This function refreshes the Purchase Line Total Factbox
      // Start PA042098.80558
      CurrPage.UPDATE; // <-- Refresh of Purchase line for line based fact box
      IF PurchHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
        PurchHdrG.MODIFY; // <-- Refresh of Purchase Header for header based fact box
      // Stop PA042098.80558
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DoPostOnPushAction@17452300(PostingCodeunitP@17452300 : Integer);
    VAR
      SalesPostPrintL@17452302 : Codeunit 82;
      ErrorL@17452301 : Text;
      SkipTriggerL@18884100 : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0174523
      // Start EU.0188841.191671
      OnBeforeDoPostOnPushActionEvent(Rec, SkipTriggerL);
      IF SkipTriggerL THEN
        EXIT;
      // Stop EU.0188841.191671
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      UserSessionG.SetLock(TRUE);
      CLEARLASTERROR;
      IF NOT CODEUNIT.RUN(PostingCodeunitP,Rec) THEN
        ErrorL := GETLASTERRORTEXT;
      UserSessionG.SetLock(FALSE);
      IF ErrorL <> '' THEN
        ERROR(ErrorL);
      IF "Job Queue Status" = "Job Queue Status"::"Scheduled for Posting" THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN
        CurrPage.CLOSE;
      xRec := Rec;
      CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0174523
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE RecordAccessibleWithCurrentFilters@88000() RecordChangedR : Boolean;
    VAR
      RecL@88001 : Record 36;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0162969.163739
      IF HASFILTER THEN
        IF RecL.GET(RECORDID) THEN BEGIN
          RecL.COPY(Rec, ISTEMPORARY);
          RecL.COPYFILTERS(Rec);
          RecL.SETRANGE("Document Type", "Document Type");
          RecL.SETRANGE("No.", "No.");
          IF NOT RecL.FINDFIRST THEN BEGIN
            CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
            IF NOT FIND('=><') THEN BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillClose, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              CurrPage.CLOSE;
            END ELSE BEGIN
              MESSAGE(C_INC_RecordOutOfFilterScope + C_INC_ThePageWillShowAnotherRecord, TABLECAPTION, GETFILTERS);
              xRec := Rec;
              CurrPage.UPDATE;
            END;
            EXIT(TRUE);
          END;
        END;
      EXIT(FALSE);
      // Stop EU.0162969.163739
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AddItemToCurrentShoppingCartOnAction@3245301();
    VAR
      RecL@3245302 : TEMPORARY Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032453
      CurrPage.SalesLines.PAGE.GetSelectedRecords(RecL);
      ShoppingCartMgtG.AddSalesLinesToShoppingCart(RecL, UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG, "Bill-to Customer No.");
      CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE CreateNewShoppingCartOnAction@3245302();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0032453
      IF NOT ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG THEN
        ShowShoppingCartFactBoxG := TRUE;
      ShoppingCartMgtG.CreateNewShoppingCartHdr(UserSetupG, ShoppingCartHdrG, "Bill-to Customer No.", "Supply VIN");
      CurrPage.SalesShoppingCart.PAGE.SetCart(ShoppingCartHdrG);
      CurrPage.UPDATE;
      // Stop EU.0032453
    END;

    PROCEDURE MarkLine@1109400010(DocTypeP@1109400000 : Integer;DocNoP@1109400001 : Code[20];LineNoP@1109400002 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF SalesLineG.GET(DocTypeP,DocNoP,LineNoP) THEN
        MarkedG := TRUE
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE IsImporter@5025800() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      EXIT(CompanyInfoG.IMSCheck());
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE EnableImporterTab@1101353003();
    VAR
      CompanyInfoL@1101353000 : Record 79;
    BEGIN
      IF NOT CompanyInfoL.IMSCheck THEN BEGIN
        "Dealer CodeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer ConfirmedEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer Confirmed DateEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer Confirmed TimeEnable" := FALSE;
        "Dealer Confirmed User IDEnable" := FALSE;
        "External Document No.Enable" := FALSE;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckMessageButtonEditable@1109400001();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032665
      // Start PA038224
      // Start PA038224.48059
      EnableMessageG := "Message Notification" <> '';
      // Stop PA038224.48059
      // Stop PA038224
      // Stop PA032665
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400003();
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA033011.5997953
      UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
      "Item Sales Price GroupEditable" := UserSetupG."Change Item Sales Price Group";
      ItemSalesPriceGroupEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Item Sales Price Group";
      // Stop PA033011.5997953
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowShipments@1101422631();
    VAR
      FormShippedLinesL@1101422630 : Page 5029020;
    BEGIN
      // @ Use the function to show the ship lines page
      // Start PA033978.I000905
      FormShippedLinesL.InitializeForm(DATABASE::"Sales Header","No.",0);
      FormShippedLinesL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA033978.I000905
    END;

             // Start PA036549.32799

             EUTireDataCodeEditableG := TRUE;

                 // Start PA032440

                 // Stop PA034527.19632
                 // Start PA035597
                 // Stop PA035597
                 // Stop PA033765
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       ItemL@1109400000 : Record 27;
                       RecRefL@1119427001 : RecordRef;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0104306
                       // Start EU.0126935.127725
                       IF ("Document No." <> SalesHdrG."No.") OR ("Line No." = 10000) THEN
                       // Stop EU.0126935.127725
                         IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
                           AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       // Start PA041510
                       // Start EU.0023758.17776
                       IF "No." <> '' THEN BEGIN
                       // Stop EU.0023758.17776
                         RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
                         ReservationSetupG.ApplyAvailabilityStatus(RecRefL);
                         RecRefL.SETTABLE(Rec);
                       // Start EU.0023758.17776
                       END;
                       // Stop EU.0023758.17776
                       // Stop PA041510
                       // Start PA042861
                       // Stop PA042861
                       // Start EU.0111610.113539
                       CLEAR(ExpectedQtyOnHandG);
                       // Stop EU.0111610.113539
                       CLEAR(InvtAvailableG);
                       IF (Type = Type::Item) AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
                         ItemG.GET("No.");
                         ItemG.SETFILTER("Date Filter",'..%1',12319999D);
                         ItemG.SETFILTER("Location Filter","Location Code");
                       // Start PA036549.32799
                       // Stop PA036549.32799
                         InvExpectedG := AvailabilityMgtG.ExpectedQtyOnHand(ItemG,TRUE,TRUE,0,InvtAvailableG,12319999D);
                       // Start EU.0111610.113539
                         ItemG.SETRANGE("Bin Filter","Bin Code");
                         ItemG.CALCFIELDS(
                           "Qty. on Purch. Order",
                           "Qty. on Order/Invoice",
                           "Net Change",
                           "Scheduled Receipt (Qty.)",
                           "Scheduled Need (Qty.)");
                         ItemG.CALCFIELDS("Qty. on Service Order", "Qty. on Branch Order");
                         ExpectedQtyOnHandG := AvailabilityMgtG.ExpectedQtyOnHand(ItemG,TRUE,TRUE,0,InvtAvailableG,12319999D);
                       // Stop EU.0111610.113539
                       END;
                       // Start PA041510
                       // Start PA031550
                       // Start PA032473
                       // Start PA032473
                       // Stop PA041510
                       // Stop PA031550
                       // Start PA032440
                       HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                       // Stop PA032440
                       // Start PA040667
                       // Start PA041187.89475
                       CodedPartValuesEnabledG := ItemL.GET("No.") AND (Type = Type::Item) AND (ItemL."Coded Part Type" <> '');
                       // Stop PA041187.89475
                       // Stop PA040667
                       // Start PA032820
                       CheckPricingControl();
                       // Stop PA032820
                       OnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                       DescriptionOnFormat;
                       AmountOnFormat(FORMAT(Amount));
                       AmountIncludingVATOnFormat(FORMAT("Amount Including VAT"));
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  // Start PA031550
                  // Start PA041510
                  // Stop PA041510
                  // Stop PA031550
                  // Start EU.0111610.113539
                  CLEAR(ExpectedQtyOnHandG);
                  // Stop EU.0111610.113539
                  CLEAR(InvtAvailableG);
                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases";
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::Item THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::"Account (G/L)" THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::"G/L Account";
                  IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN BEGIN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                  END;
                  // Start PA032440
                  HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                  // Stop PA032440
                  // Start PA032820
                  CheckPricingControl();
                  // Stop PA032820
                  OnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                END;

                     // Start PA032440

                     // Stop PA032440
                     // Start PA032820

                     // Stop PA032820
                   END;

      C_INC001@1109400007 : TextConst 'ENU=Please note that the total sum of the order must not be negative !';
      InvtAvailableG@1109400011 : Decimal;
      InvExpectedG@1109400010 : Decimal;
      C_IMS001@1101353000 : TextConst 'ENU=There is no available Inventory for Item %1.\';
      C_IMS002@1101353001 : TextConst 'ENU=Do you want to use Alternative Item %2 instead?';
      FormUpdateG@1109400008 : Boolean;

      EUTireDataCodeEditableG@1101221269 : Boolean INDATASET;

      C_INC_ErrorConditionForQty@17722600 : TextConst 'ENU=You cannot delete line %1, because a shipped and/or invoiced quantity has been assigned to it.';

    PROCEDURE ResetHdrRec@10430600();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0104306
      // Start EU.0124901.125228
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
        AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
      // Stop EU.0124901.125228
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    PROCEDURE ApproveCalcInvDisc@1();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Disc. (Yes/No)",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDisc@6();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Calc. Discount",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE ExplodeBOM@3();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Explode BOM",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE OpenPurchOrderForm@4();
    VAR
      PurchHdrL@1109400000 : Record 38;
      PurchOrderL@1109400001 : Page 5045778;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032651.4619161
      TESTFIELD("Purchase Order No.");
      PurchHdrL.SETRANGE("No.","Purchase Order No.");
      PurchOrderL.SETTABLEVIEW(PurchHdrL);
      PurchOrderL.EDITABLE := FALSE;
      PurchOrderL.RUN;
      // Stop PA032651.4619161
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524200();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 37;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdateSalesDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@5(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.InsertSalesExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransfExtTextG.MakeUpdate THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowDocumentLineTracking@8();
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(DocLineTrackingG);
      DocLineTrackingG.SetDoc(0,"Document No.","Line No.");
      DocLineTrackingG.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowPriceCalculation@5025351();
    VAR
      ShowPriceCalcL@1109400001 : Page 5025825;
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(ShowPriceCalcL);
      ShowPriceCalcL.SetLine(Rec);
      ShowPriceCalcL.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@5025352();
    VAR
      ItemAvailabilityL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028701;
    BEGIN
      ItemAvailabilityL.DisplayBySalesLine('',Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@5025353();
    VAR
      VehicleAvailOnHandL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028660;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA033019.1446608
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      // Start PA041146.68559
      CLEAR(InvtAvailableG);
      // Stop PA041146.68559
      FormUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      // Start PA033019.8981043
      IF Quantity = 0 THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA033704.8981043
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA041776
      // Stop PA041776
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          VehicleAvailOnHandL.CalculateSalesLine(Rec);
          UpdateaAddtlItemQuantity();
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      // Start PA033019.8981043
      END ELSE BEGIN
        VALIDATE(Quantity);
      END;
      // Stop PA033019.8981043
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts

      // Start PA035597
      IF FormUpdateG THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA036549.32799
        MODIFY;
      // Stop PA036549.32799
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA032178.1446608
    END;

    PROCEDURE MarkLine@1109400010(DocTypeP@1109400002 : Integer;DocNoP@1109400001 : Code[20];LineNoP@1109400000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF GET(DocTypeP,DocNoP,LineNoP) THEN BEGIN
        MARK := TRUE;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400006();
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA032820
      // Start PA033019
      UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
      CASE Type OF
        Type::Item:
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Item Unit Price";
      END;
      AmountEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      IF UnitPriceEditableG THEN
        IF GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() THEN
          IF SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic" = SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic"::"Amount + VAT" THEN
            AmountIncludingVATEditableG := FALSE
          ELSE
            AmountEditableG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      // Stop PA033019
      // Stop PA032820
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowShippedLines@1101422630();
    VAR
      FormShippedLinesL@1101422631 : Page 5029020;
    BEGIN
      // @ Use the function to show the open shipment in the Line Level
      // Start PA033978.I000905
      FormShippedLinesL.InitializeForm(DATABASE::"Sales Header", "Document No.", "Line No.");
      FormShippedLinesL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA033978.I000905
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE IsImporter@5025800() : Boolean;
    BEGIN
      EXIT(CompanyInfoG.IMSCheck());
    END;

    PROCEDURE SpecialFunctionCall@1101287075();
    VAR
      RecordReferenceL@1101287076 : RecordRef;
      PageSpecialFunctionsL@1101287075 : Page 5206814;
    BEGIN
      // @ Sets the parameters to the special function page

      // Start PA033895.I000854
      CLEAR(RecordReferenceL);
      RecordReferenceL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(PageSpecialFunctionsL);
      PageSpecialFunctionsL.SetParameters(PAGE::"Parts Sales Order Subform",RecordReferenceL,"Shortcut Dimension 2 Code",'');
      PageSpecialFunctionsL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA033895.I000854
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE NoOnAfterValidate@19066594();
    VAR
      ItemL@1101353002 : Record 27;
      AltItemL@1101353003 : Record 27;
    BEGIN
      IF IsImporter AND GUIALLOWED THEN BEGIN
        IF (Type = Type::Item) AND ItemL.GET("No.") AND (ItemL."Alternative Item No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
          ItemL.CALCFIELDS(Inventory);
          IF (ItemL.Inventory <= 0) AND AltItemL.GET(ItemL."Alternative Item No.") THEN BEGIN
            AltItemL.CALCFIELDS(Inventory);
            IF AltItemL.Inventory > 0 THEN
              IF CONFIRM(C_IMS001 + C_IMS002,TRUE,ItemL."No.",AltItemL."No.") THEN
                VALIDATE("No.",AltItemL."No.");
          END;
        END;
      END;

      InsertLine();
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      IF Quantity < 0 THEN
        MESSAGE(C_INC001);

      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
      // Start PA042761
      UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReserveOnAfterValidate@19004502();
    BEGIN
      IF (Reserve = Reserve::Always) AND ("Outstanding Qty. (Base)" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnAfterGetCurrRecord@19077479();
    VAR
      ItemL@1101221267 : Record 27;
    BEGIN
      xRec := Rec;
      // Start PA033765
      EUTireDataCodeEditableG := FALSE;
      // Start PA034527.19632
      IF SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation" THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA034527.19632
        IF Type = Type::Item THEN BEGIN
          EUTireDataCodeEditableG := ItemL.GET("No.") AND ItemL."Tire Item";
        END;
      END;
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA033765
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnFormat@19023855();
    BEGIN
      // Start PA042861
      // Stop PA042861
      DescriptionEmphasizeG := Type IN [Type::Header,Type::"Begin-Total",Type::"End-Total"];
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountOnFormat@19014598(Text@19024947 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      AmountEmphasizeG := FALSE;
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal(Subtotal,SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT(Subtotal,0,FormatTextG);
        AmountEmphasizeG := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountIncludingVATOnFormat@19052024(Text@19021844 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      AmountIncludingVATEmphasizeG := FALSE;
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal("Subtotal Incl.VAT",SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT("Subtotal Incl.VAT",0,FormatTextG);
        AmountIncludingVATEmphasizeG := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesTotalFactbox@1000000002();
    BEGIN
      // @ This function refreshes the Sales Total Factbox.
      // Start PA042761
      CurrPage.UPDATE; // <-- Refresh of Sales line for line based fact box
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type", "Document No.") THEN
        SalesHdrG.MODIFY; // <-- Refresh of Sales Header for header based fact box
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectedRecords@1109400000(VAR TempRecP@1000 : TEMPORARY Record 37);
    VAR
      RecL@1001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function provides a temporal set of records based on the selected records on the page
      // @ param TempRecP : temporary record based on Sales Line
      // Start PA041510
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(RecL);
      IF RecL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          TempRecP := RecL;
          TempRecP.INSERT;
        UNTIL RecL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop PA041510
    END;

  {
    CaptionML=ENU=Lines;
    MultipleNewLines=Yes;
    SourceTable=Table37;
    DelayedInsert=Yes;
    SourceTableView=WHERE(Document Type=FILTER(Invoice));
    PageType=ListPart;
    AutoSplitKey=Yes;
    OnInit=BEGIN
             AmountIncludingVATEditableG := TRUE;
             AmountEditableG := TRUE;
             UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
             EUTireDataCodeVisibleG := TRUE;
             EUTireDataCodeEditableG := TRUE;
             // Start EU.0104306
             AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive();
             BothAmountFieldsVisibleG := GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display One or Both Amounts" = GeneralLedgerSetupG."Display One or Both Amounts"::"Both Fields ('Amount' and 'Amount incl. VAT')";
             // Stop EU.0104306
           END;

    OnOpenPage=BEGIN
                 // Start PA032440
                 UserSetupG.GET(USERID);
                 // Stop PA032440
                 // Start PA033765
                 SalesReceivablesSetupG.GET();
                 // Start PA034527.19632
                 EUTireDataCodeVisibleG := SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation";
                 // Stop PA034527.19632
                 // Start PA035597
                 // Stop PA035597
                 // Stop PA033765
               END;

    OnAfterGetRecord=VAR
                       ItemL@1109400000 : Record 27;
                     BEGIN
                       // Start EU.0104306
                       // Start EU.0126935.127725
                       IF ("Document No." <> SalesHdrG."No.") OR ("Line No." = 10000) THEN
                       // Stop EU.0126935.127725
                         IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
                           AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
                       // Stop EU.0104306
                       // Start PA042861
                       // Stop PA042861
                       DescriptionHideValue := FALSE;
                       OnAfterGetRecordFn;
                       DescriptionOnFormat;
                       AmountOnFormat(FORMAT(Amount));
                       AmountIncludingVATOnFormat(FORMAT("Amount Including VAT"));
                       // Start PA036549.33408
                       HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                       // Stop PA036549.33408
                       // Start PA036002.26208
                       ShowShortcutDimCode(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                       // Stop PA036002.26208
                       // Start PA040667
                       // Start PA041187.89475
                       CodedPartValuesEnabledG := ItemL.GET("No.") AND (Type = Type::Item) AND (ItemL."Coded Part Type" <> '');
                       // Stop PA041187.89475
                       // Stop PA040667
                     END;

    OnNewRecord=BEGIN
                  // Start PA031550
                  // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                  LineWarningG := FALSE;
                  // Stop PA031550

                  Type := xRec.Type;
                  "Order Type" := "Order Type"::"Parts Sales & Purchases";
                  IF xRec."Document No." = '' THEN
                    Type := Type::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::Item THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::Item;
                  IF Type = Type::"Account (G/L)" THEN
                    "Item Type" := "Item Type"::"G/L Account";
                  IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN BEGIN
                    "Shortcut Dimension 2 Code" := SalesHdrG."Shortcut Dimension 2 Code";
                  END;
                  // Start PA032820
                  CheckPricingControl();
                  // Stop PA032820
                  OnAfterGetCurrRecord;
                  // Start PA036549.33408
                  HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                  // Stop PA036549.33408
                  // Start PA036002.26208
                  CLEAR(ShortcutDimCodeG);
                  // Stop PA036002.26208
                END;

    OnInsertRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA032440
                     HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
                     // Stop PA032440
                     // Start PA032820
                     CheckPricingControl();
                     // Stop PA032820
                   END;

    OnModifyRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA031550
                     // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
                     // Start PA035597
                     CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
                     // Stop PA035597
                     // Stop PA031550
                   END;

    OnDeleteRecord=BEGIN
                     // Start PA042761
                     UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
                     // Stop PA042761
                   END;

    ActionList=ACTIONS

    VAR
      GeneralLedgerSetupG@10430601 : Record 98;
      UserSetupG@1101342643 : Record 91;
      SalesReceivablesSetupG@1101221267 : Record 311;
      SalesHdrG@1101342644 : Record 36;
      OnLookupItemG@1101286982 : Record 27;
      TransfExtTextG@1109400000 : Codeunit 378;
      CollectionUnitG@1109400004 : Codeunit 5028657;
      RTCMgmtG@1109400011 : Codeunit 5206801;
      FormatTextG@1109400005 : Text[100];
      FormUpdateG@1109400006 : Boolean;
      LineWarningG@1119427000 : Boolean INDATASET;
      HideItemCostG@1109400007 : Boolean INDATASET;
      EUTireDataCodeVisibleG@1101221268 : Boolean INDATASET;
      EUTireDataCodeEditableG@1101221269 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DescriptionHideValue@19024429 : Boolean INDATASET;
      DescriptionEmphasize@19010547 : Boolean INDATASET;
      AmountEmphasize@19073101 : Boolean INDATASET;
      AmountIncludingVATEmphasizeG@19035561 : Boolean INDATASET;
      UnitPriceEditableG@19072822 : Boolean INDATASET;
      AmountEditableG@19000309 : Boolean INDATASET;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG@19025550 : Boolean INDATASET;

      BothAmountFieldsVisibleG@10430602 : Boolean;

    PROCEDURE ResetHdrRec@10430600();
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0104306
      // Start EU.0124901.125228
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.") THEN
        AmountVisibleG := NOT GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicInDocActive(SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic");
      // Stop EU.0124901.125228
      // Stop EU.0104306
    END;

    PROCEDURE ApproveCalcInvDisc@1();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Disc. (Yes/No)",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE CalcInvDisc@8();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Calc. Discount",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE ExplodeBOM@3();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Explode BOM",Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetShipment@4();
    BEGIN
      CODEUNIT.RUN(CODEUNIT::"Sales-Get Shipment",Rec);
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnAssistEdit@19524200();
    VAR
      RecL@19524200 : Record 37;
      TextEditorMgmtL@19524201 : Codeunit 5045375;
    BEGIN
      // Start EU.0195242
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') AND (Description = '') THEN
        Type := Type::" ";
      IF (Type <> Type::" ") AND ("No." = '') THEN
        EXIT;
      IF "Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
        Type := Type::" ";
        Description := ' ';
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
        Description := '';
        MODIFY;
      END;
      COMMIT;
      IF TextEditorMgmtL.UpdateSalesDescriptions(Rec) THEN BEGIN
        IF GET(RECORDID) THEN
          IF (Description = '') AND (Type = Type::" ") AND ("Attached to Line No." = 0) THEN
            IF xRec."Line No." = 0 THEN BEGIN
              RecL.COPY(Rec);
              RecL.SETRECFILTER;
              RecL.SETFILTER("Line No.", '<>%1', "Line No.");
              RecL.SETRANGE("Attached to Line No.","Line No.");
              IF RecL.ISEMPTY THEN
                DELETE;
            END;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(TRUE);
      END;
      // Stop EU.0195242
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertExtendedText@7(UnconditionallyP@1109400000 : Boolean);
    BEGIN
      IF TransfExtTextG.SalesCheckIfAnyExtText(Rec,UnconditionallyP) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        TransfExtTextG.InsertSalesExtText(Rec);
      END;
      IF TransfExtTextG.MakeUpdate THEN
        CurrPage.UPDATE;
    END;

    PROCEDURE ShowPriceCalculation@5025351();
    VAR
      ShowPriceCalcL@1109400001 : Page 5025825;
    BEGIN
      CLEAR(ShowPriceCalcL);
      ShowPriceCalcL.SetLine(Rec);
      ShowPriceCalcL.RUNMODAL;
    END;

    PROCEDURE AvailabilityAllCompanies@5025352();
    VAR
      ItemAvailabilityL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028701;
    BEGIN
      ItemAvailabilityL.DisplayBySalesLine('',Rec);
    END;

    PROCEDURE InsertLine@5025353();
    VAR
      VehicleAvailOnHandL@1109400000 : Codeunit 5028660;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA032178.1446608
      CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
      FormUpdateG := Rec.CreatedRelatedLines(Rec);
      IF Quantity = 0 THEN
        IF Type IN [Type::Item, Type::"Account (G/L)"] THEN BEGIN
          VALIDATE(Quantity,1);
          VehicleAvailOnHandL.CalculateSalesLine(Rec);
          FormUpdateG := TRUE;
        END;
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597

      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
        FormUpdateG := TRUE;
      END;

      // @ The behaviour in Classic Client is different from RTC so handled differently.
      // @ Currform.Update throws an error message together with Currform.Saverecord in RTC.
      // @ Modify - To save the values eg. Quantity, Qty. to Ship. etc
      // @ Currform.Update(false) - For Autorefresh of lines eg. Deposit items, Extended texts

      // Start PA035597
      IF FormUpdateG THEN BEGIN
        MODIFY;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA032178.1446608
    END;

    PROCEDURE MarkLine@1109400010(DocTypeP@1109400002 : Integer;DocNoP@1109400001 : Code[20];LineNoP@1109400000 : Integer);
    BEGIN
      IF GET(DocTypeP,DocNoP,LineNoP) THEN BEGIN
        MARK := TRUE;
        CurrPage.UPDATE(FALSE);
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE CheckPricingControl@1109400006();
    BEGIN
      // @ Checks the fields in the 'Pricing Control' tab in the User Setup. If the user has insufficient rights some fields are set to
      // @ 'EDITABLE' = FALSE;
      // Start PA032820
      // Start PA033019
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      CASE TRUE OF
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Item Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::"Account (G/L)") AND ("Labor No." > ''):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Labor Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Vehicle):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Vehicle Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::"Own Option"):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Own Option Unit Price";
        (Type = Type::Item) AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::"Veh. Transfer"):
          UnitPriceEditableG := UserSetupG."Change Veh Transfer Unit Price";
        ELSE
          UnitPriceEditableG := TRUE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      END;
      AmountEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      AmountIncludingVATEditableG := UnitPriceEditableG;
      // Start EU.0135165.126936
      IF UnitPriceEditableG THEN
        IF GeneralLedgerSetupG.EnhancedVATCalculationLogicActive() THEN
          IF SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic" = SalesHdrG."VAT Calculation Logic"::"Amount + VAT" THEN
            AmountIncludingVATEditableG := FALSE
          ELSE
            AmountEditableG := FALSE;
      // Stop EU.0135165.126936
      // Stop PA033019
      // Stop PA032820
    END;

    PROCEDURE SpecialFunctionCall@1101287075();
    VAR
      RecordReferenceL@1101287076 : RecordRef;
      FormSpecialFunctionsL@1101287075 : Page 5206814;
    BEGIN
      // @ Sets the parameters to the special function form

      // Start PA033895.I000854
      CLEAR(RecordReferenceL);
      RecordReferenceL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      CLEAR(FormSpecialFunctionsL);
      FormSpecialFunctionsL.SetParameters(PAGE::"Parts Sales Invoice Subform",RecordReferenceL,"Shortcut Dimension 2 Code",'');
      FormSpecialFunctionsL.RUNMODAL;
      // Stop PA033895.I000854
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE QuantityOnAfterValidate@19032465();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
      // Start PA042761
      UpdateSalesTotalFactbox();
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE UnitofMeasureCodeOnAfterValida@19057939();
    BEGIN
      IF Reserve = Reserve::Always THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE ReserveOnAfterValidate@19004502();
    BEGIN
      IF (Reserve = Reserve::Always) AND ("Outstanding Qty. (Base)" <> 0) THEN BEGIN
        CurrPage.SAVERECORD;
        AutoReserve(TRUE);
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnAfterGetCurrRecord@19077479();
    VAR
      ItemL@1101221268 : Record 27;
    BEGIN
      xRec := Rec;
      // Start PA033765
      EUTireDataCodeEditableG := FALSE;
      // Start PA034527.19632
      IF SalesReceivablesSetupG."EU Tire Label Regulation" THEN BEGIN
      // Stop PA034527.19632
        IF Type = Type::Item THEN BEGIN
          EUTireDataCodeEditableG := ItemL.GET("No.") AND ItemL."Tire Item";
        END;
      END;
      // Start PA035597
      // Stop PA035597
      // Stop PA033765
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE DescriptionOnFormat@19023855();
    BEGIN
      IF Type = Type::"Begin-Total" THEN BEGIN
        DescriptionHideValue := TRUE;
        EXIT
      END;
      // Start PA042861
      // Stop PA042861
      IF Type IN [Type::Header,Type::"Begin-Total",Type::"End-Total"] THEN
        DescriptionEmphasize := TRUE;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE OnAfterGetRecordFn@19060761();
    VAR
      RecRefL@1119427000 : RecordRef;
    BEGIN
      // Start PA031550
      // @ QuickWins - Colors on Document Line
      LineWarningG := FALSE;
      IF (Type = Type:: Item) AND ("No." <> '') THEN BEGIN
        RecRefL.GETTABLE(Rec);
      // Start PA032473
        LineWarningG := RTCMgmtG.LineWarning(RecRefL);
      // Start PA032473
      END;
      // Stop PA031550
      // Start PA032440
      HideItemCostG := UserSetupG."Hide Item Cost" AND ("Item Type" = "Item Type"::Item);
      // Stop PA032440
      // Start PA032820
      CheckPricingControl();
      // Stop PA032820
      OnAfterGetCurrRecord;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountOnFormat@19014598(Text@19024947 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal(Subtotal,SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT(Subtotal,0,FormatTextG);
        AmountEmphasize := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    LOCAL PROCEDURE AmountIncludingVATOnFormat@19052024(Text@19021844 : Text[1024]);
    BEGIN
      IF (Type = Type::"End-Total") AND (Totaling <> '') THEN BEGIN
        CALCFIELDS(Subtotal,"Subtotal Incl.VAT");
        SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type","Document No.");
        FormatTextG := CollectionUnitG.AmountFormattingSubtotal("Subtotal Incl.VAT",SalesHdrG."Currency Code");
        Text := FORMAT("Subtotal Incl.VAT",0,FormatTextG);
        AmountIncludingVATEmphasizeG := TRUE;
      END;
    END;

    PROCEDURE UpdateSalesTotalFactbox@1000000002();
    BEGIN
      // @ This function refreshes the Sales Total Factbox.
      // Start PA042761
      CurrPage.UPDATE; // <-- Refresh of Sales line for line based fact box
      IF SalesHdrG.GET("Document Type", "Document No.") THEN
        SalesHdrG.MODIFY; // <-- Refresh of Sales Header for header based fact box
      // Stop PA042761
    END;

    PROCEDURE GetSelectedRecords@1109400000(VAR TempRecP@1000 : TEMPORARY Record 37);
    VAR
      RecL@1001 : Record 37;
    BEGIN
      // @ This function provides a temporal set of records based on the selected records on the page
      // @ param TempRecP : temporary record based on Sales Line
      // Start EU.0000369
      CurrPage.SETSELECTIONFILTER(RecL);
      IF RecL.FINDSET THEN
        REPEAT
          TempRecP := RecL;
          TempRecP.INSERT;
        UNTIL RecL.NEXT = 0;
      // Stop EU.0000369
    END;

    BEGIN

      PA031882   19.04.10 GL removal of functions GetPhaseTaskStep,GetJobLedger and job related fields
      PA032111   12.08.10 AA (BRL): Object renumbering changes due to Microsoft Agreement.
      PA032178   22.09.10 YI 1446608 - Reset of Currform.Update/Curform.Saverecord commands; Function InsertLine rearranged
